name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’m calling for an independent investigation into whether this was insider trading
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
We need answers and action.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2522%2E4032634%2EShT5Yx)
---
Let’s take a step back and take stock of what happened after Donald Trump imposed his reckless worldwide tariffs. Americans watched their retirement accounts take a hit. Businesses started hiking up prices, with many beginning to prepare for layoffs. Consumer confidence hit its lowest point in years as millions of Americans wondered if they’d have a job in three months. And Trump’s Wall Street buddies got — in his words — “yippy.” That seems to have been what caught his attention. On Wednesday, Trump made a couple of big moves. First, he shared some investing advice on Truth Social: “THIS IS A GREAT TIME TO BUY!!! DJT” By the way: “DJT” is the Wall Street ticker for Trump’s media company. As soon as he posted that message, his company’s stock price went through the roof. Then, just hours later, he paused a whole slew of tariffs. Stocks soared, and anyone who’d taken Trump’s tip — maybe including the wealthy donors he dines with at Mar-A-Lago — started seeing dollar signs flash before their eyes. Did we just see market manipulation and corruption in plain sight? Two things here: **1\. I’m calling for an independent investigation into whether Trump or anyone on his team intentionally manipulated the market to help out his billionaire buddies, and whether they engaged in insider trading.** **2\. On top of the potential corruption, Trump’s trade war chaos is hurting real people. Congress can and must take the blow torch out of his hands right now.** I’ve introduced bipartisan legislation that would roll back Trump’s bogus authority for launching this trade war in the first place. You see, Trump’s tariff policy is based on a law that says the president can take certain steps to respond to extraordinary threats and declare national emergencies. But Trump just declared that our long-standing trade relationships with dozens of countries counted as a national emergency. That’s not how this works. **Bottom line: Trump is not a king and Congress is not powerless. This is a moment for Republicans to show some backbone, and a few of them already did last week when they joined every Democrat in voting to reverse this disastrous trade war.[If you’re with me in this fight to prevent Trump from sabotaging our economy, add your name to show your support for my resolution that would undo Trump’s emergency declaration.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-tarriff/?source=EMZ25J_ENG_E_20250411_V1S1&t=8&akid=2522%2E4032634%2EShT5Yx)** | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-tarriff/?source=EMZ25J_ENG_E_20250411_V1S1&t=9&akid=2522%2E4032634%2EShT5Yx)
---
Look: tariffs can be an important tool in the economic toolbox, but they’ve got to be used like any tool — in the right way, and carefully.
Trump’s tariff policies are too broad, too across the board, and apply to way too many countries.
He keeps engaging in magical thinking about who’d pay for tariffs and how fast industries can spring up.
And like the rest of Trump’s agenda, his tariffs would hit the millions of Americans who are just scraping by the hardest. As Federal Reserve chair Jay Powell noted, under a Trump-style trade war, inflation would probably rise and make life even more unaffordable for working families everywhere.
Those are the people who get kicked in the teeth when our economy goes under. You can measure a recession with all kinds of fancy charts and graphics, but at the end of the day, they hit our nation one household at a time. Millions of people can lose their jobs, their savings, and their retirement. And in a Trump trade war, they’d also take on higher costs. So much for those lower prices Trump promised on the campaign trail, huh?
It took us years to dig our way out of the 2008 crash. But unlike the Great Recession, or the economic crisis from Covid, this economic chaos has been created by one man: Donald Trump.
**Trump’s abrupt reversal doesn’t erase the damage that has already been done, or help the uncertainty millions of Americans and businesses are facing. It’s up to Congress to remove his fake emergency authority to slap tariffs on our friends and foes alike, with little rhyme or reason.**
Republican members of Congress are already feeling uneasy about Trump’s tariff policies. A handful of them voted to reverse Trump’s “emergency” declaration justifying a trade war with Canada — but a handful isn’t enough. We need more Republicans to stiffen their spines and pass our resolution to protect families, businesses, and the United States’ position in the world.
[**Add your name to demand swift action to rein in this attack on our economy and stop Trump’s disastrous trade war agenda.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-tarriff/?source=EMZ25J_ENG_E_20250411_V1S1&t=10&akid=2522%2E4032634%2EShT5Yx)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---

---

---

Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2025 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We'll miss you, but you can always .

subject: did you see me on CNN?

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Hi there —
Last night, I had the tremendous honor of stepping onto the CNN stage for a prime time Town Hall with Democratic Rep. Jahana Hayes and Republican Reps. Mike Lawler and Ryan Mackenzie.
While Republican leaders are urging their Members of Congress to run away from the American people and dodge in-person constituent events, I directly spoke with voters.
What I heard during the CNN Town Hall wasn’t unlike what I hear every day from Californians.
People are worried about their life savings plummet as a result of Trump’s pointless and arbitrary trade wars.
Others are concerned about the chaotic nature of DOGE and Elon Musk’s unruly role in this administration.
And millions are terrified about cuts to Social Security and Medicaid which Republicans seem eager to wave through as quickly as possible.
I promise that I will never, ever stop fighting for you. I will join with our California Strong Congressional delegation to oppose any reckless Trump policy that harms you or your family.
But showing up and taking the fight directly to a prime time CNN Town Hall means that I am now a target. I narrowly flipped my seat from red-to-blue in 2024 (thanks to you!) and so all Republican eyes will be on my district and on defeating me. That’s why I’m asking: Will you split a donation right now between my campaign and the California Democratic Party to ensure we can organize in my district and get our message out? name: Tom Fitton
subject: Lawsuit for Epstein Files
body:
Trump Gets Control of Border!

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR EMAILS OF FBI EXECUTIVE ABUSING WHISTLEBLOWERS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34959&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj0wYUR5ZUFVNmtDYyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=14c198ba7007a2aa587c5723d83b99af4682e6fd27265f47768b4e9b92c1dc1a]

Judicial Watch is the national leader in fighting for accountability
and truth against powerful federal agencies.

We filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34947&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXBlcmtpbnMtd2hpc3RsZWJsb3dlci1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDA4OTEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=9e45d4e9a1525348231791bb4fc892dbc99ea1cfd883bfad3838af0260be922e]
against the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for emails of Dena
Perkins, a section chief of the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI),
regarding whistleblower retaliation (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S.
Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34947&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXBlcmtpbnMtd2hpc3RsZWJsb3dlci1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDA4OTEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=9e45d4e9a1525348231791bb4fc892dbc99ea1cfd883bfad3838af0260be922e]
(No. 1:25-cv-00891)).

Perkins was identified
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34948&F=T&&hash=c1e3f6f844fdaba49a865d0a07c1b7708e8f84bbe00be00c29b892a4adb30b45]
by Sen. Chuck Grassley, chairman of the Senate Judiciary Committee, as
an official who retaliated against whistleblowers who were considered
pro-Donald Trump:

> So, now I’m going to spend some time sharing statements from the
> whistleblowers who were retaliated against by some of the FBI
> officials Trump has recently fired.
>
> ***
>
> A third FBI whistleblower said, “On January 6, 2021, I took leave
> and went to see the President speak on the Ellipse. Later, my wife
> and I were among a crowd southwest of the Capitol. Even though we
> were involved in no violence, never set foot on the steps leading to
> the Capitol building, and never entered it, I self-reported my
> presence to the FBI after seeing the violence in news reports. The
> FBI did nothing at first, but more than a year later suspended my
> security clearance. Under the supervision of Jeff Veltri and Dena
> Perkins, investigators questioned my co-workers about whether I ever
> vocalized support for President Trump or objections to the COVID-19
> vaccine. I was forced to take early retirement to pay bills and have
> essentially been sidelined from employment opportunities due to FBI
> abuse of the clearance system to target me for my political
> beliefs.”
>
> A fourth FBI whistleblower and a registered Democrat said, “As a
> Security Division employee, I witnessed abuses committed against
> multiple employees by FBI senior leaders, particularly by Jeff
> Veltri and Dena Perkins. I also saw Security Division retaliate
> against five of its own employees for protesting these unlawful
> practices. Because I spoke out against these abuses, Perkins and
> Timothy Dunham suspended my security clearance, costing me my job
> and continuing employment, totaling approximately $700,000 in lost
> wages and retirement benefits.”
>
> A fifth FBI whistleblower said, “Although some FBI leaders who
> abused the clearance process like Dena Perkins and Jeff Veltri have
> already left, they weren’t alone. Timothy Dunham approved
> Perkins’s wrongdoing and engaged in his own. While most Security
> Division employees are fantastic, some FBI leaders still remain
> within the Security Integrity and Investigations Section who’ll
> continue this abuse of the process.”
>
> From FBI whistleblower Marcus Allen, “Jeff Veltri and Dena Perkins
> caused the suspension of my security clearance because I questioned
> whether the FBI Director was truthful to Congress and whether the
> FBI was obeying the law and Constitution in the January 6, 2021
> investigations. Their actions left me without pay for over two years
> while other FBI officials prevented me from having other income.
> Although the FBI ultimately reinstated my clearance and settled my
> lawsuit, my career at the FBI was over and the financial and
> emotional damage to me and my family will never be completely
> restored.”
>
> Another FBI whistleblower said, “After I was assigned to review
> Marcus Allen’s security clearance case, I noticed the file was
> missing relevant communications of Jeff Veltri, who ordered the
> opening of the case, Dena Perkins and FBI attorney Tasha Gibbs.
> Allen was entitled to those communications, which were evidence that
> his clearance suspension was retaliatory. Shortly after I completed
> the vast majority of work on the communication recommending
> Allen’s reinstatement, the Allen case was reassigned to another
> adjudicator and I was transferred to a different unit, apparently in
> reprisal for reporting the wrongdoing in the Allen suspension. I
> soon resigned from the FBI to avoid further retaliation. I believe
> Veltri, Perkins and Gibbs were responsible for retaliating against
> Allen, and that Giulio Arseni, Perkins and Gibbs were likely
> responsible for the retaliation against me.” [Marcus isrepresented
> by Judicial Watch
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34949&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd2hpc3RsZWJsb3dlci10by10ZXN0aWZ5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2be69a2337d1534d8330d6de844984e27d7af2d44d25045bcdc26686868ea279].]
>
> From FBI whistleblower Garret O’Boyle: “I faced retaliation from
> junior, mid and senior level ‘leaders’ in the FBI. More than 29
> months later, I’m still indefinitely suspended without pay and
> benefits. Other whistleblowers have since confirmed that the FBI
> intentionally stranded me in the middle of a move and withheld our
> possessions to maximize the pain of my suspension. A new era of
> accountability and true whistleblower protection at the FBI is long
> overdue. FBI officials like Sean Clark, Sean Fitzgerald, Jeff
> Berkebile, Dena Perkins, Jeff Veltri, Jennifer Moore, Michael
> Schneider, Timothy Dunham and other leadership up to Christopher
> Wray are responsible for what happened to me and my family. Ensuring
> that they no longer work at the FBI isn’t retribution, its
> responsible leadership.”

We sued after the Justice Department failed to respond to a May 10,
2024, FOIA request for:

> 1. All emails sent to and from Section Chief Dena Perkins regarding
> “whistleblower”, “whistleblowers”, “O’Boyle”,
> “Veritas” and/or “Trump”.
>
> 2. All SF-50s and SF-52s for SC Perkins.

SF-50s and SF-52s are documents recording personnel actions such as
promotions.

Perkins was among several FBI officials reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34950&F=T&&hash=2891d7151872160d8583c59b86f8ca82206e6e7880883c317e08ed2a4418b8bb]
fired by the Trump administration.

Our lawsuit shows elements of the FBI are still in cover-up mode about
its mistreatment of agents who indicated support of Donald Trump or
opposition to FBI abuses. Transparency and accountability can’t come
soon enough.

We are perhaps the nation’s leading FOIA litigant against the FBI on
its corruption issues, as well as lawfare against President Trump.

In March 2025, we filed suit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34878&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWlzY29uZHVjdC1ieS1qYWNrLXNtaXRoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9c0f8e65071737ec6468eb1b53dd0de4c4bbb372bb0e9bae77f911ad41485721]
against the
Justice Department for details of any investigations, inquiries, or
referrals concerning potential misconduct of any person working for
Special Counsel Jack Smith.

In September 2024, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=33761&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9zdHMtY3JpdGljYWwtb2YtdHJ1bXAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1f70b14a50ed1b4a9fae9f9ef2b7768841ff3c9e3af3e860debb79bcf481eb6b]
the Justice
Department for messages among top leaders of the FBI referencing
social media posts of Special Agent Jeffrey Veltri
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=33735&F=T&&hash=02c0ef77260f257edbaa377c5a2fc7aae006cbf8b86e990ff4d94d2e6d5fea3d],
head of the Miami Field Office, which is investigating the September
15 assassination attempt against Donald Trump.

In May 2024, we uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=32339&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmFpZC1vZi10cnVtcHMtaG9tZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9a9ce94681988da6e02c7fd65c6c48a23a742e7c1daf21d923acd26aedd660a1]
a recording of a
phone message
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=32356&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXNlY3JldC1zZXJ2aWNlLW1hci1hLWxhZ28tZmJpLWF1ZGlvLTAzMTQ3Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=7eb5b3d1e1f6e4bdb6418fcd608624a996dba03fa51977205e427def772537a8]
left by an FBI special agent for someone at the Secret Service in the
context of the raid on President Trump’s home in Mar-a-Lago,
Florida.

In April 2024, Justice Department records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=31970&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9zdGh1bW91cy1pbnZlc3RpZ2F0aW9uLW9mLWJhYmJpdHQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e9724243f5fea6c1ef97d2b1c3c7e9c256a01f9ef45904c4c795aa7fd86eb4c1]
showed that the FBI opened a criminal investigation of Air Force
veteran Ashli Babbitt after her killing and listed four “potential
violations of federal law,” including felony rioting and civil
disorder.

In January 2023, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=28761&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWxhcHRvcC1zdG9yeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=12e49544581f463d7e44109397bf10acf5ba7eb60189da5176c4480aaf658b93]
the Justice
Department for records of communications between the FBI and social
media sites regarding foreign influence in elections, as well as the
Hunter Biden laptop story.

In November 2023, we, along with CatholicVote Civic Action, received
FBI records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=30725&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmJpLXRhcmdldGluZy1vZi1jYXRob2xpY3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=a484ae76dd25fc9988875706faeca09c016d4ebaf209b6439b38f7c57734c7c8]
showing
top officials rushing to craft a public response to the leaked
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=30709&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVhbGNsZWFycmVsaWdpb24ub3JnLzIwMjMvMDIvMTAvZmJpX2RvdWJsZXNfZG93bl9vbl9jaHJpc3RpYW5zX2FuZF93aGl0ZV9zdXByZW1hY3lfODgwODg3Lmh0bWw/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=14df0847eeda5e64733ef6dafcd1be7ebde2a375a4ecf613efcf07e16bd879e9]
FBI intelligence memo that revealed its targeting of Catholics who
adhere to traditional beliefs on church issues. In December 2023,
heavily redacted records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=30922&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFyZ2V0aW5nLW9mLWNhdGhvbGljcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e4f35c10110c0325fcc8de4a9fe7085d5c031c84419c9e7a78a1a4a23f1ee824]
from the FBI
showed that the agency’s Office of General Counsel reviewed the

of Catholics by the Richmond field office of the FBI.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE DEPARTMENT FOR EPSTEIN CLIENT LISTS

The Justice Department and FBI need to respond to public demands for
transparency under law and release the Jeffrey Epstein files.

We filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34953&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWVwc3RlaW4tZmlsZXMtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxMDU2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=fd9215f398c902681a9b847e29d040ffbb6a0982cabfe8573178201e5be37d99]
against the Department of Justice for records regarding Epstein,
including any records on the identities of clients or associates of
Epstein (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34953&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWVwc3RlaW4tZmlsZXMtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxMDU2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=fd9215f398c902681a9b847e29d040ffbb6a0982cabfe8573178201e5be37d99]
(No. 1:25-cv-01056)).

We sued after the Justice Department failed to adequately respond to
four separate FOIA requests for records concerning Jeffrey Epstein,
including a specific request for records “depicting the identities
of clients or associates of Jeffrey Epstein.” Epstein document
requests were sent to the Justice Department’s Office of Information
Policy and the Criminal Division, and two separate requests were sent
to the FBI.

The lawsuit references a February 24, 2025, Fox News report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34955&F=T&&hash=537064ad96ce03bce3501d683ca2d243529e0d8e1f58ff89c6b43ecadde62a83]
stating that President Trump’s “return to the Oval Office came
with the prospect of the public finally being able to see Epstein’s
long-awaited ‘black book’ amid inquiries into the deceased
financier and sex trafficker.”

Epstein died in federal custody in 2019 while awaiting trial on sex
trafficking charges.

On February 27, 2025, the Justice Department released a long-awaited
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34958&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjUvMDIvMjcvdXMtbmV3cy9qZWZmcmV5LWVwc3RlaW4tY29udGFjdC1saXN0LXJlbGVhc2VkLWJ5LXRydW1wLWRvai8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=ad36965813d2b50eaf17f25b5e510812eb99948548c7f380ab59d9298378481f]
trove of documents related to Epstein. As stated by the _New York
Post_: “But the much-hyped, roughly 200-page document dump provided
no big revelations, instead listing celebrities and politicians who
were already known to have palled around with the notorious
pedophile.”

BORDER CROSSINGS LOWEST IN HISTORY, FROM 155,000 A MONTH TO 7,180

President Trump’s border security surge is working. After years of
wave after wave of foreign nationals walking freely into our country,
we are finally getting relief. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog
reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34944&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYm9yZGVyLWNyb3NzaW5ncy1sb3dlc3QtaW4taGlzdG9yeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=d3e32bb3be52e40c38f42aa95639dbb052358dd22f0077c3865c5ff622d0eff0].

> After years of getting hammered by the Biden administration’s
> catastrophic—and inconceivable—open border policies, the
> Department of Homeland Security (DHS) is delivering much-needed good
> news; in March the United States experienced the lowest southwest
> border crossings in history thanks to new measures put in place by
> President Trump to finally secure the famously porous Mexican border
> region. The new government figures show a remarkably quick
> turnaround for an administration that inherited an extraordinary
> crisis in which a ghastly 7.6 illegal aliens entered the country,
> nearly 2 million of them from nation’s that Biden’s own DHS
> determined pose a national security threat to the U.S.
>
> In a matter of weeks, the Trump administration took control of the
> situation, with a dramatic drop in illegal crossings, around 7,180 a
> month compared to the monthly average of 155,000 from the previous
> four years. Daily southwest border apprehensions have also decreased
> an incredible 95%, to about 230 daily from an astonishing 5,100 per
> day under Biden. This marks a pivotal achievement in the nation’s
> border security efforts, according to an announcement
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34961&F=T&&hash=4f5c03f7ee4cb40ea2a512eae63a53f30ac5b9caf52d37505de02d897ec2f54c]
> issued recently by U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP). “This
> milestone demonstrates that operational control is becoming a
> reality — which seemed impossible just a few months ago under the
> Biden administration — as enforcement measures continue to yield
> significant results,” the DHS agency writes. Border Patrol agents
> have finally been empowered to shut down unlawful entry and protect
> American lives, CBP Commissioner Pete Flores confirms. He says the
> message is clear: “The border is closed to illegal crossings, and
> for those still willing to test our resolve, know this — you will
> be prosecuted, and you will be deported.”
>
> It is a vastly different message than the one sent by the Biden
> administration, which proudly rolled out the welcome mat for a
> record number of illegal immigrants, including droves of violent
> gang members, Islamic terrorists, tens of thousands of Chinese
> nationals and a myriad of criminals. The former president’s own
> DHS determined that over 1.7 million illegal aliens from countries
> that pose a national security threat entered the U.S. during his
> tenure and dozens that appear on the terrorist watchlist were
> released into American communities, according to government figures
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=33711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGVycm9yaXN0LXRocmVhdC10by11cy1za3lyb2NrZXRlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=828002323ae63fc7b3db509f5bc0dd39ec6c22908b2c7a62cc34bec64e867624]
> reluctantly provided to Congress. The migrants from countries that
> pose a security threat to the U.S. are labeled Special Interest
> Aliens (SIA) by the government and they come from some 26 nations,
> including Afghanistan, Cuba, Iran, Iraq, Libya, Nigeria, Syria, and
> Turkey, China, North Korea, Kyrgyzstan, Mauritania, Tajikistan,
> Uzbekistan, and Venezuela.
>
> The previous administration also released over half a million
> criminal aliens
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=33581&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY3JpbWluYWwtaWxsZWdhbC1hbGllbnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b226197bc4571169269eaeef53536d553a35921336946bcdac1f57f992612536]
inside the
> U.S. by putting them on a “non-detained docket” that allowed
> them to live in communities throughout the nation. Over 435,000 had
> criminal convictions and another 226,847 pending charges, according
> to DHS figures made public by a congressional committee. Nearly
> 15,000 of the freed illegal aliens were convicted of or charged with
> murder, more than 20,000 with sexual assault, 60,268 with burglary,
> larceny, or robbery, 105,146 with assault, 16,820 with weapon
> offenses, 3,971 with commercialized sex crimes and 3,372 with
> kidnapping. Over 126,000 committed traffic offenses, more than
> 70,000 are in the system for drug crimes, 21,106 for fraudulent
> activities and 12,000 for obstruction of justice. As a parting gift
> in early January the Biden administration shielded nearly a million
> foreign nationals
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34255&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd2VhdGhlci1pbGxlZ2FsLWFsaWVucy1hbW5lc3R5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e6c9524cf1b3345c0c85d3ab9858fb4378310470da816fd406305f6574b2c023]
from
> deportation with Temporary Protected Status (TPS), a humanitarian
> measure designed to help undocumented aliens avoid removal during
> emergencies.
>
> Fortunately, the Trump administration revoked Biden’s
> eleventh-hour TPS, though a series of lawsuits were quickly filed by
> leftist groups in the name of the illegal aliens, who are mostly
> from Venezuela, Cuba, Haiti, and Nicaragua. The new
> administration’s message is clear and has been spread in
> Spanish-language media throughout Latin America. It warns illegal
> aliens
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73342&L=34962&F=T&&hash=5e984513bb96e54d34ece1d0dbcc89fa1e26affd06eb6940152afacbfb8e8510]
> not to come to America and break its laws. “If you are a criminal
> alien considering entering America illegally: Don’t even think
> about it,” said DHS Secretary Kristi Noem. “If you come here and
> break our laws, we will hunt you down.” Criminals are not welcome
> in the United States.”

Until next week,

clean_body: Trump Gets Control of Border! [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR EMAILS OF FBI EXECUTIVE ABUSING WHISTLEBLOWERS [] Judicial Watch is the national leader in fighting for accountability and truth against powerful federal agencies. We filed a FOIA lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for emails of Dena Perkins, a section chief of the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI), regarding whistleblower retaliation (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv-00891)). Perkins was identified [] by Sen. Chuck Grassley, chairman of the Senate Judiciary Committee, as an official who retaliated against whistleblowers who were considered pro-Donald Trump: So, now I’m going to spend some time sharing statements from the whistleblowers who were retaliated against by some of the FBI officials Trump has recently fired. *** A third FBI whistleblower said, “On January 6, 2021, I took leave and went to see the President speak on the Ellipse. Later, my wife and I were among a crowd southwest of the Capitol. Even though we were involved in no violence, never set foot on the steps leading to the Capitol building, and never entered it, I self-reported my presence to the FBI after seeing the violence in news reports. The FBI did nothing at first, but more than a year later suspended my security clearance. Under the supervision of Jeff Veltri and Dena Perkins, investigators questioned my co-workers about whether I ever vocalized support for President Trump or objections to the COVID-19 vaccine. I was forced to take early retirement to pay bills and have essentially been sidelined from employment opportunities due to FBI abuse of the clearance system to target me for my political beliefs.” A fourth FBI whistleblower and a registered Democrat said, “As a Security Division employee, I witnessed abuses committed against multiple employees by FBI senior leaders, particularly by Jeff Veltri and Dena Perkins. I also saw Security Division retaliate against five of its own employees for protesting these unlawful practices. Because I spoke out against these abuses, Perkins and Timothy Dunham suspended my security clearance, costing me my job and continuing employment, totaling approximately $700,000 in lost wages and retirement benefits.” A fifth FBI whistleblower said, “Although some FBI leaders who abused the clearance process like Dena Perkins and Jeff Veltri have already left, they weren’t alone. Timothy Dunham approved Perkins’s wrongdoing and engaged in his own. While most Security Division employees are fantastic, some FBI leaders still remain within the Security Integrity and Investigations Section who’ll continue this abuse of the process.” From FBI whistleblower Marcus Allen, “Jeff Veltri and Dena Perkins caused the suspension of my security clearance because I questioned whether the FBI Director was truthful to Congress and whether the FBI was obeying the law and Constitution in the January 6, 2021 investigations. Their actions left me without pay for over two years while other FBI officials prevented me from having other income. Although the FBI ultimately reinstated my clearance and settled my lawsuit, my career at the FBI was over and the financial and emotional damage to me and my family will never be completely restored.” Another FBI whistleblower said, “After I was assigned to review Marcus Allen’s security clearance case, I noticed the file was missing relevant communications of Jeff Veltri, who ordered the opening of the case, Dena Perkins and FBI attorney Tasha Gibbs. Allen was entitled to those communications, which were evidence that his clearance suspension was retaliatory. Shortly after I completed the vast majority of work on the communication recommending Allen’s reinstatement, the Allen case was reassigned to another adjudicator and I was transferred to a different unit, apparently in reprisal for reporting the wrongdoing in the Allen suspension. I soon resigned from the FBI to avoid further retaliation. I believe Veltri, Perkins and Gibbs were responsible for retaliating against Allen, and that Giulio Arseni, Perkins and Gibbs were likely responsible for the retaliation against me.” [Marcus isrepresented by Judicial Watch [].] From FBI whistleblower Garret O’Boyle: “I faced retaliation from junior, mid and senior level ‘leaders’ in the FBI. More than 29 months later, I’m still indefinitely suspended without pay and benefits. Other whistleblowers have since confirmed that the FBI intentionally stranded me in the middle of a move and withheld our possessions to maximize the pain of my suspension. A new era of accountability and true whistleblower protection at the FBI is long overdue. FBI officials like Sean Clark, Sean Fitzgerald, Jeff Berkebile, Dena Perkins, Jeff Veltri, Jennifer Moore, Michael Schneider, Timothy Dunham and other leadership up to Christopher Wray are responsible for what happened to me and my family. Ensuring that they no longer work at the FBI isn’t retribution, its responsible leadership.” We sued after the Justice Department failed to respond to a May 10, 2024, FOIA request for: 1. All emails sent to and from Section Chief Dena Perkins regarding “whistleblower”, “whistleblowers”, “O’Boyle”, “Veritas” and/or “Trump”. 2. All SF-50s and SF-52s for SC Perkins. SF-50s and SF-52s are documents recording personnel actions such as promotions. Perkins was among several FBI officials reportedly [] fired by the Trump administration. Our lawsuit shows elements of the FBI are still in cover-up mode about its mistreatment of agents who indicated support of Donald Trump or opposition to FBI abuses. Transparency and accountability can’t come soon enough. We are perhaps the nation’s leading FOIA litigant against the FBI on its corruption issues, as well as lawfare against President Trump. In March 2025, we filed suit [] against the Justice Department for details of any investigations, inquiries, or referrals concerning potential misconduct of any person working for Special Counsel Jack Smith. In September 2024, we sued [] the Justice Department for messages among top leaders of the FBI referencing social media posts of Special Agent Jeffrey Veltri [], head of the Miami Field Office, which is investigating the September 15 assassination attempt against Donald Trump. In May 2024, we uncovered [] a recording of a phone message [] left by an FBI special agent for someone at the Secret Service in the context of the raid on President Trump’s home in Mar-a-Lago, Florida. In April 2024, Justice Department records [] showed that the FBI opened a criminal investigation of Air Force veteran Ashli Babbitt after her killing and listed four “potential violations of federal law,” including felony rioting and civil disorder. In January 2023, we sued [] the Justice Department for records of communications between the FBI and social media sites regarding foreign influence in elections, as well as the Hunter Biden laptop story. In November 2023, we, along with CatholicVote Civic Action, received FBI records [] showing top officials rushing to craft a public response to the leaked [] FBI intelligence memo that revealed its targeting of Catholics who adhere to traditional beliefs on church issues. In December 2023, heavily redacted records [] from the FBI showed that the agency’s Office of General Counsel reviewed the controversial targetin [ [] of Catholics by the Richmond field office of the FBI. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE DEPARTMENT FOR EPSTEIN CLIENT LISTS The Justice Department and FBI need to respond to public demands for transparency under law and release the Jeffrey Epstein files. We filed a FOIA lawsuit [] against the Department of Justice for records regarding Epstein, including any records on the identities of clients or associates of Epstein (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv-01056)). We sued after the Justice Department failed to adequately respond to four separate FOIA requests for records concerning Jeffrey Epstein, including a specific request for records “depicting the identities of clients or associates of Jeffrey Epstein.” Epstein document requests were sent to the Justice Department’s Office of Information Policy and the Criminal Division, and two separate requests were sent to the FBI. The lawsuit references a February 24, 2025, Fox News report [] stating that President Trump’s “return to the Oval Office came with the prospect of the public finally being able to see Epstein’s long-awaited ‘black book’ amid inquiries into the deceased financier and sex trafficker.” Epstein died in federal custody in 2019 while awaiting trial on sex trafficking charges. On February 27, 2025, the Justice Department released a long-awaited [] trove of documents related to Epstein. As stated by the New York Post: “But the much-hyped, roughly 200-page document dump provided no big revelations, instead listing celebrities and politicians who were already known to have palled around with the notorious pedophile.” BORDER CROSSINGS LOWEST IN HISTORY, FROM 155,000 A MONTH TO 7,180 President Trump’s border security surge is working. After years of wave after wave of foreign nationals walking freely into our country, we are finally getting relief. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. After years of getting hammered by the Biden administration’s catastrophic—and inconceivable—open border policies, the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) is delivering much-needed good news; in March the United States experienced the lowest southwest border crossings in history thanks to new measures put in place by President Trump to finally secure the famously porous Mexican border region. The new government figures show a remarkably quick turnaround for an administration that inherited an extraordinary crisis in which a ghastly 7.6 illegal aliens entered the country, nearly 2 million of them from nation’s that Biden’s own DHS determined pose a national security threat to the U.S. In a matter of weeks, the Trump administration took control of the situation, with a dramatic drop in illegal crossings, around 7,180 a month compared to the monthly average of 155,000 from the previous four years. Daily southwest border apprehensions have also decreased an incredible 95%, to about 230 daily from an astonishing 5,100 per day under Biden. This marks a pivotal achievement in the nation’s border security efforts, according to an announcement [] issued recently by U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP). “This milestone demonstrates that operational control is becoming a reality — which seemed impossible just a few months ago under the Biden administration — as enforcement measures continue to yield significant results,” the DHS agency writes. Border Patrol agents have finally been empowered to shut down unlawful entry and protect American lives, CBP Commissioner Pete Flores confirms. He says the message is clear: “The border is closed to illegal crossings, and for those still willing to test our resolve, know this — you will be prosecuted, and you will be deported.” It is a vastly different message than the one sent by the Biden administration, which proudly rolled out the welcome mat for a record number of illegal immigrants, including droves of violent gang members, Islamic terrorists, tens of thousands of Chinese nationals and a myriad of criminals. The former president’s own DHS determined that over 1.7 million illegal aliens from countries that pose a national security threat entered the U.S. during his tenure and dozens that appear on the terrorist watchlist were released into American communities, according to government figures [] reluctantly provided to Congress. The migrants from countries that pose a security threat to the U.S. are labeled Special Interest Aliens (SIA) by the government and they come from some 26 nations, including Afghanistan, Cuba, Iran, Iraq, Libya, Nigeria, Syria, and Turkey, China, North Korea, Kyrgyzstan, Mauritania, Tajikistan, Uzbekistan, and Venezuela. The previous administration also released over half a million criminal aliens [] inside the U.S. by putting them on a “non-detained docket” that allowed them to live in communities throughout the nation. Over 435,000 had criminal convictions and another 226,847 pending charges, according to DHS figures made public by a congressional committee. Nearly 15,000 of the freed illegal aliens were convicted of or charged with murder, more than 20,000 with sexual assault, 60,268 with burglary, larceny, or robbery, 105,146 with assault, 16,820 with weapon offenses, 3,971 with commercialized sex crimes and 3,372 with kidnapping. Over 126,000 committed traffic offenses, more than 70,000 are in the system for drug crimes, 21,106 for fraudulent activities and 12,000 for obstruction of justice. As a parting gift in early January the Biden administration shielded nearly a million foreign nationals [] from deportation with Temporary Protected Status (TPS), a humanitarian measure designed to help undocumented aliens avoid removal during emergencies. Fortunately, the Trump administration revoked Biden’s eleventh-hour TPS, though a series of lawsuits were quickly filed by leftist groups in the name of the illegal aliens, who are mostly from Venezuela, Cuba, Haiti, and Nicaragua. The new administration’s message is clear and has been spread in Spanish-language media throughout Latin America. It warns illegal aliens [] not to come to America and break its laws. “If you are a criminal alien considering entering America illegally: Don’t even think about it,” said DHS Secretary Kristi Noem. “If you come here and break our laws, we will hunt you down.” Criminals are not welcome in the United States.” Until next week, [Contribute] [] [advertisement] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: A Quick Update
body:
Throughout my tenure in office, I have been a staunch defender of Israel and a vocal advocate for my Jewish neighbors.
No images? [Click here](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-e-cklqc-dytjdljkkt-o/) [](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cklqc-dytjdljkkt-r/)
### **Stay Informed**
PeterThis is my first newsletter, keeping you up to date about my continued advocacy on behalf of Nassau County families.As a member of Congress,**I was proud to lead the fight to support law enforcement, secure the border, and stand up for Israel.** I'm continuing to fight for these priorities and the revitalization of our economy after four years of failed Bidenomics.**I was honored to be selected by President Trump to serve as Inspector General for the U.S. Department of Labor.** I will keep you informed as I progress through the Senate confirmation process. In the meantime, here is a selection of media appearances and a guest essay that I recently published. [Read Article](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cklqc-dytjdljkkt-y/)
# **Recent Television Appearances**
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cklqc-dytjdljkkt-j/) Voters are rejecting the Democrats' obstruction of Republican efforts to secure the border and strengthen the economy. [](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cklqc-dytjdljkkt-t/) Democrat dysfunction and House Democrats' vote to shut down the government. [](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cklqc-dytjdljkkt-i/) Kamala Harris, Tish James and Hillary Clinton lose security clearances. **See you around town,**
**Anthony** [](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cklqc-dytjdljkkt-d/)[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cklqc-dytjdljkkt-h/)[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cklqc-dytjdljkkt-k/) | [Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-u-cklqc-dytjdljkkt-n/)
---

name: NewMarket Group via American Briefing
subject: 9 drugs linked to Alzheimer's disease?
body:
You may think your memory loss is just a sign of getting older

Dear Reader,

[Are you taking one of these 9 "memory erasing" prescriptions?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgqnplre43s0t0k0jcse1ohifm7p0ghc2hdgm950_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o34cdh2bs)

You may think your memory loss is just a sign of getting older, but one of these [9 drugs](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb77p863nh5kdqv3m946o56hbnfkk96e7seu98s0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o34cdh2bs) could actually be damaging your brain...

[These 9 prescription drugs](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zccosjtvvsruvlb65dck6elajpv7kjei1hg5ot38_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o34cdh2bs) have now been linked to Alzheimer's disease diagnoses.

If you're over the age of 60, and you're taking even 1 of these 9 drugs, your brain could be at risk.

[Click here to learn more.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6ts5v86c65n5onc5q7thl80t38h5dtvksbhfcf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o34cdh2bs)

\- Kelly

P.S. These "memory erasing" drugs could affect more than 1,429,000 American seniors this year alone -- **including you or your spouse**. [Click here to see the list of drugs before it's too late...](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2edqg9v4fuitiv43fv65jkvrvj273sfraq2qqno_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o34cdh2bs)

This ad is sent on behalf of NewMarket Health Publishing, LLC. P.O. Box 913, Frederick, MD 21705, USA. name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world –warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpc83ao9up4upgk8rrg1h9gg96ko1fgu4eo9fjho_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o35c9h2bs "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z21pl7ue3ehmvb0sc3bgc5kmouhjknc4vclmi3ro_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o35c9h2bs "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zepa3815uhkbk50jh1eh94fmfbv0prt3mra79dgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o35c9h2bs "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjfchjjillb8ot5ah9oq1hsffl9j3nmp8chsn260_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o35c9h2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrcitajohd35tan9gv2kcbn973c8lftjd79hqr2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o35c9h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl3m41tt1a2uabarterr4kq425hpc07b6ul0a3t0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o35c9h2bs "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5nlgmqir6iuvvuhpiq97ai8epog9gmu3kdbne18_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o35c9h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgpubpkvoqpuf0hfit7o496sdup0bu99tc8e9qp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o35c9h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zieibbrjc1th1p4t1j5jb3mg4tn1o2u9rs90o610_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o35c9h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z77q7q70q6bbihrtog47asig4ntgsghqqgfosf08_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o35c9h2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

[Privacy Policy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9enshqi79i5n03k0tacq7s4cr5m82lc372n3td0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4o35c9h2bs)

Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z794kpqjafquinos02olq3h55n5ngiro6ose5c88_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4p76chh2bs "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpsm368f3el5o58f6sso183rjh10j81gpqbmcloo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4p76chh2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf28a7rnpggfm062g3namdoebvqqr8cv5s8kkok8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4p76chh2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqv8tdptitr4ada7gs30lavrgfhp2i0moi8l69co_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4p76chh2bs "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfg2dqjqno2ngc08f8fpilo1d47rbu9lr54lr1k0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4p76chh2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9k9aapag9pm0m2bdm98uha30dn5hg9bv1qf4188_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4p76chh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvgff5dmlo8uf3nqc6sprrmcr1e592lq9a7vgp08_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im4p76chh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

body:
Your response is STILL MISSING!

Friend,

The radical Left and liberal media have launched an all-out assault against President Trump's Press Secretary, Karoline Leavitt.

body:

👉 SCOTUS just **BLOCKED** President Trump's freeze on woke USAID funding.

❌ Gaza-based "charities" tied to terror

I'm not making this up. You and I BOTH know this is NOT what the American people voted for.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Critical 2026 Battle Plan: Take Down 26 Liberal Targets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Our sights are set on 26 vulnerable seats in 2026.

|
---
| | | Dear Friend,

As we gear up for the 2026 elections, I'm writing to share a critical battle plan with you. **[Our team has identified 26 vulnerable seats.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd4j2hol8sdr42l3b26104q6j96amg900f54oum8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6c9h2bs "Our team has identified 26 vulnerable seats.")** The Democrats running for these seats are laser-focused on dismantling our conservative progress.

These proud Swamp members have consistently blocked our efforts to advance the America First agenda, and it's time we take them head-on. But to do that, we need your support. **[We're counting on grassroots patriots like you to fuel our efforts and help secure victory for these seats.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zujskf1kqei1ubda1h6n8qo7kppaftdpj5smk1c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6c9h2bs "We're counting on grassroots patriots like you to fuel our efforts and help secure victory for these seats.")**

That's why I'm asking you to make a critical investment in our 2026 campaign. Your contribution of **[$26](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znsnk70dldgijruhllcm0p1a712ovhi6p26pmlco_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6c9h2bs "$26")** , **[$52](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjgs8ca986kri8mobdtotajf56k1st8ttflmehdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6c9h2bs "$52")** , or **[$100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1vlqg4eebhkob9djljal640sfaisvsa30ge9i58_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6c9h2bs "$100")** will be used to build a powerhouse campaign infrastructure, recruit top talent, and unleash a barrage of targeted ads that will leave the radical left reeling.

---
| | | [STEP UP NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2fjks3q0a9n8aam65mcl26iv6jggh38lbt6kd68_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6c9h2bs "STEP UP NOW")
---

_We can't afford to wait_ - the liberal machine is already cranking up its fundraising apparatus, and we need to stay ahead of the curve. _Your timely support_ will give us the power we need to take down these 26 liberal targets and add to our ranks to defend our America First agenda.

So I'm personally asking you to join the fight today. **Will you chip in $26 or more to help us take back these seats and defend our conservative Majority in 2026?**

---
| | | [CHIP IN $26](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5m285e2a916kb42buc2q6ttrne6nf0595nkbk98_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6c9h2bs "CHIP IN $26")
---
| | | [CHIP IN $52](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd920r9ftn35rr8bspn7qt6te1rija4f7gcf3ito_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6c9h2bs "CHIP IN $52")
---
| | | [CHIP IN $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zanriq3vrlbectjetnir1tkfs4so42558v826f0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6c9h2bs "CHIP IN $100")
---
| | | [CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zre7ct98hefshtk3q2o93584l9j9hpofc0g2bkkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6c9h2bs "CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT")
---

Thank you for standing with us in this critical fight.

Sincerely,

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z65dq3ejj3k33de4qsf5koslqe01lgqd8mm3kik8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6c9h2bs)

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world –warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ssfi1r4pf7sis8or5l3739ebv55j96v9du4e0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6clh2bs "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjnpui2mkceccma71hmt2mana4uka21ir15svn1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6clh2bs "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zubi7gk67pc59ar0qej7viibkhutbugvgp5ksq18_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6clh2bs "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zto3kiurr1am26ig94qg2k7srimp6lev0n0omquo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6clh2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjtsm83ur01c6rafa09m07vktbnh6eoda91d9iko_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6clh2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkc17o82r73ctibmj2e97qsbi92g0t51kirobt3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6clh2bs "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7tmmi1rn4r9tvdd6g1df54e58drm0u1lnkenm4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6clh2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0jq8amf3g8ud2mguqqmdslh5visrsbfauibtgd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6clh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zadealkh73foh8rfr1ku00be8h4340s0v8ce0sug_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6clh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znpcbo48n8vac5f2iah18g1d6g67fvf30enh7n10_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5imaor6clh2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

subject: District 46 Newsletter
body:
---

| |
#
* * *
---
| | | [ ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=0f256b066b1476064dbff77c6564f1a6547bb0852de54326e1830dbd68a751f46771824bfc81c10e1e1773abfbd81838730247de9b419c11)| [Facebook](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=0f256b066b1476064dbff77c6564f1a6547bb0852de54326e1830dbd68a751f46771824bfc81c10e1e1773abfbd81838730247de9b419c11)
