[ ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=0f256b066b147606669e7d65b2a1c6f0b117719fad677dcbba113bebf0f4465e4d16123e3c37b2580f36802c84d701fa030a3f5442d14b0c)| [Instagram](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=0f256b066b147606669e7d65b2a1c6f0b117719fad677dcbba113bebf0f4465e4d16123e3c37b2580f36802c84d701fa030a3f5442d14b0c)
---|---
| | |
---
| |
# _Weekly Update_
Standing committees are officially wrapped up and there are just 17 days left in the 2025 Legislative Session.

I am excited to share that the Senate passed a bill I was sponsoring [HB 1521](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=0f256b066b147606e209313074446967d89dde6826d9890ad9a8da05c012a5c034adeb36c119c00a6ddadd44ead69db3194107ea4f154e7e "HB 1521"), which mirrors my bill [SB 33](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=0f256b066b1476067a174291746dc118069572b411176ca26b72e55ff171c5ecc13477ea62dbd56f62a8c548bb113dff3db60745b3ad3d70 "SB 33"). With the passage of HB 1521, we are one step closer to protecting the genetic privacy of every person who calls Indiana home.

This bill ensures the following:
* **Informed Consent: **Require informed consent for collecting, storing and sharing genetic information.

* **Access and Control:** Ensures individuals have the right to access their genetic information and have the ability to control who can access it.

* **Research Protections:** Balance individual privacy with scientific research.

* **Non-Discrimination:** Prohibit discrimination based on genetic information.

Additionally, this week the Senate presented its version of the budget bill, [HB 1001.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=0f256b066b14760615cba8d9cdc0aa30de97b408c1ff883e8c4ea926ffd29632f1e6c8d467f9d674a4f44cbaa6923b70152ffe634f86d4d0 "HB 1001.") **You can read more about the budget, and how we are working to make it better, later in my newsletter. **

This last week was a busy one outside of the Statehouse as well. I was able to tour Little Red Door Cancer Agency to learn about all of the wonderful work they are doing in our community, host a town hall with IPS Commissioner Allissa Impink and visit the John Boner Neighborhood Center to learn about some incredible initiatives they are working on for our community.

Next week, we will see crucial bills like HB 1001, [HB 1002](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=0f256b066b1476061de17f72a9482484d47aedc0eaf5f61bf88ff8d5014d35d52d873174f4ec34cea2ea5be50626ab7eec0708cebc1ee2be "HB 1002"), [HB 1007](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=0f256b066b14760678a43cc461028e64451d8c844b90aec97aafc4fc29ace99d3967bc92b6f9d489753b37fec38df0eccc9b9ec30f5f92e8 "HB 1007"), and more up for a full vote in front of the Senate. **Stay up to date on this important legislation and stream the Senate session at [iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=0f256b066b1476066d7762a0b49913dd9c6412c4b321990bea4159f3f66ce819a5a0120065da67c1036acb233fd24c86f01fcec7f0394e2a).** **Committees I Served on This Week: ** **[Tax and Fiscal Policy](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=0f256b066b14760668fb929812db380a8e2b64d4bf707447d1c52327066be409432820f3e1c93e0db58b988f7742d4c0a1ae6d2797486f8c "Tax and Fiscal Policy")** **Make sure you are following my social media channels for daily updates about session and our District 46 community. **
---
#
* * *
---
# Town Hall Recap
---
---
Thank you so much to each and every one of you who showed up this past Thursday for our town hall and I am so grateful that IPS Commissioner Allissa Impink hosted alongside me.

Our community showed up the same way it has shown up time and time again this session on behalf of our neighbors, our schools and our families: **we have to keep it up**.

As we go through the next 17 days of session, and navigate new realities during the interim, hold your local leaders accountable, keep building coalitions and never stop making your voice heard.

There will be moments that are uphill battles, but when we stand united, I am confident there is no challenge we cannot face.
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| | The Senate Appropriations Committee has released its version of the state budget, [HB 1001](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bf8fbb4635e5bdbfd3fe86378f8d52655ce3613d11d35f4c1ec5511c706b41780f1de1455a68c4a8f5cc4758f78c1ce01a4d00be5eeca1f7 "HB 1001"), which will now be heard in front of the entire Senate on Monday, April 14.

This version does a few good things such as bringing back the income cap for private school vouchers and reducing the virtual charter school reimbursement rate, but there is still a long way to go.

In Appropriations the Senate Democratic Caucus brought several amendments to the **$46.8 billion** budget that would make the budget better and address the things that matter to Hoosiers most:
* **[Amendment 56](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bf8fbb4635e5bdbf73217effd56824cb122d57fae37d51146401526a215fa2873eeaeac9e4c308377a41a93b4f01feb76aac158ce271db11 "Amendment 56") \- ****Increase the Affordable Workforce Housing Tax Credit by $30 million annually**
* **[Amendment 83](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bf8fbb4635e5bdbff2d1e17991becd178b0837560d2c26af7e3b17961937257d716b4c6ea7a15e205f971f1ba134dd77319d487a866b78b4 "Amendment 83") \- ****Fully fund the Child Care Development Fund (CCDF) **
* **[Amendment 89](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bf8fbb4635e5bdbf54491249fbd35187a2a6f31e8483b2bf1ebb30b5364ff59450f7745f7a7284852c9e7cfd9a879ea90b4c170ba7b5aa1b "Amendment 89") \- ****Add a $244 million annual School Curricular Material Grant **
* **[Amendment 92](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bf8fbb4635e5bdbf6a09502c8a9aeb9300e1744025dbef6db78a9b153cc2636a6b19b5b2a47d36f5c47505faec95f82d0a9766c7e06edd89 "Amendment 92") -** **Invest $70 million per year to expand the PathWays for Aging and Health & Wellness waivers**
* **[Amendment 74](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bf8fbb4635e5bdbf55da993ad9da54eaaa3a52bf3859fbedf5b3abd144f56590437c56188eb3455d62d51a499559e6ad089e6a3a18988c24 "Amendment 74") -****Boost Community Mental Health funding by $50 million per year**

Though none of our committee amendments were accepted, _we still have time to make changes_.

Our caucus will be offering amendments when the bill is heard in front of the full Senate. We will continue working tirelessly for the futures, families and freedoms of all Hoosiers to be represented in our state's budget.
---
#
* * *
---
| | |
## Your 2025 Hoosier Idol Winners: The Indiana Senate Democrats!
---
| | |
---

name: Official Poll For You
subject: The Radical Left Is Attacking Karoline Leavitt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Your response is STILL MISSING!

Friend,

The radical Left and liberal media have launched an all-out assault against President Trump's Press Secretary, Karoline Leavitt.

They've smeared her with nicknames like _**["spinmeister"](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4kimj7dujc7hg5njvm3khil75tvke34dsrgm7i8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im9oj5c9h2bs)**_ and _**["gaslighter"](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zncqejbgefcg9ouacvb302j1kudmsvsl7oi50n0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im9oj5c9h2bs)**_ simply because she's telling the truth and fighting for our values.

But we know patriots like you disagree. _Right, friend?_

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world –warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znckq3ksco2279hcgq7l48bfo0710004qm3jtj8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im9oj5c1h2bs "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z711km5vi12jbe5ua481h628k3h8mlpbe3k9adfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im9oj5c1h2bs "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjdls86ntarnp6v2poqfe32s9u6i0b9ikm1e0pe0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im9oj5c1h2bs "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ufa9so541cgkas89pf9ob5nkb3ph8i20meqa90_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im9oj5c1h2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z72rjgtg8e4hpqqb0i911eeqvst83mvfusifvma8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im9oj5c1h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6j3fsoh85ut20ujq0fkil70qc3nnqk2otsc5l00_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im9oj5c1h2bs "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z62rmnb8phtj7oro9r6mc9ekijqh7pbs9du18l78_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im9oj5c1h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zou8ddhn97ve2lqm90kce8r07ad25kcl5rt83ka8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im9oj5c1h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z79b4ql2nmeu95tmugk3hm7huv0lpukdbng91m50_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im9oj5c1h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zimsblu8ec4eqtkqp4iu8c7462u9b3v0n2itq9sg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5im9oj5c1h2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE
---

---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Critical 2026 Battle Plan: Take Down 26 Liberal Targets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Our sights are set on 26 vulnerable seats in 2026.

|
---
| | | Dear Friend,

As we gear up for the 2026 elections, I'm writing to share a critical battle plan with you. **[Our team has identified 26 vulnerable seats.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo2kolitnpoisp85ucqbuf9057it7r6smmq1lv9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hm0p34c5h2bs "Our team has identified 26 vulnerable seats.")** The Democrats running for these seats are laser-focused on dismantling our conservative progress.

These proud Swamp members have consistently blocked our efforts to advance the America First agenda, and it's time we take them head-on. But to do that, we need your support. **[We're counting on grassroots patriots like you to fuel our efforts and help secure victory for these seats.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2jfirlqr0flfmqm4kad9n4mti9iko6gu9ev0isg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hm0p34c5h2bs "We're counting on grassroots patriots like you to fuel our efforts and help secure victory for these seats.")**

That's why I'm asking you to make a critical investment in our 2026 campaign. Your contribution of **[$26](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaq4h53ppsrkpcfpos3imur0j3h1vdjfu57npnq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hm0p34c5h2bs "$26")** , **[$52](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ao253dent86ap8oo55g2h7tlqfi5vv0o721360_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hm0p34c5h2bs "$52")** , or **[$100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcf35vre6m442brns6cfcq7crp2c1a666n0keat0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hm0p34c5h2bs "$100")** will be used to build a powerhouse campaign infrastructure, recruit top talent, and unleash a barrage of targeted ads that will leave the radical left reeling.

---
| | | [STEP UP NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ljv21odlrpbi054kaq32insepo1unetjvfbr5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hm0p34c5h2bs "STEP UP NOW")
---

_We can't afford to wait_ - the liberal machine is already cranking up its fundraising apparatus, and we need to stay ahead of the curve. _Your timely support_ will give us the power we need to take down these 26 liberal targets and add to our ranks to defend our America First agenda.

So I'm personally asking you to join the fight today. **Will you chip in $26 or more to help us take back these seats and defend our conservative Majority in 2026?**

---
| | | [CHIP IN $26](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z797199kgidtt2h07u8feq9vvr66ncq3bdalm7vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hm0p34c5h2bs "CHIP IN $26")
---

---
| | | [CHIP IN $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmitkd81dcr9rb5228r0tquhvk5f0o5gvnoogfg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hm0p34c5h2bs "CHIP IN $100")
---
| | | [CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5k91teud6qiqsuthgdvg68krd66m8lq3p692ce0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hm0p34c5h2bs "CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT")
---

Thank you for standing with us in this critical fight.

Sincerely,

---

name: AMAC Action
subject: Help us send a strong message to Congress
body:
But we need your help to make sure this bill passes.

| |
---
| | We need your support to build the necessary momentum to get this bill over the finish line.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2rglpsui9m8l2kpc7bv22q7nln0glsvq9ld6cgo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs)
---
| | **My Fellow Patriot,** **[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9usdgcbf3vch95ms1untl6e9t1uuvfe8ifs6eq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrievgqm2je4f2d5abg7146vikv7o75qtiinp2vg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs)[I need your help to Pass the Caregiver Tax Credit!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqhsbq6vks0h9omvt1dpce7cig57aal2oo2b40n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs) ** **The Credit for Caring Act** , a crucial bipartisan bill, has been introduced in Congress to provide **up to $5,000** in tax relief for family caregivers.This bill provides real, tangible support to those who are doing the hardest work—caring for aging parents, spouses, and relatives at home. **But we need your help to make sure this bill passes.** Family caregivers are the silent heroes who step up, sacrificing their own time, energy, and often, their financial well-being to ensure their loved ones are safe and comfortable. This bill would be a **blessing** to families who care for their senior loved ones—offering them tax relief, easing their financial burden, and recognizing their sacrifice.As a strong conservative senior in your community, your voice is critical. **We are leading a massive advocacy drive** to push Congress to act on this bill. **But we need your support** **to build the necessary momentum to get this bill over the finish line.****[**Help us send a strong message to Congress: Pass the Caregiver Tax Credit NOW!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znhnk4ifbl7hp7jnpe2imvubr7qu24b2gu67v0k8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs)**
---
[ **STAND WITH US!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv4gttgq0g55gv9hkjnndqof8ql44i2jdjj757ho_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs)
---
Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. _**AMAC Action**_ is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** ****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.**Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens.** And today, we are focusing our efforts on the passage of this critical bill!And my friend, the good news is that this is a bipartisan bill—and the vast majority of senior citizen voters support it!But here is the bad news... **We know that the radical leftists in Congress don’t care about what seniors want...****Their only goal is to delay, block, and filibuster anything that Donald Trump and the Republicans try to do for American families.** They will do ANYTHING to prevent a WIN for President Trump—even if it means tossing American families to the side. This is an uphill battle, but it’s one we must win. **And I know that with you, and an army of AMAC Action Patriots standing with us, we will win this battle for America’s seniors.** AMAC Action has always been a fierce advocate for the rights and well-being of seniors. And we’re **leading the charge** in this fight for the **Caregiver Tax Credit** , but we can’t do it alone. But just look at what we accomplished last year with the help of patriots just like you:
---
* We **bombarded members of Congress, state legislators, corporate executives, and the White House** with a tidal wave of emails, comments, and phone calls showing that America’s conservative seniors would not back down in the face of an overreaching Biden Admin.
* We **mobilized seniors** to get out and vote early in the battleground states, resulting in a **win for President Trump** in all seven swing states.
* We **organized a massive “Hands Off My Medicare” Petition Drive** to stop the Democrats’ horrible “Medicare for All” scheme from giving undocumented immigrants the same healthcare you get.
* Together with **Donald Trump, Jr.** , we united thousands of Americans around our **“Make America Strong Again”** campaign.
* In **Missouri** and **Kentucky** , we helped pass commonsense measures to stop non-citizens from voting in our elections.
* We **defeated a radical pro-abortion amendment in Florida**.
* In **Ohio** , we protected young girls from boys in their sports and in their bathrooms.
* We **stopped left-wing financial institutions** from “de-banking” conservatives in **Tennessee** simply because they don’t like their politics.

---
**And our efforts have been so effective that****President Trump himself** **has put out the call for seniors to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who want ruin our country!****Now, we need you to join us in this crucial fight.** **[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjdp7c88oaiamh02siphjkpl5rd35o71plrko4o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp9lq9im8c887lgimgdfniod7du31qifu1co05kg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs)[Stand with AMAC Action today and make sure that Congress hears our voices loud and clear.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdag6egdt0qobhl60eii327c3hbevom41uvv1l4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs) ** But my friend, all that we do at AMAC Action, we do with the generous support of patriots like you.So I hope you will help us create the wave of support we need to secure this critical tax credit to help seniors and their families _with a generous one-time donation_. Your contribution will help **AMAC Action continue to lead the charge** and ensure that the Caregiver Tax Credit becomes law.Whether you can give $35, $50, $100, $250, $500 or $1,000, your support **makes a massive impact**.AMAC Action doesn’t receive a dime from government bureaucracies, or big corporate donations, or super-wealthy oligarchs. We are entirely funded by **patriots like you** —and it’s your grassroots support that keeps our efforts strong and unstoppable. So please don’t wait. [**Stand with us in supporting the passage of the****Caregiver Tax Credit****and make your generous contribution today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrdkpq4kob3u55c6alksltttpspebji9arkctnn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs) Together, we can pass the Caregiver Tax Credit and make life better for millions of seniors and their families.Thank you in advance for standing with AMAC Action.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn42aar8f0ljc760mcq2iu8g3ju55pu06vqfttc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs)
---
| | [ **STAND WITH US!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb53dccvf6efcebur5oekh2dpg61mmq0ilru0vo8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq8f5ng5mios4qmvvc74sgfjs0ff9kg4fl6ad0f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0mr7tfuto76fvtaliaa47nts27oelc3rgh39fso_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c5hmcpr4chh2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.

name: The Flyover
subject: Iran Talks, Rose Holds Masters Lead, and an Interstate Surfer
body:
U.S. negotiators are scheduled to begin direct talks with Iran today, with President Trump saying there’ll be [“all hell to pay”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kEEPnCAUhH8N3jD4BFcPHLZtTJp0e2yP5gWeCw2CAVzjv2_svac5zGTy5fv9Wl7og4_vn7iRrmtaQIDiQvIOFos-XItsrF6JgPqGdPeQUioQvWqcttbAYMZhGhE7K9cRpCWj-seERhkrG6_vNyE7EJOaxNCOa2cUgZI4yRWlYlKQ9TXl9k_ysTpaw5U-lFuTtiZoV-teWP9kMDOYz_NstxLvjsFMkR-FwRzpvCNVR_keOV-Ju3QU4gWvwjEE7igEXhPf8eLFpSNY7jNGbulDIe08HiYQZn4S7ikymDHz57P7-qP_PrJ-TsZb1n_7cmuis_yivDdZ2_30IfgyPJgU7w19-Edd_2fxo-FvAAAA__9nR3Xe) if Iran doesn’t abandon its nuclear program.

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00M-OmzAQx_GnMTeQGf8hHHxIi-iJXNoo7Qm59kBcGRsZJ1HevmKV1e5lrx_p95VmLsM4aOddmE96QZWnOAIFUVJe1jBa7fxz5IVVEyIgK1DVDedcAGWiuKqDZBNIOWkA23Bj_yLDRlhjNAgpTVs4tdcor4G2oqWyOky1EQiC65ZPmgvCKVqXY6r-RRfyFSf_jHdMlYlL4dU153Uj7EigJ9DP7u7CXD1i8tbEYDCFKqaZQL_qGQn0_fnU_f726-d5-EFYf8vLuMVbMkhY9-oSkDsvaN1tIazDRTv_woxpJ72uqN_NxJAx5I9AGfCxecwZU_l5bPSyajcHwrrz5Xs3_DmeKANRJGXXh_PebbIhnM775O24_NWz7wr-BwAA__-2dYOf) | |
# Saturday, April 12, 2025

## U.S-Iran Negotiations Begin in Oman
U.S. negotiators are scheduled to begin direct talks with Iran today, with President Trump saying there’ll be [“all hell to pay”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kEEPnCAUhH8N3jD4BFcPHLZtTJp0e2yP5gWeCw2CAVzjv2_svac5zGTy5fv9Wl7og4_vn7iRrmtaQIDiQvIOFos-XItsrF6JgPqGdPeQUioQvWqcttbAYMZhGhE7K9cRpCWj-seERhkrG6_vNyE7EJOaxNCOa2cUgZI4yRWlYlKQ9TXl9k_ysTpaw5U-lFuTtiZoV-teWP9kMDOYz_NstxLvjsFMkR-FwRzpvCNVR_keOV-Ju3QU4gWvwjEE7igEXhPf8eLFpSNY7jNGbulDIe08HiYQZn4S7ikymDHz57P7-qP_PrJ-TsZb1n_7cmuis_yivDdZ2_30IfgyPJgU7w19-Edd_2fxo-FvAAAA__9nR3Xe) if Iran doesn’t abandon its nuclear program. U.S. negotiator Steve Witcoff will meet with an Iranian delegation in Oman today, led by Iran’s foreign minister. Iran said it was open to negotiations despite U.S. threats and opposition from [hard-liners in its own government.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQAL8GOiOz7BIoXLwmXV57JdrgdfDF2JFxYuXvT7n--tGMNF-X5cI--Hj7z7uY4tICGkhpVD0sln14L9ha40RAhlZMf0JEAj1QuxkGnGiybr06uk4OLfUCdpyv6-yI6dR687Fp7EHPNOuxm1y_kgAhz-gYqUEt1peUu-_kY9nEhXd6Se7WtLfBbKU8jmb418C5gXOttYtSjypy_wANnH3mqDbONvgo-VBrilb2qJ6His81CGdVONwPZVPkYFXJz_2hQNM0Dn2bjX1UH4I_xlOD-razD7_l8teJl4GfAAAA__83OWHI) At the same time, the U.S. is [moving Patriot missile defense systems](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu3CAQRb8Gd2PBGHBcUGwSuXnZNClSWqwZbCJsLMMu2nx95PSvusWVjo7O7_t0tyGGfflpNzLFpwk5KuASBE7OhvieZOOMJ0LqGjKil1Iq5J1qVtPjQ3PVayUHLTQNrhM484f2fEarSDfBXDQuBfJBDVy3X7yYFaGSdpDeSsUkJxdKOts_KexlJR_f6UVnO6etiWYt5cisuzEcGY611nbL-_UxHGmHZ2Y47lSvqemMjuH4zLClF2U4bDlDKuDI054pQ0mwBeciAdlcoIaygkt_ac-QPMwgevAxLGu5cPaE2018-_j4sbBuTHNwrPv-9epENf-i82hO444aYgxZ90zyZbMh_tcun2V8GfwXAAD__2xKdME) to the Middle East to protect key U.S. bases and partners in the region and give more leverage for the talks with Tehran.
## Stocks Rise, Capping Wild Wall Street Week
Stocks rebounded Friday, with the [Dow rising 600 points](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngQ3ruByJPTB0YUvXjhaBI6bBIbJpLL995e6dP-n36f91Ha8-l_y8f_qZbUt1RECjgJTGMfpc9pFktIkZ-STZ6gsRGYSTkZMFHSERGh0jUxj0jXtGf9FDwP7cE8tsDw1IIwxmgHPXJx0MoyE_UPJkBAHH3OrSfdf8bBOnstc3L12osyx2au21itOHQCfQbdvWhectHKNAd9ACHZBAp0GgW1sNDzX75cFNtRr9rkp-s_p5Rd947aY2F7nY-NpyKXk9XwTBffa5_L21_-rfFn8DAAD__--bWpc), capping a volatile week on Wall Street with soaring highs alternating with steep drops in step with ongoing tariff negotiations.

On Friday, China announced it was raising retaliatory tariffs on some U.S. exports to 125%, but markets rose on comments from the White House that President Trump is “optimistic” China will seek a deal with the U.S. At the same time, long-term U.S. Treasury yields soared this week, with the 30-year yield jumping to near 4.88%—its highest level since January and [the steepest weekly rise since 1982](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQAL_GdIvsZR2gcPEaurz2SmTMGnwxdoStRPz9KddfPxqN5us-322IIW3_7cGm-jyjRA2SQOG82hCvmZrVeGbkrmGjeiLSKDvd7GZgWmiRIztkSYPuETX2OMiuc8ovQxPMxyZJoRz1KG_t4JXTjJrsSN6SFiR5DTWf7XcOqe7s45VffLYuH000e63PIrp_AieBkw_JJsftZfecP4TAKfG7CJyWnFY47PngCoVjhOw9FH7xyWALxJw2qHwecAWOa4GUq9thCdvGpcKb-QElJMegxgFB9VLq_kbY7vWIzWnW5zvEGMqtFyS3w4b4G1j_GvYy-BMAAP__xeptCw). The rise signals a move by investors to sell off their Treasury bonds.
## List: Home Price Growth in Every State
U.S. housing [prices rose 4.5%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFugzAQQL_GbEbnw07C4KELW7p2RBdzwLUGI-wE8fdVund_enp6X_f-ThJlnT5pYV_G1COg02C1wX4giWdvq8GPzMhNxd5crbUOoXHV7F1rgnMQgOgBiM3VYBgA7Y3dYKHFSvzbBtYgtK6FS30bTXCMzlJrR7JOWeBBStrr7yRrmXmMZ3rxXoe0VNHPpWxZNR8KO4XdcRz1S_KTYqBNCkXJ5Q0q7PKmsCu8g9FzemZZJ73Q_sNF55W2PKeit10C6zDTOnHWj1PnQoUVdtXuh-2QGCVfrsrCtJDEv4Dy35CXx98AAAD__-WnY4o) from Q4 2023 to Q4 2024, with Connecticut, New Jersey, and Wyoming each leading the nation with an 8.3% increase, according to a new report. Using data from repeat sales and refinancing of single-family homes, the Federal Housing Finance Agency found the housing market resilient, outpacing GDP (2.5%) and inflation (2.9%) in most states. Home prices were driven up by limited inventory—still well below pre-pandemic levels—particularly in fast-growing states with higher incomes that can absorb rising housing costs. Mississippi was the only state where home prices declined, amid flat population growth from 2023 to 2024 and a rise in housing inventory. [See the full state-by-state report here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFugzAQQL_GbEbnw07C4KELW7p2RBdzwLUGI-wE8fdVund_enp6X_f-ThJlnT5pYV_G1COg02C1wX4giWdvq8GPzMhNxd5crbUOoXHV7F1rgnMQgOgBiM3VYBgA7Y3dYKHFSvzbBtYgtK6FS30bTXCMzlJrR7JOWeBBStrr7yRrmXmMZ3rxXoe0VNHPpWxZNR8KO4XdcRz1S_KTYqBNCkXJ5Q0q7PKmsCu8g9FzemZZJ73Q_sNF55W2PKeit10C6zDTOnHWj1PnQoUVdtXuh-2QGCVfrsrCtJDEv4Dy35CXx98AAAD__-WnY4o).

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’s entertainment
body:
Please - for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please - for the sake of all our families - take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue 's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a6e57b99f5e4853b114048a322aa1f7&_e=flzxgaTcA0gmgYXtL10nXPf-IhPJiwTWHcn1WPuMQu3qGvRciS-0pOwKqnyqF6kR5IEk6oo-mN86zIoNMiPZ2Vfibbim_vJ9-ctrQyWzVTCRtlcC_YwzspiHkIAEYs_gG-WbeASiZr4UD39dUiY0R8OcbY1EdvGEsoue6riXft00wf8vOfZfvsPj6e2vHmti1OLOo_pLu8aqz9MZsXrzEH9NAe9IhFUOstM9K97UfcnhRQt78sxSxKoKCnB6-ccn9TxfxznVspdxGrYGLZQjlE9k06mogWiAmTJY4MhUuKXoSTo4LfreQlbKBffZWiE71VhJtMrgbBJH8l2JdZPJJOrhHgE8yNP2epNt9-rNMaXBVDdwWUBP5zDMWmZOEYkoUATnzMYwVdFE9-nrmu90P1RxKRRx4m26qZKsW0kVwOE%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a6e57b99f5e4853b114048a322aa1f7&_e=flzxgaTcA0gmgYXtL10nXPf-IhPJiwTWHcn1WPuMQu3qGvRciS-0pOwKqnyqF6kR5IEk6oo-mN86zIoNMiPZ2Vfibbim_vJ9-ctrQyWzVTCRtlcC_YwzspiHkIAEYs_gG-WbeASiZr4UD39dUiY0R8OcbY1EdvGEsoue6riXft00wf8vOfZfvsPj6e2vHmti1OLOo_pLu8aqz9MZsXrzEH9NAe9IhFUOstM9K97UfcnhRQt78sxSxKoKCnB6-ccnKTHNNj2BV2DwG8rvrwYgvGLZmsUgJbpFJ6irUS7Aj_U5iTg7q4V-BGoZ99r_iVPRz6xs1JLt05N2zzgVIBFaovF7Nq3fRrjX4BWWgJotkCVTQjpkfBvVsmHHEc5fGy_v59e9j_IdlJGlQLwW8kTzQJoLgzcPTjgCcpFLitiB1FE%3D)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**. If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own. And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries. It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. >> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces. And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages. It was quite a moment for everyone - including folks just like you - who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we've made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging. But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 - and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a6e57b99f5e4853b114048a322aa1f7&_e=flzxgaTcA0gmgYXtL10nXPf-IhPJiwTWHcn1WPuMQu3qGvRciS-0pOwKqnyqF6kR5IEk6oo-mN86zIoNMiPZ2Vfibbim_vJ9-ctrQyWzVTCRtlcC_YwzspiHkIAEYs_gG-WbeASiZr4UD39dUiY0R8OcbY1EdvGEsoue6riXft00wf8vOfZfvsPj6e2vHmti1OLOo_pLu8aqz9MZsXrzEH9NAe9IhFUOstM9K97UfcnhRQt78sxSxKoKCnB6-ccnj3aDCj5Q_8KcXoDW9uMjURzuZ-LS5VPcpFkySUIE6pVyfh0q2ooe225NUC16Kmhwt5XAjMS08vRdEaHWGebXtV3zwx4ZgFgTIF16u5qRbzYVB8rKsEys6s7WwRgOenONdXk1Ji45MS3cb9G5FDSH-PTJ7xYnowWBtAqN9fvoeD0%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD. This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a6e57b99f5e4853b114048a322aa1f7&_e=flzxgaTcA0gmgYXtL10nXPf-IhPJiwTWHcn1WPuMQu3qGvRciS-0pOwKqnyqF6kR5IEk6oo-mN86zIoNMiPZ2Vfibbim_vJ9-ctrQyWzVTCRtlcC_YwzspiHkIAEYs_gG-WbeASiZr4UD39dUiY0R8OcbY1EdvGEsoue6riXft00wf8vOfZfvsPj6e2vHmti1OLOo_pLu8aqz9MZsXrzEH9NAe9IhFUOstM9K97UfcnhRQt78sxSxKoKCnB6-ccnQceGdw7xItcR2ES9FUs6mKWw626S9iqImHKQRJSIJGu9k3q5QNHDc7mbjBDoZ-EkZeZmj8W6ALV3Vnc7yuNckZ0nmdcOYrtVQ02PBRiBAIoWOBEVHVrrZd6ImkNr5N4b3sFM1WHMxo1o8hqC2ngoWEZcryj9GkcqkoVg1JQivk4%3D)** , you'll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[So please- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a6e57b99f5e4853b114048a322aa1f7&_e=flzxgaTcA0gmgYXtL10nXPf-IhPJiwTWHcn1WPuMQu3qGvRciS-0pOwKqnyqF6kR5IEk6oo-mN86zIoNMiPZ2Vfibbim_vJ9-ctrQyWzVTCRtlcC_YwzspiHkIAEYs_gG-WbeASiZr4UD39dUiY0R8OcbY1EdvGEsoue6riXft00wf8vOfZfvsPj6e2vHmti1OLOo_pLu8aqz9MZsXrzEH9NAe9IhFUOstM9K97UfcnhRQt78sxSxKoKCnB6-ccn-DflzYVPvR3CGBj0HOOS2vVzgeYdhbFVh-h40puN-Rl9aswtCB2HjM5RFYddG5VP2ftO-9Io_Dgbe_bwAyc1jhhtJ-RhYgOuv_Wa0IB4T1SxE_DnlQnQbgAJMIrREAQLWpHlW6Tv2uUw9yLDAHmLCvkeT1YXZNsrjnigOh9-_Xc%3D)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family - not filth. Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father

clean_body: Please - for the sake of all our families | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please - for the sake of all our families - take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue 's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk. I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books. If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own. And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries. It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. >> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces. And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages. It was quite a moment for everyone - including folks just like you - who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we've made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging. But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 - and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD. This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family - not filth. Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart - maybe even yours - is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. ** **The Credit for Caring Act** , a crucial bipartisan bill, has been introduced in Congress to provide **up to $5,000** in tax relief for family caregivers.This bill provides real, tangible support to those who are doing the hardest work—caring for aging parents, spouses, and relatives at home. **But we need your help to make sure this bill passes.** Family caregivers are the silent heroes who step up, sacrificing their own time, energy, and often, their financial well-being to ensure their loved ones are safe and comfortable. This bill would be a **blessing** to families who care for their senior loved ones—offering them tax relief, easing their financial burden, and recognizing their sacrifice.As a strong conservative senior in your community, your voice is critical. **We are leading a massive advocacy drive** to push Congress to act on this bill. **But we need your support** **to build the necessary momentum to get this bill over the finish line.****[**Help us send a strong message to Congress: Pass the Caregiver Tax Credit NOW!**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/FVRTF3fFHgWmYBQxs4mJJeB35RDvtsfJcJ9LRmRBrN2P1Wxh9I77I0YlHE-6TYjuyAEMiTOArZZmSKm1TKySBVVTzQ_J80y3xj3mhy14bH3GlrM4TJ86nzqEx0Z7uAVoG55dgz2Qb2JmhXRmH75Zivq8WcDmDhZits6S-sRN7ePGtb0o1_560Gy42Hvode8Tzl4VZkGn64oYdCCCNDKqEiyzFryl-3N-Ld7HDcByDtruLSpJk4oRda8dCNI4rqt_IoEaucGFhPeC3h2aLREM9Kou31KHJFjCvtBLZPlBu3PPowmOx-zXACfJ1U0drBt-IoJzZzAZzCZWPkwlG0hmQSM1zQmRNqNRxqekOLGt58UDfwOugb2jvnMziXEwSuXeMqO-8YM4s4H8seB6LqewIzy05rF_oyRKmlXxP2o/ZkkNFB-r8lGR5TNtNLC4hC65IRqFwwlR/7)**

Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. _**AMAC Action**_ is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** ****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.**Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens.** And today, we are focusing our efforts on the passage of this critical bill!And my friend, the good news is that this is a bipartisan bill—and the vast majority of senior citizen voters support it!But here is the bad news... **We know that the radical leftists in Congress don’t care about what seniors want...****Their only goal is to delay, block, and filibuster anything that Donald Trump and the Republicans try to do for American families.** They will do ANYTHING to prevent a WIN for President Trump—even if it means tossing American families to the side. This is an uphill battle, but it’s one we must win. **And I know that with you, and an army of AMAC Action Patriots standing with us, we will win this battle for America’s seniors.** AMAC Action has always been a fierce advocate for the rights and well-being of seniors. And we’re **leading the charge** in this fight for the **Caregiver Tax Credit** , but we can’t do it alone. But just look at what we accomplished last year with the help of patriots just like you:
---
* We **bombarded members of Congress, state legislators, corporate executives, and the White House** with a tidal wave of emails, comments, and phone calls showing that America’s conservative seniors would not back down in the face of an overreaching Biden Admin.
* We **mobilized seniors** to get out and vote early in the battleground states, resulting in a **win for President Trump** in all seven swing states.
* We **organized a massive “Hands Off My Medicare” Petition Drive** to stop the Democrats’ horrible “Medicare for All” scheme from giving undocumented immigrants the same healthcare you get.
* Together with **Donald Trump, Jr.** , we united thousands of Americans around our **“Make America Strong Again”** campaign.
* In **Missouri** and **Kentucky** , we helped pass commonsense measures to stop non-citizens from voting in our elections.
* We **defeated a radical pro-abortion amendment in Florida**.
* In **Ohio** , we protected young girls from boys in their sports and in their bathrooms.
* We **stopped left-wing financial institutions** from “de-banking” conservatives in **Tennessee** simply because they don’t like their politics.

---
**And our efforts have been so effective that****President Trump himself** **has put out the call for seniors to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who want ruin our country!****Now, clean_body: But we need your help to make sure this bill passes. | | | | We need your support to build the necessary momentum to get this bill over the finish line. | | | | My Fellow Patriot, The Credit for Caring Act , a crucial bipartisan bill, has been introduced in Congress to provide up to $5,000 in tax relief for family caregivers.This bill provides real, tangible support to those who are doing the hardest work—caring for aging parents, spouses, and relatives at home. But we need your help to make sure this bill passes. Family caregivers are the silent heroes who step up, sacrificing their own time, energy, and often, their financial well-being to ensure their loved ones are safe and comfortable. This bill would be a blessing to families who care for their senior loved ones—offering them tax relief, easing their financial burden, and recognizing their sacrifice.As a strong conservative senior in your community, your voice is critical. We are leading a massive advocacy drive to push Congress to act on this bill. But we need your support to build the necessary momentum to get this bill over the finish line. Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors. We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them. And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. And today, we are focusing our efforts on the passage of this critical bill!And my friend, the good news is that this is a bipartisan bill—and the vast majority of senior citizen voters support it!But here is the bad news... We know that the radical leftists in Congress don’t care about what seniors want...Their only goal is to delay, block, and filibuster anything that Donald Trump and the Republicans try to do for American families. They will do ANYTHING to prevent a WIN for President Trump—even if it means tossing American families to the side. This is an uphill battle, but it’s one we must win. And I know that with you, and an army of AMAC Action Patriots standing with us, we will win this battle for America’s seniors. AMAC Action has always been a fierce advocate for the rights and well-being of seniors. And we’re leading the charge in this fight for the Caregiver Tax Credit , but we can’t do it alone. But just look at what we accomplished last year with the help of patriots just like you: We bombarded members of Congress, state legislators, corporate executives, and the White House with a tidal wave of emails, comments, and phone calls showing that America’s conservative seniors would not back down in the face of an overreaching Biden Admin. We mobilized seniors to get out and vote early in the battleground states, resulting in a win for President Trump in all seven swing states. We organized a massive “Hands Off My Medicare” Petition Drive to stop the Democrats’ horrible “Medicare for All” scheme from giving undocumented immigrants the same healthcare you get. Together with Donald Trump, Jr. , we united thousands of Americans around our “Make America Strong Again” campaign. In Missouri and Kentucky , we helped pass commonsense measures to stop non-citizens from voting in our elections. We defeated a radical pro-abortion amendment in Florida. In Ohio , we protected young girls from boys in their sports and in their bathrooms. We stopped left-wing financial institutions from “de-banking” conservatives in Tennessee simply because they don’t like their politics. And our efforts have been so effective thatPresident Trump himself has put out the call for seniors to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who want ruin our country!Now, we need you to join us in this crucial fight. But my friend, all that we do at AMAC Action, we do with the generous support of patriots like you.So I hope you will help us create the wave of support we need to secure this critical tax credit to help seniors and their families with a generous one-time donation. Your contribution will help AMAC Action continue to lead the charge and ensure that the Caregiver Tax Credit becomes law.Whether you can give $35, $50, $100, $250, $500 or $1,000, your support makes a massive impact.AMAC Action doesn’t receive a dime from government bureaucracies, or big corporate donations, or super-wealthy oligarchs. We are entirely funded by patriots like you —and it’s your grassroots support that keeps our efforts strong and unstoppable. So please don’t wait. Together, we can pass the Caregiver Tax Credit and make life better for millions of seniors and their families.Thank you in advance for standing with AMAC Action. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Pop Acta Media | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
That’s not a typo – I’m really only asking for $1.

I need your help. This mission to revive American greatness can't be accomplished with money alone. **
****It requires a movement - an army of patriotic Americans who are ready to take a stand and say "ENOUGH" to Big Government.******Here's what we're going to do:
* Cut red tape
* Slash taxes
* Empower families
* Unleash innovation
* And put you, the citizen, back in charge

I'm not running to control you - I'm running to set you free.
And now I'm asking you to take one small step with me: [Chip in $1 today.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwNDEyX1NBLVFYLjExNDUxMF90MTYyNTgyNS0zNjIzJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQxMl9TQS1RWC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjU4MjUtMzYyMyJ9/0jzUApOYYhERK7japjozLw)** **
Yes - just a buck.
Not because it will fund the whole campaign, but because it sends a powerful message: that you, and millions of other proud Americans, believe in what we're building TOGETHER.
A campaign built by everyday citizens, not career politicians. That's how we win.
[Do you think you could do me that favor today?](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwNDEyX1NBLVFYLjExNDUxMF90MTYyNTgyNS0zNjIzJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQxMl9TQS1RWC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjU4MjUtMzYyMyJ9/Z86JfgZ9uDlYxHYbZCZN0A)****[Chip in just $1 right now

name: History Facts
subject: The U.S. once banned the greatest thing ever
body:
Sliced bread was first sold commercially in 1928 and quickly grew into a culinary sensation — until its rise came to an abrupt halt when it was briefly banned 15 years later.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68epdk3gm7otcxtnh9k198mzt55q4udy118s3mua3m6ufnnl7x6nomghlt49v7qqnmd74l4tv4oo70mdoskn5naqg16aa6xiqqlyp77z4mbngzhexjew0t1c4itn2kdk329a4loasx3gquvjk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulp3c&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [The U.S. once banned sliced bread.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulp3c&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulp3c&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulp3c&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| S liced bread was first sold commercially in 1928 and quickly grew into a culinary sensation — until its rise came to an abrupt halt when it was briefly banned 15 years later. On January 18, 1943, amid World War II, U.S. Secretary of Agriculture Claude R. Wickard [announced](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulp3c&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) a ban on selling sliced bread in an effort to conserve wartime resources. The government hoped this ban would preserve the country’s supply of alloyed steel (used to build slicing machines) and wax paper (used to both wrap sliced bread, which required thicker wrapping than unsliced loaves, and protect military equipment from the elements). It was a common practice to ask Americans back home to ration goods in the name of the war effort, but the ban on sliced bread was met with furious and immediate backlash.
---
U.S. housewives in particular were dismayed over the ban. One woman named Sue Forrester [wrote](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulp3c&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to _The_ _New York Times_ , “I should like to let you know how important sliced bread is to the morale and saneness of a household.” While hotels and restaurants were given a 60-day grace period to prepare, bakeries weren’t so lucky, and saw sales decline up to 10% while facing sizable fines for defying the ban. Given the ration’s widespread unpopularity, many government bureaucrats played dumb and refused to admit being involved, pointing fingers at others instead. Wickard finally rescinded the ban on sliced bread on March 8, 1943, claiming, “The savings are not as much as we expected,” while conveniently neglecting to acknowledge any public outcry.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulp3c&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulp3c&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

## A sack of flour was auctioned off for over $275,000 in 1864.
In 1864, a Nevada merchant named [Reuel Colt Gridley](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulp3c&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) auctioned off a single sack of flour over and over again, raising a staggering sum for the U.S. Sanitary Commission (a precursor to the Red Cross). It all began after Gridley lost a friendly wager and was forced to carry a 50-pound sack of flour through town. He took the defeat in stride, decorating the sack with red, white, and blue ribbons and parading it around accompanied by a marching band. The spectacle attracted a crowd, and it was eventually suggested that Gridley auction off the famed flour sack to raise funds for charity. The winner paid $250, but didn’t actually want the flour, and suggested Gridley auction the sack again. The process repeated itself, and Gridley raised more than $5,000 by day’s end. In the weeks that followed, he traveled across the country holding auctions for the flour sack, raking in more than $275,000 (about $5.4 million today) for the cause. The flour was ultimately used to bake cakes at the 1864 Sanitary Fair in St. Louis.
---

# Saturday, April 12, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1758, Spanish military captain Luís Antonio Menchaca was awarded nearly 50,000 acres of land in present-day Karnes and Wilson counties, marking the [first recorded private land grant](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0LFyqzAQheGnER3Mar2STaHiNnS-bUpGstagiUAesTHm7TP2I6T6q_MV5-s6Xn3KaZ3--4WdvO5lzF54TdMs4SdOLNsjRa5LWb9HBDQtUKtxjD7lY6QmugCx1w07fSYiY6w9N7Mz0ZigPVwimP4WgKyxPpDuLZyQKDTJvTEgjVqDBtNdPFgkAkYD_g6oCDgmKbWTmYVffrvnozy5dreyNNnNIo9Nnf4pHBQO-753ss2-rDmt3JU6KRw-qzb6ow3HOwoHXqW-S6ZvqouPPeWcNntWBNPiU_7g8ocfng5_AwAA__-OvWs-) in Texas. The 1779 census showed Menchaca was the richest person in the province. Rockport and Port Arnasas are two of the [best beach towns](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0LGOgzAQBNCvgQ5kb9ZAChfXpMu1V6IlXmB1Bkd4E5K_P5FPuH70NDM_1_5KEmWdvmlhr68x9ZGUV5lmHR5hYs13Cbwtaf3twYCrDFYW-kAS3z2WwQ8mnG3J3raI6FzTtOXsT-exA3J24FsD54DQgWsA7OgcMWFXij8wgxasNda4uiPTAKJhcIZGAwUaDqJpq3Vm5RflMb7Tk7f6lpYy-ln1novTVwGXAi77vtc5PXTmbY3ylHU6YgVcBs5aDUy3udK0r7n6bOjao-yp3Hy47xKj5KYt0EwLSfz4-o8rnh7-AgAA___pzWwC) in the South, according to _Southern Living_ magazine. Based on the forecast for the weekend, maybe give them a try! Today's sponsor is [Percent](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckE-LszAQhz9NvFVmJjHqIYcXxBcWurCnHiWaUcPGP2ha22-_tN1PsNeZh4cfz-XcnK0Pfh4-7cQm3vulCTby7Icxtlc3cNxX73iblvm7IaDsBOqE1Djrw6NRiTMtuBITNpgrpbJM6zwZTdcXeVtyh2WZF6xRW1l0qApG1RfQceLNUwYKCREQsrSwoEkpYMrA9kBCATsfly2NI0e-270Pj-XGW9otUxLMGOO6C_lPUC2oPo4jndjPkbeO1_hkBNUyLyV9CaovdaU__j9RWV-9E7JCpbEQpPdri0JWv-6mD8vmnRWUEby_JGQ187EHjpG3900KWYFqkF5Fks249fAh-F3nQsEwWR9eK-Mfgt4M_QQAAP__hVp_ww), offering institutional-grade investment opportunities to _The Flyover_ readers.

## Texas House Approves $337 Billion Budget
The Texas House of Representatives passed a two-year [$337 billion budget](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGOpDAMQL8GuowcYzJQUFxDt9deiQwxEG2GjIgZdv_-xJx0H7CdZes9We_Px_DBIYZt-c0P6fRrTkNklS0sq46HX0TzM3jZH2n7HBCwNkDG4uA5xO-BSt-N4FtbSmfvRFTXzt3LteOa7lUrs5BvuKmpmWSS2c4WkaByUIbukgFZtBYs1LeGwSERCNbAM2BBID5o2m-6isoX5zl-p5fstyk9ytitqs9cVL8K7Avsz_O8fb4OuY4F9rxrmKIU2G9y5gL7Z4pBw3SNb5eJsoQcWY9d_u_WdGQxXkZWySYrq5h_DcwYYgxpu3h0rfEztAKEhgVbQ3XlDHNDppK28aNzOIKUe-ef58Vldy8IlgeH-H5ef9D51eHfAAAA__-KsYua), concluding the final vote at 3 a.m. Friday morning after nearly 13 hours of debate. Contributing to the marathon session were about 400 pre-filed amendments from both Democrats and Republicans, only 35 of which were approved. A large portion of the budget--accounting for about 15% of the plan--is dedicated to [property tax relief](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckL2OqzAQhZ_GdETjiQ2kcHEbutx2SzTYE7DWYISH_Lz9Ktk32PronKPv-7oOV4oprtN_WtjJ85aHRMJrnGYZjzCxlC0G3pe8fg8IaGswtcYhUEyvwVTBjRAuumKnW2OMtU3TVrNDvFjbNd1InQ-tb3HU1jY4WgDD3pyr6N5jYDRqDRrsqSNo0BhgtEA3QGWAQ5S8n2Rm4SeVW3rlO-8nn5cquVlkK-r8T2GvsPdjoaNIXN-pwn7lR1HYp-wpKew__XrOR-F6o1K41EVIuP5FrHYXtkdMKZamVQamhWL6_MgflNwd_gQAAP__rPxwYg), with other notable items including $1 billion for parent-directed education savings accounts, $6.5 billion for border security, and $30 billion for road projects. The Senate-crafted budget, which passed the House on a vote of 118-26, now goes [behind closed doors](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGurCAQhp8GO8wwILoFxW3s9ra3NLiMSi6CEVZ33_7EPc2pTzeZmf_Ln-_ffbhbH3yc_9qVTHlNaQi2UPTzUsanm6nkzTva1xT_DwjYcFBc4OCsD-9BVc6M4G6iIiNapVTTaN1Wi0FSdroBCkW6kZ2U5FrQk7xZJVurZeXNBQMlUAgQ0NSdBY1KAWEDdgJkCsj5kva6LFToZfMU3umgvX6ktQpmKWXLTP5h2DPsz_Os4_hw03mdGfaRzsyw31LwxT-uMaRIPBe78x_LD5gv6ZmJ223b00GZrzZnfxCXsuWjD8GneAUL8W8jDHvZCdWBZthXu3HbeX1l3TIF82p9-HQsv9B5GPwKAAD__zWFhFA) for members of both chambers to hash out differences before a final submission to Governor Abbott.
## Trump: Mexico Owes Water to Texas Farmers
President Donald Trump accused Mexico of [stealing water](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0DGuszAQBODTQGe03tgEChd_ky5_-0q04A1YMRjhTZzc_ik5wutH32jm5zpcKcSwzf9pZSevWxoiCW9hXmR8-Jkl78HzsabtPiCgVWCUxsFTiO_B1N6N4Htds9NnY4y1bXuuF0fA3hqGtrN-GvsW8GR6M2kaW2JtsQ7ug4HRqDVosE1H0KIxwGiBboCVAfZB0tHIwsIvyrf4Tk8-mimtdXSLyJ6r078KLxVeSinNxiUX5vsnUOHFp42iV3I81l3RND0yZ7XyK0xJZWH6jFaFhA_15RWC7U5dXx_O7yXEGHJ7rgzMK4X4LZU__PN0-BsAAP__IZB1Tg) from Texas farmers on Thursday, threatening tariffs and sanctions if Mexico remains in violation of a 1944 water treaty. Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum responded to the accusation Friday, announcing that Mexico will [immediately deliver](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0LGuozAQheGngc5obIyBwsU26e62W6IBD2DFYGRP4uTtV8kj3P7oO9L_72f6QR_8uf3Fgyy_1jgFZDr9tvP8cBtxvryjdMTzPilQnQAtpJoc-vCedO3sDG6UNVnZa627zpi-3u2yGEAwsIzUOuxXKcFRK3Hol3Fs56X29oOBlkpKkNA1A4JRWgOpDnAFVWkg5zmmhndiemFewzs-KTVLPOpgd-YrV-2fSt0qdSulNCeVXIjun0Glbnknf874OESifMXTZXHQyy9RfDVRkCkJToT8FpwexyUUdIMZTJ2su4oPwWfTVxq2A3343vIvCj2t-h8AAP__lvx2wg) water to Texas farmers and acknowledging shortfalls in water delivery to the U.S. Last month, President Trump [halted](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGOpDAQRL_GZB61e22YDRxc4mwvvRA1SxusMxjZPcvM35-YT7i4pPeq6s_X-EUpp335TRt7ecYyZhLe07LK9JgXlnakmetW9r8jAjoNVhscZ0r5Ndpu9hPMn6ZjbwZrrXN9P3SrJ3IDxGi4d85OZOA-ffIAbrqDMx-WuuQvGFiDxoABd7sT9GgtMDqgCKgs8Jyk1JusLPykFvOr_HC9fZety34VOZr6-KUwKAz76yhNrkhhuMgKA1iFwRiF4dH0zmdTGKQ-tkPLWvka2fTGz_Rd9Jlk1UI1xdj0JdFvo45UN65NnyRcdVtLFVpYYeiqn48z5ZxaPygLy0Ypv5vJf5z44_FfAAAA__-XGYD6) a water shipment to Tijuana, citing violations to the 1944 treaty, adding on Thursday that Mexico “owes Texas 1.3 million acre-feet of water.” The treaty obligates Mexico to send 1.75 million acre-feet of water to the U.S. from the Rio Grande every five years, while the U.S. sends 1.5 million acre-feet to Mexico annually from the Colorado River.
## Texas Shows Out in South’s Best Awards
Texas is well represented in _Southern Living_ ’s annual South’s Best Awards, including a repeat designation as “the most legendary margaritas in Texas” for [Joe T. clean_body: The Texas House of Representatives has passed a two-year , concluding the final vote at 3:00 Friday morning after nearly 13 hours of debate. | | | | | | Saturday, April 12, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1758, Spanish military captain Luís Antonio Menchaca was awarded nearly 50,000 acres of land in present-day Karnes and Wilson counties, marking the - in Texas. The 1779 census showed Menchaca was the richest person in the province. Rockport and Port Arnasas are two of the in the South, according to Southern Living magazine. Based on the forecast for the weekend, maybe give them a try! Today's sponsor is , offering institutional-grade investment opportunities to The Flyover readers. Abilene ☀️ 92/67° | Amarillo ☀️ 93/53° | Austin ☀️ 89/54° | Brownsville ☀️ 87/62° | Corpus Christi 🌤️ 84/63° | DFW ☀️ 82/52° | El Paso ☀️ 96/58° | Houston ☀️ 84/58° | Laredo ☀️ 94/64° | Lubbock ☀️ 93/56° | Midland ☀️ 92/62° | San Antonio ☀️ 89/58° | Tyler ☀️ 80/49° | Waco ☀️ 85/52° | Texas House Approves $337 Billion Budget The Texas House of Representatives passed a two-year , concluding the final vote at 3 a.m. Friday morning after nearly 13 hours of debate. Contributing to the marathon session were about 400 pre-filed amendments from both Democrats and Republicans, only 35 of which were approved. A large portion of the budget--accounting for about 15% of the plan--is dedicated to , with other notable items including $1 billion for parent-directed education savings accounts, $6.5 billion for border security, and $30 billion for road projects. The Senate-crafted budget, which passed the House on a vote of 118-26, now goes for members of both chambers to hash out differences before a final submission to Governor Abbott. Trump: Mexico Owes Water to Texas Farmers President Donald Trump accused Mexico of from Texas farmers on Thursday, threatening tariffs and sanctions if Mexico remains in violation of a 1944 water treaty. Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum responded to the accusation Friday, announcing that Mexico will water to Texas farmers and acknowledging shortfalls in water delivery to the U.S. Last month, President Trump a water shipment to Tijuana, citing violations to the 1944 treaty, adding on Thursday that Mexico “owes Texas 1.3 million acre-feet of water.” The treaty obligates Mexico to send 1.75 million acre-feet of water to the U.S. from the Rio Grande every five years, while the U.S. sends 1.5 million acre-feet to Mexico annually from the Colorado River. Texas Shows Out in South’s Best Awards Texas is well represented in Southern Living ’s annual South’s Best Awards, including a repeat designation as “the most legendary margaritas in Texas” for in Fort Worth. Austin and San Antonio both made the cut for the magazine’s best southern cities, while Rockport and Port Aransas took spots in the South’s . Hotel 1928 in Waco and Hotel St. Augustine in Houston were voted by readers as two of the South’s , and, if you’re looking for the best barbecue in Texas, that honor goes to Franklin BBQ in Austin. HISTORY PURGES →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5472d5f2-8cdf-416a-9094-db70fa010d9a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Peter, Trump’s attacks on DEI are forcing government departments to omit, erase, and whitewash our nation’s history!! Agencies from the National Park Service to the Department of Defense have been scrubbing pages of references to slavery, removing mentions of the struggle for civil rights, and deleting mentions of the ongoing discrimination Black Americans and other minority groups face. From Day One, Trump has demonized DEI with ridiculous executive orders – and he’s actively trying to erase the truth about racism and ignore the contributions of people of color, women, the LGBTQ+ community, and other marginalized groups. We need to show Trump that history won’t be ignored. We need to show him that his attempts to rewrite our history won’t be tolerated. [Will you sign our petition condemning Trump’s attacks on American history by 11:59 PM, Peter? We have to stand together and demand that the American people be told the TRUTH.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84da809e-0a6f-4bc7-9376-d1fa5deab377/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te563d666-8a33-4b2b-964a-d96ddf344b8b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’s entertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/hnNTAGovNJ2QMAVegs5BuwfUl-eRUXjrp1T-9IaYm75jek1XUvgkry7FBhTxtdTsQ-BIdtGMj5hAph40qS_MB6q39dbnvxpM-OxfLT6vW4lMJlp8w5ajFlz3HSb6oXwvpB2AZr1GPIPpisbnSwrDEGHpputYGDx08n_K9qy6I9xvX99GDdCcE48chEvmeTyBcU-Jm_NRsd5yyEttEx1BUdpPbkUp6MshbKlrHwbnoyF8jRpPH9N3aRdtfNzmYwSejf0CbTNmLcRSYUGJ_GEQUOecPKERhvf3QK1Fb5fwoL-7MfeE5_GmKTWCx_gh1vM5J7lQ8PHo-t73LwdjFNpHVWTVDWmutBUyQ3uL-0BAUJdV49nk9yNpf9vvhpgf9d1eL1oXltEQNYWs49EJYkWHrAnADiQtpOWjYwojylxQwKR19fAg0tOrlEzXU0WnpusyRKDgfPwjW1M1faddhswbrE6-/4TJhb2Ok-nLGQ9zb1L2UIXW1T1q771QD/7)
---

Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.

body:
And the top brass is TERRIFIED.

Dear Reader,

This is unbelievable...

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/d7BJ-n3xiHP8n8kZ4Tr_ziGlVYT_wrinKwxxBgZhNMr22s3vHeCrmtKLmL-UNPkjelzTERoOArimdD9jYmG4mz3se6bt9utNIrf2seIt53FLr4qZ-g83Qau9U6dFQNJYdAP9qeiHlt_HWl0hvS-RPvdrUST6hwsi0gP_fsBZOoNXqZsdNUW-QdAj-jmYQkT9RSjfWMtrlrB4gy_u2pDyHkL7lvcVHqQMkKkW_fYnUZm32FmNipSZtXbOQTT9k168vuT5dcXfY-LlQehkyrJC/ONRxLqQqWHk8ymE_q3vpV8tlvPnyweNW/7) SpaceX just rescued two astronauts after NASA left them stranded in space for months...
