name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Connecticut’s Sanctuary Delusion
body:
When Did Criminals Get VIP Status?

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=bbdf42efc2)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | “If you come here and break our laws, we will hunt you down. Criminals are not welcome in the United States” _**DHS Secretary Kristi Noem**_
---
|
---
| **Opinion | Connecticut’s Sanctuary Delusion: When Did Criminals Get VIP Status?**
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=be30f22cf9&e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
| **Opinion | Sanctuary Policy**
**Opinion | Connecticut’s Sanctuary Delusion: When Did Criminals Get VIP Status?**
**—By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator**
Here’s a question for every Connecticut taxpayer to chew on over their morning coffee: When did the rights of illegal immigrants—some of whom have been convicted of serious crimes—become**more important than your right to feel safe walking your kid to school or sitting on your front porch?**
It’s a question our state’s Democratic supermajority seems entirely uninterested in answering. And that should infuriate you.
**Connecticut now ranks fifth in the country for declining ICE detainer requests** —right behind California, Illinois, and other states that seem to think enforcing immigration law is optional. Between 2020 and 2024, **we declined more than 1,150 federal requests to detain convicted criminals.** That’s 1,150 chances we had to protect our communities, and we chose not to.
You’d think this would be the moment when Connecticut’s leaders—flush with power, given their supermajority—might step up and act like grown-ups. You’d be wrong.Instead, Attorney General William Tong has taken it upon himself to moonlight as the state’s head of the **#Resistance** , turning his office into a political war room. His latest target? Not drug traffickers, not gangs, not violent offenders. Nope. He’s decided that Avelo Airlines, a budget carrier just trying to operate within federal law, is the real villain here.
Avelo’s crime? Agreeing to a business decision to fly deportation flights on behalf of ICE. In response, Tong penned a scathing letter packed with loaded questions and moral outrage, demanding to know if Avelo would dare transport people in handcuffs or—gasp—without a valid “removal order.” (Because if they’re being deported without the proper paperwork, that’s the part we should be mad about.)Here’s a thought: maybe **the real atrocity isn’t Avelo’s compliance with federal law. Perhaps it’s our own government’s refusal to do its job.**
Tong’s letter reads like a parody. If he’s this outraged about air travel logistics, what’s his plan? Put these criminals on a Greyhound? Call them a Lyft to El Salvador? Does he think ICE should send them home with a gift card and a note that says, “Sorry for the inconvenience”?
While Tong is grandstanding and the legislature is busy earning us top marks in cost of living and bottom marks in economic growth, violent offenders are being quietly released back into our neighborhoods. So again, I ask: **Who exactly is our government working for?**
We need to stop pretending this is normal. It’s not. No functioning society decides the best use of its power is to protect lawbreakers while ignoring the rights of law-abiding citizens. We’ve effectively created sanctuary cities that act like open invitations for criminal migrants to slip through the cracks and land back on our streets—often with tragic results.
Let’s not sugarcoat this: the **Democrats own this mess**. They have the majority, the governor’s mansion, and the moral high ground they like to claim—but they’re not using any of that to make Connecticut safer. If anything, they’re sprinting in the opposite direction.
So here’s a final question, and it’s the one that matters most: What are we, the people of Connecticut, going to do about it?
**Call your state representative.** Call your senator. Show up. Speak up. Demand that the people in charge start prioritizing the citizens who pay the taxes raise the families and follow the laws—not the ones breaking them.
Donald Trump may have won a national mandate with the simple promise that America comes first. In Connecticut, we demand something just as fundamental: that citizens come first.
And maybe Attorney General William Tong should get on an airplane himself, enjoy the friendly skies he’s so concerned about, and fly down to Washington, D.C., to meet with Attorney General Pam Bondi and ICE Director Thomas Homan. **He might just learn what it truly means to be a top law enforcement official: someone who enforces the law, defends the public, and doesn’t confuse grandstanding with governance.**

* * *

---

Dominic For CT 4 Mariners Way Branford, CT 06405-4481 USA

body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/6FVikSeb9eool1sfqbF34h4ftfBf875plKEpjRfCci7cs2Kh-MOZXEbVp9IcpNjlb4Oxwwn8cE38YSFOLaI6qBGVbvpcKY6LCQxJ6dPhchS6fOUqNnC3kZMPI9HenaVgzQ0zPLJvjpF1G-RL2Q1Yg_trtUZIs95nHhqetgBda0ZounrAA9G8VvL2Xi_ehBgLJZeq90UBB7NYv1DKG77GS3ICA6vkoWHsUjViSHjEz9bbG9ZJMziVYIED6rDamfl93lgamwUtt4Js_3kFvs3SgkWc9piSY8yBHcwzqJHPrcijTPcvvV55UEVsr_VOgYlba9DVsqC0jmCCLjNjiHetzdIrWxg_-HppV89O975NqqZo2BssnALc7VHIqNJ-VA5S6lF2RgkopfO01VxdwoKb13sLdIOhtlKwG4Mq0ucuHspSB8BpTl9pl8x3RPWax5kaxXitM7aKs1bBFmV3-BU_93dcodsO755GuQTjUpk-APMHuvADVLPYOziUy9ba1sHk/iAFsYrd680IJm7LtueeUq0ESLQjgGPVR/7 "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/uHC19XnEQi4796Sk5zPe43hdw1xSu3boO8bE_aAgATie1LBgpQ1Q_bICBzQQRf-s8e2bomxPQGOuNby9jtxhJx2fietbe7ZUhs79ozaCpo-zEEfDMSLEoL8Ufj7WYTIf-MEBw45KbrCnsvzonudSZlJPPpHlVo1M2XVRJMty6g8DTiW8Rd1IPtOeZNfpmRwvzKAxODKyKXlNAbd5InrvQr_KrDZ1n8F5yvFutbAP93OYTWVRZbb-n4MjQ0-q-hlQ0TXcQGm_6RoDNFqfyhg6lI-CRV6POBDqJpYSht8ryrvlvY66lJFYrsm8AWrV8SE2SrAJOHAOf8E0j0IawZe2iRodzrSesjSLRHS3p07SuhXtiNGZj2YBIAWKn9trJvSJ9L0dAzPnAie0RmjtjhiOI1jQFHdoC8ALIjn4Paw9fcVe8WTUDmhlx_kNne2KRkk5DjAHKbNSi53Cso3-gGHQndgYhCBOz5OKZTJEjHOgVqVGx5wRosTxpg3jYiopbYKQ/9sorvU18wLAD5wPpVl9IkX4qaKTr4U0r/7 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/VpphbMR1nwZRpjohFAwK4-BzrBlwjxTqKGNLZ4L3V0Gb3nJBZ0g5r1ZrsO53b4aqxMPHZqp5AeFJfdNdYRlx0yvB3MtUDP319xS06xwzOgr066tPU3TLfQJ3u_gRHeMpSVnbmfvd-3mcB0pQxJK4_NVEMPQlH1paFudSf_UrQjQ5VkKh17we8OFn7bUpMr-siasT5r-LnmI5sZ_lUDEzXXPDOyHGM8flpFsz6Ejcr1G1YVc_Q3JOxAA4K0doPmQ7olJX0ZJbSN55v6MaR7yj5sJ-Rw2tNRS7jaFyfNvxiiqh5rJaQ9lX4McTpu-wgL4EXthWjrDt_WGMoQjb6LQHBqKvognwFkcc5D01Xsc8OmAbga1cxUPJ6qvTOWqp-nOUQAmsTLJxKKhk_OkXXPOUZPQSSavzS4Xk1CsUMhtIAegvARjUSyxRbAeMutcFofbivbPYgkdY-cloD00Ebpomwe9hnM29-RnT6ov6NPDM0kRKm7wQ5O1y5EHpu7lIMThf/Qr9e4bVmR_DUvFN_f-tTGgEQS8NW1XcU/7 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/afZ3sl3wlYIUQLw2ISySIGIute2HYnmSn1kUR--Tq-z_Tn63vDubjC3daWkqZIY9_4rkXBp9sN-ZIuV-TSBv2ZE5ukcL9YtlxlsoOhCz3XlNKpcnIxthVsftuzk2cYW9iP2cZq4l6XMAunYVmbSlvPAfw4wDtlwgvTE-815nnK8Yrrb5E3j-TN58BaT7JGrFwGYZh9umu-x0lm0tGxKLMe5QeVi9rEIHwvq5dyL7nwMpgpmaVUkPHmxtUXhTeyRqalhAPm7wjI1n7v4zX2xpi7bbPEynpNyyzH73qCrI9YnvmfMSep6TyTrMbxOYnRnPoF0h4o-qo26PJsYhf4SPiBCBpjdqgQY-L-796l9YyveH0cureQgZmjGVTljj5WoGcAsWiz_kmDkZ2RMtRxqRZVjuXeo20n6etLTZovNTYg0dFdRmNuTBwG5D8nJTxq5_mm6qR-GZiJcaT24veBc-H7nvLBE24VTuFuMjtP_FUpBJ9_10H0PULRmLm1LUo6CZ/1gv4eGBQfOi5hXIbghzUAXUQ_lq3HNAS/7 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_

body:
When I saw this news my heart broke

|
---
| | | First, Democrats and the Mainstream Media started thrashing Elon Musk and DOGE.

Then, Democrat activists started blowing up Teslas across America.

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Mississippi in Washington
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/bigwinforfreedom-12848671?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, This week I went to Washington, and had meetings at the White House, Congress (Senate & the House), as well as with various think tanks.
---
|
---
_At the White House_
| I gave a presentation about Mississippi income tax elimination to _Americans for Tax Reform_ , too.

**Mississippi is the 2 nd fastest growing state in America, with the 5th fastest increase in personal income.** We have just passed legislation to abolish the income tax, and have received record levels of inward investment.

That means there is tremendous interest in our state, and what our pro-growth policies have started to achieve.

**It was an honor to talk about the Mississippi success story, with so many positive policy wins.** I was really struck by the strong support for the Magnolia state and pro-growth policies.
---
|
---
_Spring at the Capitol in DC_
| **Those I talked to in Washington are very aware of Mississippi’s successes.** (Even more so now). I suspect this interest will only increase.

When I flew home from Washington, I felt so proud of our state.

Imagine what Mississippi could achieve if we used our conservative super majority to go even further with pro-growth policies?

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=bab3448af2&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: ‘complete, utter chaos’
body:
|
#
Friend, Without a doubt, you or someone you know depends on Social Security. Millions have paid into it their whole lives, and they count on it to retire with dignity and the peace of mind they’ve earned. That’s why reports of Elon Musk’s so-called ‘Department of Government Efficiency’ going after Social Security were so alarming: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105691831/539091167/1780544272?refcode=em-4.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGUyYTMwYy05ZTE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r6BhuyPo3wI0y2PmXH2kfgGqBtmWGqqoHKAzVDu-phM=&emci=b0d187bf-ce16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=68e2a30c-9e17-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=27257697) **Doge’s attack on Social Security causing ‘complete, utter chaos’, staff says**
---
Across the nation, we’re seeing Social Security being vilified, phone services eliminated, and in Saginaw, our field office is under threat of being shuttered.
Let me be clear: The richest man in the world – who has repeatedly called Social Security a **“ponzi scheme”** – needs to keep his hands off the program that over 200,000 folks in our district rely on.
I’m not just sounding the alarm – I’m taking action. I’ve demanded answers from the administration about how and why these reckless decisions are being made.
And just last month, I introduced legislation to protect Social Security recipients from being unfairly penalized for overpayment errors.
You have my word that I won't back down from this fight in Congress, but I’d love your help to keep the pressure on:
**[I’d appreciate you joining me now by signing my petition standing against cuts to the Social Security Administration. Click here or the button below to add your name.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105691840/539091172/1780544272?refcode=em-4.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGUyYTMwYy05ZTE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r6BhuyPo3wI0y2PmXH2kfgGqBtmWGqqoHKAzVDu-phM=&emci=b0d187bf-ce16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=68e2a30c-9e17-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=27257697)**

clean_body: | Friend, Without a doubt, you or someone you know depends on Social Security. Millions have paid into it their whole lives, and they count on it to retire with dignity and the peace of mind they’ve earned. That’s why reports of Elon Musk’s so-called ‘Department of Government Efficiency’ going after Social Security were so alarming: | Doge’s attack on Social Security causing ‘complete, utter chaos’, staff says Across the nation, we’re seeing Social Security being vilified, phone services eliminated, and in Saginaw, our field office is under threat of being shuttered. Let me be clear: The richest man in the world – who has repeatedly called Social Security a “ponzi scheme” – needs to keep his hands off the program that over 200,000 folks in our district rely on. I’m not just sounding the alarm – I’m taking action. I’ve demanded answers from the administration about how and why these reckless decisions are being made. And just last month, I introduced legislation to protect Social Security recipients from being unfairly penalized for overpayment errors. You have my word that I won't back down from this fight in Congress, but I’d love your help to keep the pressure on: | Thank you, Kristen | = | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e1e3aecd67a74cd3b927cbc1703a6aba&_e=-WoqUtEGYtV2ISBr8h8jVUGomCX8eC5mXxOWSb64s0TQNChKgWSO3L-k65MK46DNHDcT0evFHm3gzrAS3C9RhGM0pUu0qA4ON8yX070kZn0VFRJPiuRAtzbu0uUBLRev4YR--FlV3KEa9k8uDgvOhSVnodgzUddocKUd_X43XGOLMM0lUNaGNOYTmNXV2NDWooWrwvA1SG1qmrR9A-CF6PGEHMjOxjHb70IvPB40l98m6uU8nzNIubvynUMcH2OYzDWoyVSeUNsi9XDj9nUbpWd5nUNYxZVYcB8Q-7hrb7JqoATy3IDkxAVg06ScZmJ5oZi38ApZxw4g71a58a6NurRum_vd7T0qFz7oCPR_Y3o%3D) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e1e3aecd67a74cd3b927cbc1703a6aba&_e=-WoqUtEGYtV2ISBr8h8jVUGomCX8eC5mXxOWSb64s0TQNChKgWSO3L-k65MK46DNHDcT0evFHm3gzrAS3C9RhGM0pUu0qA4ON8yX070kZn0VFRJPiuRAtzbu0uUBLRev4YR--FlV3KEa9k8uDgvOhSVnodgzUddocKUd_X43XGOLMM0lUNaGNOYTmNXV2NDWooWrwvA1SG1qmrR9A-CF6FxBAzqeOxVj1XrPMEWHdbqW5t5ZYp9nGarwDFMw2ROFCumk0eeTHOqIL77fqnzvN1hGD-DNhWL0sD-ZzerOXmcpbZSUMNQcoD8ROBN9c7YXK20aiTjsYiL62pyvHZhqoGLrr_0fVXcYelIqaQ-uEsw%3D)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e1e3aecd67a74cd3b927cbc1703a6aba&_e=-WoqUtEGYtV2ISBr8h8jVUGomCX8eC5mXxOWSb64s0TQNChKgWSO3L-k65MK46DNHDcT0evFHm3gzrAS3C9RhGM0pUu0qA4ON8yX070kZn0VFRJPiuRAtzbu0uUBLRev4YR--FlV3KEa9k8uDgvOhSVnodgzUddocKUd_X43XGOLMM0lUNaGNOYTmNXV2NDWooWrwvA1SG1qmrR9A-CF6CueFI2DNYcBGb_hdBCRApgQM7Ye7Svxs-aBY6FDOsySMnTvDXCSziBBO3Q9KAbUFOI4x7fgxd-1TR_gT81oc1vGBvg7PsT2ARtEI6FJ6Z6zgjPnKJLiLFrXC0bW0Z7BRNhsLGz7O6aM5TgiZpyTYcQ%3D)

Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e1e3aecd67a74cd3b927cbc1703a6aba&_e=-WoqUtEGYtV2ISBr8h8jVUGomCX8eC5mXxOWSb64s0TQNChKgWSO3L-k65MK46DNHDcT0evFHm3gzrAS3C9RhGM0pUu0qA4ON8yX070kZn0VFRJPiuRAtzbu0uUBLRev4YR--FlV3KEa9k8uDgvOhSVnodgzUddocKUd_X43XGOLMM0lUNaGNOYTmNXV2NDWooWrwvA1SG1qmrR9A-CF6L8TShFjwMh5ieAQNcasFg61OCVBu-91Ux1r2HwU7Wx_M3oqwd5ZxiNgxYbcrHElvja9r9qZaYSmZb8r5gSoq-XpGpIALxSWkn-Ke3KojR1XHspGb8u8jqpS6vI9Oh0PSfNhJvXxtPBHR6ByY1A8JDE%3D) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e1e3aecd67a74cd3b927cbc1703a6aba&_e=-WoqUtEGYtV2ISBr8h8jVUGomCX8eC5mXxOWSb64s0TQNChKgWSO3L-k65MK46DNHDcT0evFHm3gzrAS3C9RhGM0pUu0qA4ON8yX070kZn0VFRJPiuRAtzbu0uUBLRev4YR--FlV3KEa9k8uDgvOhSVnodgzUddocKUd_X43XGOLMM0lUNaGNOYTmNXV2NDWooWrwvA1SG1qmrR9A-CF6PYiTOQx7zrbpPSS8957Fmv5yLTgabg_XW1tE7jxQTYBUd_EIG7kNOjhbRkiUGV6Kevghs8wW_0S4swsHWHt9XEGv-RkNLPX8YfBFbVICBZBhuHmnpLIpsBA50qwQnyuRUpvESV0vNMqXTXgutfNcjo%3D) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e1e3aecd67a74cd3b927cbc1703a6aba&_e=-WoqUtEGYtV2ISBr8h8jVUGomCX8eC5mXxOWSb64s0TQNChKgWSO3L-k65MK46DNHDcT0evFHm3gzrAS3C9RhGM0pUu0qA4ON8yX070kZn0VFRJPiuRAtzbu0uUBLRev4YR--FlV3KEa9k8uDgvOhSVnodgzUddocKUd_X43XGOLMM0lUNaGNOYTmNXV2NDWooWrwvA1SG1qmrR9A-CF6FuzNnNjCnHmuEaaaIrU-tT-IikK7WIO2ZPhYgmXnRI7OyF-dez8hP_KDMh1l3yXnL819eEtsetii4YpAfksTKKx44wXiZMOQCfXWxQ33Uj8LUmMIZBp_IHJoUlcxYr57OMDsHBVajZHFfufTsoFb24%3D) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e1e3aecd67a74cd3b927cbc1703a6aba&_e=-WoqUtEGYtV2ISBr8h8jVUGomCX8eC5mXxOWSb64s0TQNChKgWSO3L-k65MK46DNHDcT0evFHm3gzrAS3C9RhGM0pUu0qA4ON8yX070kZn0VFRJPiuRAtzbu0uUBLRev4YR--FlV3KEa9k8uDgvOhSVnodgzUddocKUd_X43XGOLMM0lUNaGNOYTmNXV2NDWooWrwvA1SG1qmrR9A-CF6NlToN1PqK5rwzLLFLC-1u9_RARvPLItPHqlC0lT-hrlREFVd3vXhYQX3Cfh0gyIBNIRuMshIQEbvDnQ_dDRPbbXhqQzps2L1VstX8cg-AOMuLHKKSRLQ3dfbewTYgwiFirmdrFVMsf_glLd-vyIpc0%3D) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---
| | For Freedom,
---

clean_body: Puppet-masters for our future elections| | | | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat. | | | | STOP SOROS Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love. > We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys. This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system......to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us?? My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals! There are no two ways about it. George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law. We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.And we only have 20 months to do it. On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.** And we would be honored to have you by our side. AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it. Thank you for joining us in this fight for America. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, . ## Democrat Announces Regret for Deporting Criminal Aliens – RedState
Of all the things to regret voting for, deporting criminal aliens would never be on my list. That’s not the case for Democrat Rep. Jahana Hayes of Connecticut. The Laken Riley Act was massively bipartisan and is the first bill President Trump signed into law to start his second term. name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: Raised by my Mamaw
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8708dc503ffb4984b0e2abdf2516daf4&_e=RQce5M046jrhuQOQBFC8L6Yp7zOEPOi_JfDuF-j8-k7Y3jc-Xpbo6U_XILCPhcs48CE47RaEVR4HUVraxBy47AldcUqCKPnTsfaLV3c1f0_qDdvOnBcR7mv1RakVl9aJK85slrsu_b6mhAtB1i41wQR4i0YtcyDAcezvfH_tiCOUDKIioU4GouJ-nYcYlZjKW-HZFjcEVBkO7gPIeYsJs7EIGAgEOR8NFYL3edESZwW4PfUx1bkvdOZrwd847c0NF6flJWIw_V4JRwj8QmI8JWYW3LGotdo_xGGGEyUzZ2Im4WnYRkp9e9_VOwOIPqFP8Qz2QWghll_7noAENT9npKYK_VbWXlT1MMkCP3kqM2eWcFfEXoRcJ_6KbcZ5XZ-8LVm-2dkw96e3PV2Wio2YEA%3D%3D "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8708dc503ffb4984b0e2abdf2516daf4&_e=RQce5M046jrhuQOQBFC8L6Yp7zOEPOi_JfDuF-j8-k7Y3jc-Xpbo6U_XILCPhcs48CE47RaEVR4HUVraxBy47AldcUqCKPnTsfaLV3c1f0_qDdvOnBcR7mv1RakVl9aJK85slrsu_b6mhAtB1i41wQR4i0YtcyDAcezvfH_tiCOUDKIioU4GouJ-nYcYlZjKW-HZFjcEVBkO7gPIeYsJs7EIGAgEOR8NFYL3edESZwUnIeuWsCJivxH0ZP_sy47Z6JKYjojlBU30M7nNeV-F3WVrlorNAJI_24S4Awc7QDVDlthGYvz5Jcuord38W3SraiLCYu6OciVlICHmiNvZ98VtMaui0nMNfxWtyqQdIqeZWDMnlvkdgZjpl7kNjZYBW88RUbuJ5IronMSYg4Q36w%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8708dc503ffb4984b0e2abdf2516daf4&_e=RQce5M046jrhuQOQBFC8L6Yp7zOEPOi_JfDuF-j8-k7Y3jc-Xpbo6U_XILCPhcs48CE47RaEVR4HUVraxBy47AldcUqCKPnTsfaLV3c1f0_qDdvOnBcR7mv1RakVl9aJK85slrsu_b6mhAtB1i41wQR4i0YtcyDAcezvfH_tiCOUDKIioU4GouJ-nYcYlZjKW-HZFjcEVBkO7gPIeYsJs7EIGAgEOR8NFYL3edESZwXVY5gB1SlbbIWdFxMbROH9TpnF0h0npBmVYjZsz7w4k-00ocFjgelSGmdfm1b-NonsfYwKuBCDARgRyQvWI2bJFLOO42f2YoK-Fm2nvu7iiBaWyiws_XbHXfCtLktK6UYF3YilNZTqQLF1Sb6CBl8rUks1cPuULfTcO2WORGJddg%3D%3D "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8708dc503ffb4984b0e2abdf2516daf4&_e=RQce5M046jrhuQOQBFC8L6Yp7zOEPOi_JfDuF-j8-k7Y3jc-Xpbo6U_XILCPhcs48CE47RaEVR4HUVraxBy47AldcUqCKPnTsfaLV3c1f0_qDdvOnBcR7mv1RakVl9aJK85slrsu_b6mhAtB1i41wQR4i0YtcyDAcezvfH_tiCOUDKIioU4GouJ-nYcYlZjKW-HZFjcEVBkO7gPIeYsJs7EIGAgEOR8NFYL3edESZwVaulQTstioatm--C0hLiL3DVDKHhIM6rExCdtPnRs4Sx2M4Q015DkdASgkqMFD36VefL-uYETvQnaPxiPOdH2XZXo2YJpRamNyQr1_SUTuC4qinMDICbzi1oZTu-rKuuV0bEitEz5fnAKn99iYU7d4q2wXdj7SnzWR6nMXAPdepQ%3D%3D "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_

| Hey Peter, it’s Kevin, Executive Director of the Democratic Party of Georgia. This week, news broke that Marjorie Taylor Greene purchased over $750,000 in stocks when the market was in the red after Donald Trump announced his newest tariffs — then made a profit after he instituted a 90-day pause on those tariffs. I don’t know about you, but something seems fishy here — and top Democrats agree. That’s why we’re circulating a brand new petition to demand Marjorie Taylor Greene be investigated for insider trading, but we’re missing your response, Peter. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Do you remember the day?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The anger... the pain...
#

Friends -
Twelve years ago this month, and just months after the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School, the U.S. Senate voted down an effort to expand background checks.
Do you remember how you felt that day?
The anger.
The pain.
The disappointment when 46 senators looked at the most benign and practical solutions offered by moderates from both parties, looked over their shoulder at the powerful, shadowy gun lobby, and brought shame on themselves by choosing to do nothing.
Some of those cowards are still in the Senate today. Some are even up for re-election this cycle.
Despite this, our job remains: either we must pass commonsense legislation to keep our communities safer from gun violence, or we must elect a Senate that will. So today, we are asking:
[**Can I count on you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign to change our gun laws? Do it today. Especially today. Send a message that we are in this fight until the fight is won.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250412-1-b&t=1&akid=10288%2E3935704%2EurXMQT)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-apr25.D1xNsr&amount=3&refcode=em250412-1-b&t=20&akid=10288%2E3935704%2EurXMQT)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-apr25.Hbc3hL&refcode=em250412-1-b&t=21&akid=10288%2E3935704%2EurXMQT)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-apr25.qYj7DB&refcode=em250412-1-b&t=22&akid=10288%2E3935704%2EurXMQT)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-apr25.LyCti9&refcode=em250412-1-b&t=23&akid=10288%2E3935704%2EurXMQT)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-apr25.DtUm5U&refcode=em250412-1-b&t=24&akid=10288%2E3935704%2EurXMQT)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-apr25.D1xNsr&refcode=em250412-1-b&t=25&akid=10288%2E3935704%2EurXMQT)**
---
****
Our democracy’s history is filled with names we neither remember nor celebrate -- people who stood in the way of progress while protecting the powerful. Twelve years ago, a number of senators voted to join that list.
With your help, we’ll work to remove a number of them from office.
All my best,
Gabby Giffords

name: Jordan Zaslow
subject: 4m men... and 69m women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
That's the breakdown of how many Americans will be impacted by...| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105701725/539118624/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250412SAVE_N_JZ_NO_9_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiMDZlNTU3LWE0MTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9R-Lyow1ENxbFgyqJDlcrWgo-F-D80xTzEGfttG1Lew=)
---
Hi Peter,

We are writing today because one of the most dangerous threats to women’s rights in America is now one step closer to becoming federal law.

2 days ago, the Republican-controlled House officially voted to pass the “Safeguard American Voter Eligibility” (SAVE) Act which would result in the disenfranchisement of millions of eligible voters. You may have heard about this bill and how it would impact millions of American women... Now that Republicans have a trifecta in Washington, it could easily become law.

**Here is just one reason why this matters:**
This bill would have a devastating impact on women – **most notably on the approximately 69 million women in America who legally changed their last names when they got married** – because the SAVE Act **requires** a _birth certificate that matches the name of the person registering to vote._
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105701726/539118627/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250412SAVE_N_JZ_NO_9_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiMDZlNTU3LWE0MTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9R-Lyow1ENxbFgyqJDlcrWgo-F-D80xTzEGfttG1Lew=)
---
On April 1st, Congresswoman Maxine Dexter gave her colleagues a chance to protect women’s voting rights by introducing an amendment to the bill that would block it from being implemented unless Congress could guarantee that no eligible married women be denied the right to vote. **Republicans voted it down.**

[**At Her Bold Move, we were not surprised to learn that a Congresswoman stood up against this anti-woman policy. As male legislators continue to pass dangerous laws about women’s bodies, healthcare, and hard-fought rights, we desperately need to elect as many women as we can to offices across the country. Join us in our fight to do just that by donating $25 today. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105701727/539118628/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250412SAVE_N_JZ_NO_9_G_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiMDZlNTU3LWE0MTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9R-Lyow1ENxbFgyqJDlcrWgo-F-D80xTzEGfttG1Lew=)

We will be monitoring the progress of this bill in the Senate and will keep you posted. In the meantime, we remain deeply concerned about the implications this would have on millions of Americans who might not have access to birth certificates, passports, or the documentation this bill would require them to present in order to exercise their constitutional right to vote.

If 69 million American women across the country lose their ability to vote, that would be a catastrophic backslide for women’s rights in America. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: we must keep up the fight. Women have made SO MUCH PROGRESS over the last century. We must defend that hard-fought progress on behalf of our mothers, our grandmothers, our daughters, and our friends.

[**At Her Bold Move, we know our first line of defense will be the women we elect to our government – the women in the rooms where these decisions are being made. You can join our fight today by donating $25 or more right now. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105701729/539118630/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250412SAVE_N_JZ_NO_9_G_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiMDZlNTU3LWE0MTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9R-Lyow1ENxbFgyqJDlcrWgo-F-D80xTzEGfttG1Lew=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105701732/539118633/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250412SAVE_N_JZ_NO_9_G_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiMDZlNTU3LWE0MTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9R-Lyow1ENxbFgyqJDlcrWgo-F-D80xTzEGfttG1Lew=)

clean_body: That's the breakdown of how many Americans will be impacted by...| | | | | = Hi Peter, We are writing today because one of the most dangerous threats to women’s rights in America is now one step closer to becoming federal law. 2 days ago, the Republican-controlled House officially voted to pass the “Safeguard American Voter Eligibility” (SAVE) Act which would result in the disenfranchisement of millions of eligible voters. You may have heard about this bill and how it would impact millions of American women... Now that Republicans have a trifecta in Washington, it could easily become law. Here is just one reason why this matters: This bill would have a devastating impact on women – most notably on the approximately 69 million women in America who legally changed their last names when they got married – because the SAVE Act requires a birth certificate that matches the name of the person registering to vote. = On April 1st, Congresswoman Maxine Dexter gave her colleagues a chance to protect women’s voting rights by introducing an amendment to the bill that would block it from being implemented unless Congress could guarantee that no eligible married women be denied the right to vote. Republicans voted it down. = We will be monitoring the progress of this bill in the Senate and will keep you posted. In the meantime, we remain deeply concerned about the implications this would have on millions of Americans who might not have access to birth certificates, passports, or the documentation this bill would require them to present in order to exercise their constitutional right to vote. If 69 million American women across the country lose their ability to vote, that would be a catastrophic backslide for women’s rights in America. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: we must keep up the fight. Women have made SO MUCH PROGRESS over the last century. We must defend that hard-fought progress on behalf of our mothers, our grandmothers, our daughters, and our friends. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you, Jordan Zaslow Founder & Executive Director of Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states. Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies. Support this important work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. name: Riley Gaines
subject: Can a red crayon become a blue crayon? 🖍️, Gender-confusion books pushed on kids
body:
Scholastic Book Fair is promoting books about gender confusion to kids in preschool!

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmv8d54boxh2b3m0faogr1wbp9676tanw7gqr62no8o8zpfp3rwbz0tds2p6cx7qa5mm8yxjf3xjzwcd1w&__stmp=sulyze&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

Scholastic Book Fair is promoting books about gender confusion to kids in preschool!

In _Red: A Crayon's Story_ , one of the books that Scholastic markets, a crayon labeled as "Red" decides that he is actually "Blue." No matter how hard he tries to be red, he just can't! It's a story about "being true to your inner self and following your own path."

[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h)

_Does this story sound familiar?_

It has eerie similarities to the narrative promoted by gender-transition advocates:

If you want it badly enough, if you declare it so, you can easily transition from boy to girl or girl to boy. It's a matter of feelings and not a biological reality. This kind of narrative is terribly confusing — and even scary — to kids whose brains are not mature enough to understand this line of thought.

This way of thinking also has real-world consequences. Consequences I am all too familiar with...

A _man_ who identifies as a woman stole my dream of winning the NCAA championship in _women's_ swimming.

But don't worry, there's a solution! The solution is SkyTree Book Fairs.

Founded in 2023, SkyTree offers private AND public schools the opportunity to host a book fair that is 100% free from confusing, inappropriate, or otherwise adult-themed content.

The best part? They offer this extraordinary educational experience at zero cost to the schools!

[Want to make school book fairs innocent again? I'm asking you to join me today in supporting SkyTree Book Fairs. Donate $10, $35, $50, or even $500 today to help them fulfill the 150+ requests they received for book fairs. Click to make your tax-deductible gift and put a wholesome book into the hands of a child. >>](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h)

[Donate](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h)

Imagine trying to decide which is worse – your child missing out on learning time in school or having to explain to your grade-schooler that, actually, Red Crayon can't just decide to be a Blue Crayon.

Well, that's exactly the dilemma parents, grandparents, and guardians across the country are facing right now.

Stories like _Red: A Crayon's Story_ are so ubiquitous that many parents are choosing to keep their children home from school during book fair week rather than risk them being exposed to this type of confusing and subversive content!

SkyTree Book Fairs believes that every child should have the opportunity to develop a lifelong love of reading through stories that build strong moral character and **let kids be kids**.

They are wholly committed to providing a superior book fair alternative that matches and even exceeds the ease and quality of the traditional Scholastic book experience.

From classics like _Anne of Green Gables_ to new favorites like _The Green Ember_ , every book in SkyTree's catalog is aimed at empowering children to dream big, build a strong moral character, and embrace the spirit of adventure and personal responsibility that makes America so great.

[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h)

[I hope you'll join me today in supporting SkyTree Book Fairs! It has never been easier or more important to make a positive impact on a child's life through literacy! Click here to send your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $250, or more, and help SkyTree bring 150+ book fairs to schools across the country. >>](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h)

[Donate $10](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h)

[Donate $35](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h)

[Donate $50](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h)

[Donate $100](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h)

[Donate $250](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h)

[Donate Any Amount](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h)

Stories shape our souls, which is why it is CRUCIAL that America's kids have access to wholesome, age-appropriate, and uplifting stories that let their imaginations soar while being rooted in truth.

Thank you in advance for your support!

For the love of reading,

Riley Gaines

P.S. I would consider it a personal favor if you choose to support SkyTree Book Fairs in their important work of providing wholesome and inspiring books to kids across the country. [Please send a donation of $10, $50, $100, or even $250 today.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h)

I thought you'd enjoy this picture of kids enjoying their time at a SkyTree book fair.

[Privacy Policy](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=33g5tc4p3hfuhwm18n64fle0tk11l4da9wdck6k2d1e49ehuwl0tpele0zvd8ljr9y3lq8wpsfi0q5w6cocyy1jnuctks2jfdg2eutdkvrarn89agjfkztf4wicm38ccp2jh6noyjlb3yc9euyyipi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sulyze&__onlt=h)

Peter, Their stories were meant to stay hidden, but on May 15– at the exclusive world premiere, _truth will be revealed._ _Follow the Silenced_ reveals the heartbreaking journey of Americans who trusted the science, only to have their lives forever changed by the COVID vaccine. **These brave souls refused to be silenced**.****

This powerful documentary follows those who were smeared, slandered, and pushed into the shadows. When Big Pharma and the government turned their backs, they found strength in each other. Now, their truth will finally be heard, and we want you to have a front-row seat. With only 300 seats available for this historic premiere, don’t miss being part of this watershed moment. Every empty seat is a voice left unheard, a truth left untold. Join us:

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Update: DNC Announces New War Room Operation to Take on Trump Administration →
body:
---
Derek, While Donald Trump continues to push an agenda that raises costs, destroys jobs, and ruins lives, he also continues to lie, spin, and cheat his way out of accountability. That’s why it is our responsibility to provide the American people with real facts and accurate information about the impact of his policies. And that’s exactly why we wanted to share this news with you: **_DNC Announces New War Room Operation to Take on Trump Administration_** The DNC recently announced the launch of a new War Room to expand and streamline the DNC’s communications, research, and mobilization operations. The War Room will incorporate four main pillars: expanding Democrats’ reach into new information spaces, modernizing the rapid response operation to drive aggressive daily messaging to counter the Trump Administration, leveraging creative opposition tactics and an expansive research operation, and launching a modernized misinformation counterprogramming vertical to combat the lies from the right. With the launch of a new War Room, the DNC will integrate the communications, research, and mobilization departments to drive a cohesive daily message against the Trump Administration and Republicans up and down the ballot, targeting messaging to Americans across information spaces and combating misinformation from the right. The effort will include:
* At the grassroots level
* In the influencer ecosystem
* Within conservative and mixed media spaces
* Daily rapid response
* Combatting misinformation and lies
* Putting Republicans on defense

Right now, it’s more important than ever that we hold Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable for their destructive and harmful policies, and that’s exactly what we’re working to do. [This work is only possible with your help. If initiatives like these are important to you, we hope you’ll consider pitching in a few dollars to help fund the work we’re doing:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025/?refcode=em_20250412_3179_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3179_22930333_6ya26R&akid=3179%2E22930333%2E6ya26R) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250412_3179_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3179_22930333_6ya26R&akid=3179%2E22930333%2E6ya26R)** Thank you, and we’ll have more updates to share soon. The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Team Wes Moore
subject: Wes is delivering for Maryland
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105704202/539125643/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzk0ODY3MS1hNjE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W3Z1c-WR1FROQ9C5wCh_TSuK_YkaJRW6yMCkp6Bjqi8=&emci=58c4622c-0a17-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=bc948671-a617-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=24635485)
Earlier this week, after passing over 800 new bills **and** the 2025 budget, Governor Moore and the Maryland General Assembly rang the bell at 12:00 AM to mark the end of the legislative session. We wanted to be sure you knew about the bills the Governor fought for to continue to create new paths to work, wages, and wealth in Maryland and to investing in our state public education, environment, and communities. Here are just a few:
* **The Excellence in Maryland Public Schools Act** supports our commitment to providing a world-class education for every student, while addressing the teacher shortage.
* **The RAISE Act** expands opportunities for apprenticeships to high-growth sectors.
* **The Expungement Reform Act** opens pathways to work, wages, and wealth for returning citizens.
* **The Model Employer Act** strengthens the state’s ability to recruit, train, and support workers with disabilities through inclusive policies and best practices.
* **The Chesapeake Bay Legacy Act** helps us develop and implement a comprehensive Bay strategy that touches every sector of our Bay economy – from agriculture to aquaculture.
* **The Procurement Reform Act** bolsters the Moore-Miller Administration’s commitment to closing the racial wealth gap and supercharging Maryland’s economy.

Each of these bills are centered on making this Maryland’s decade – from supporting business growth to elevating apprenticeships, ensuring we have the best public schools in the country and building out the sectors of our economy we will stand to win. While Washington is chipping away at the government we know, Governor Moore is in Annapolis delivering results for all of us, creating a state that serves. **This work is only possible with your support.** Grassroots energy is what propelled Wes to the Government House in the first place, and it's what we will depend upon to keep our movement going. [**To help power our work supporting Wes Moore, will you consider chipping in $10 today? We'll put it directly to work growing our movement in every corner of the state.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105704204/539125644/943454626?refcode=em20250412-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzk0ODY3MS1hNjE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W3Z1c-WR1FROQ9C5wCh_TSuK_YkaJRW6yMCkp6Bjqi8=) Throughout the summer, each of these bills will be sent to the Governor’s desk to be signed into law. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Earlier this week, after passing over 800 new bills and the 2025 budget, Governor Moore and the Maryland General Assembly rang the bell at 12:00 AM to mark the end of the legislative session. We wanted to be sure you knew about the bills the Governor fought for to continue to create new paths to work, wages, and wealth in Maryland and to investing in our state public education, environment, and communities. Here are just a few: The Excellence in Maryland Public Schools Act supports our commitment to providing a world-class education for every student, while addressing the teacher shortage. The RAISE Act expands opportunities for apprenticeships to high-growth sectors. The Expungement Reform Act opens pathways to work, wages, and wealth for returning citizens. The Model Employer Act strengthens the state’s ability to recruit, train, and support workers with disabilities through inclusive policies and best practices. The Chesapeake Bay Legacy Act helps us develop and implement a comprehensive Bay strategy that touches every sector of our Bay economy – from agriculture to aquaculture. The Procurement Reform Act bolsters the Moore-Miller Administration’s commitment to closing the racial wealth gap and supercharging Maryland’s economy. Each of these bills are centered on making this Maryland’s decade – from supporting business growth to elevating apprenticeships, ensuring we have the best public schools in the country and building out the sectors of our economy we will stand to win. While Washington is chipping away at the government we know, Governor Moore is in Annapolis delivering results for all of us, creating a state that serves. This work is only possible with your support. Grassroots energy is what propelled Wes to the Government House in the first place, and it's what we will depend upon to keep our movement going. = Throughout the summer, each of these bills will be sent to the Governor’s desk to be signed into law. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all you do. — Team Wes Moore

body:
Will you sign on to help push back against Republican attempts to silence voters?
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105704393/539126293/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkOTQ4NjcxLWE2MTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oiyDpetYme3MF86EWFsIjtzACzCnReuB_SeBI4uJTjE=&emci=6055180f-4d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=bd948671-a617-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Our democracy is strongest when voters can participate. But in Florida, Republicans are showing their contempt for that principle by proposing legislation that would make it almost impossible for voters to get citizen-led initiatives on the ballot. **It’s clear: Our democracy is under attack, and we all need to speak out against efforts to undermine the will of the people.** [**Will you sign on to help push back against Republican attempts to silence voters in Florida?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105704395/539126295/-1104978035?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_FLRepSignOn_email_20250412-NDRC-Tier1-FLRepSignOn_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250412-NDRC-Tier1-FLRepSignOn_&utm_campaign=FLRepSignOn&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkOTQ4NjcxLWE2MTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oiyDpetYme3MF86EWFsIjtzACzCnReuB_SeBI4uJTjE=&emci=6055180f-4d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=bd948671-a617-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105704397/539126297/-1104978035?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_FLRepSignOn_email_20250412-NDRC-Tier1-FLRepSignOn_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250412-NDRC-Tier1-FLRepSignOn_&utm_campaign=FLRepSignOn&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkOTQ4NjcxLWE2MTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oiyDpetYme3MF86EWFsIjtzACzCnReuB_SeBI4uJTjE=&emci=6055180f-4d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=bd948671-a617-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---
Here’s what Florida Republicans are trying to do: under HB 1205, groups would need to pay an unnecessary, exorbitant $1 million bond before they can even start collecting petition signatures — they’d also be subject to extreme petition collection rules and penalties, all while having much tighter deadlines to submit signatures.
Meanwhile in the state senate, SB 7016 would add cumbersome steps before citizen-led petitions can move forward, including new requirements for review by Florida’s attorney general and state supreme court.
Another senate bill (SB 1414) would change election laws giving the attorney general greater review of ballot initiatives and expanding the role of the Office of Election Crimes, while making voter registration updates more strict.
Peter, this is urgent: What’s happening in Florida is a coordinated attack on citizen-led ballot initiatives. And make no mistake — it’s all part of a nationwide attempt to make it harder for voters to make their voices heard.
For an organization like ours, which invests in citizen-led ballot initiatives to advance redistricting reform that results in fairer maps, these Florida bills would represent a significant setback.
[**The NDRC is sounding the alarm about GOP efforts to silence voters. Will you add your name to say you oppose these harmful bills?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105704399/539126299/-1104978035?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_FLRepSignOn_email_20250412-NDRC-Tier1-FLRepSignOn_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250412-NDRC-Tier1-FLRepSignOn_&utm_campaign=FLRepSignOn&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkOTQ4NjcxLWE2MTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oiyDpetYme3MF86EWFsIjtzACzCnReuB_SeBI4uJTjE=&emci=6055180f-4d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=bd948671-a617-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)

subject: If Paxton wins the primary, Democrats could win the Senate.
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

name: Troy
subject: From the scrapbook (8 photos)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
My story’s a little different than most.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-GVPNAZxjGemO4WXl0U9lg)
---
Never could this young boy have imagined he’d one day be sending an email like this.

Peter, it's Troy Downing.

If you don’t have much time, all you need to know about me is that **I only care about three things: God, family, and country.** **[I’m fighting in Congress to defend those three things for myself and every American.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Hhi7g)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-b3mcQ)
---
Growing up, I was a bit of a nerd. I studied mathematics and computer science in college. Then, I started my own business, which merged with Yahoo!. I started other small businesses in insurance and real estate, but then my life changed forever...

Like millions of Americans, September 11th was a turning point.

**I immediately enlisted in the United States Air Force/ANG.** I served two tours of duty in Afghanistan as part of a Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) squadron.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
After eight years of service, I was honorably discharged from the Air Force and returned home to Montana with my wife and kids.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
We are partners in a local distillery in Bozeman, and when the COVID pandemic hit, our company went above and beyond to help our friends and neighbors. There was a shortage of toilet paper, sanitizing wipes, and hand sanitizer in every store.

We quickly turned our whiskey distillery into a hand sanitizer production facility to provide free hand sanitizer to families, first responders, and hospitals.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._pAKHtjDwFVWW-_w0tw)
---
In the Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) Community, we live by this motto:

**“These things we do, that others may live.”**

I’ve taken this motto with me in everything I do. I’ve taught my kids to live by this. And now, my public service is not finished. **[I’m fighting in Congress to preserve our American way of life, protect our God-given rights, and defend our nation with everything I’ve got.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._ip4SgiIKQ)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-CNv6i6TIHC81fJ60fow5w)
---
I’m fighting in Congress for **GOD** so we will never forget that we are one nation UNDER God.

I’m fighting in Congress for our **FAMILIES** so our kids have every opportunity to succeed.

I’m fighting in Congress for our **COUNTRY** so every future generation can still call the United States of America their home and the best country that has ever graced God’s creation.

Peter, defending our conservative House Majority and advancing President Trump’s agenda won’t come cheap. Democrats are chomping at the bit to flip the House BLUE so they can turn every state into the next California! I can’t let that happen, but I’m hoping strong, loyal Patriots like you will help win this fight.

[**If you can spare just $5 or $10, that’s all it takes to make a difference – seriously!**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-mPgblJon1xjg) I don’t have billionaires on speed dial or Hollywood award winners to campaign for me.

I depend on like-minded friends and neighbors like you to chip in a few bucks. **[If everyone reading this chips in $8, I’ll hit my goal!](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[ **DONATE TODAY**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQxMl9SQS1BUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MjU0ODktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MTJfUkEtQVIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjI1NDg5LTI4OTkifQ/91zFp5PNtokG4s8TsDFyFg)
---
[**I appreciate any and all support.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQxMl9SQS1BUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MjU0ODktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MTJfUkEtQVIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjI1NDg5LTI4OTkifQ/hBrxoqfSu1YwL2eHWwisyQ)

With your help, Peter, **we can save our country and put God, Family, and Country FIRST. **

God Bless,

Troy Downing (R-MT)
---
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
---

Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense.
---

Troy Downing For Congress
P.O. Box 20333
Billings, MT 59104

[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.troydowning._ltuyw)

| | | To unsubscribe from Troy Downing for Congress, [click here](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: One of the most morally repugnant proposals by a President in modern history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Help us show that Americans are tired of the endless violence in Gaza
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1588%2E791427%2Elsz016)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-april25-gaza/?source=em250412-1-150&akid=1588%2E791427%2Elsz016)
Friend — Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu visited the White House this week, and Trump continued to push his disastrous proposal to ethnically cleanse the Gaza Strip and put it under US occupation.
This comes as Israel has resumed its ruthless bombing campaign of the Strip and sent ground forces across the border to reoccupy Gazan territory.
Just a couple weeks ago Israeli forces murdered over a dozen medics and aid workers who were attempting to save innocent lives in Gaza.
Netanyahu and his government have made it clear that they aren’t interested in peace, they aren’t interested in abiding by international law, and they certainly aren’t interested in a long-term end to Israeli occupation, ethnic cleansing, and apartheid in Israel, Gaza, and the West Bank.
And as this violence continues, Trump is drawing up his plans to forcefully expel almost 2 million Palestinians and turn Gaza into a US-controlled seaside resort. **It’s one of the most morally repugnant proposals by a President in modern history.**
That’s why we’re doing everything we can to rally support for Congressional action to stop Israel’s bombardment, implement an arms embargo, bring back the ceasefire, and oppose Trump’s plan. We’ve seen more and more leaders join the side of peace — now is the time to keep up the pressure.
**[Please, help us show that Americans are tired of the endless violence in Gaza. Add your name to our petition calling on Congress to stand up to the Trump administration and make it clear that Americans won't accept another US occupation in the Middle East.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-april25-gaza/?source=em250412-1-150&akid=1588%2E791427%2Elsz016)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-april25-gaza/?source=em250412-1-150&akid=1588%2E791427%2Elsz016)**
It would mean so much to me and everyone on the side of peace if you made your voice heard.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1588%2E791427%2Elsz016)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1588%2E791427%2Elsz016)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1588%2E791427%2Elsz016)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1588_791427_lsz016&akid=1588%2E791427%2Elsz016)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

**Peter, we’ve got some huge news: Wiley Nickel is officially running for the U.S. Senate!** He’s running because North Carolina needs a leader who will fight for working families — not billionaires and special interests. He’s determined to lower costs, protect democracy, and make sure our kids grow up with more rights, not fewer. He’s running because it’s time to defeat Thom Tillis, who’s busy doing whatever Trump, Elon Musk, and their billionaire friends tell him to do — even if it hurts everyday North Carolinians. Wiley’s running because North Carolina deserves a senator who will stand up to extremism and defend our rights. He’s spent his career fighting to make healthcare more affordable, hold politicians accountable, and protect voting rights. From his time working in the Obama White House to his years in the State Senate and the U.S. House of Representatives, he’s always fought for North Carolina. He knows the old Democratic playbook isn’t working, and that the moment demands true leadership guided by strong principles. _**The need for new leadership is clear and Wiley is ready to take that mission to the U.S. Senate.**_ ****But he’ll need your help to get there, Peter. clean_body: We've got some huge news. | = Peter, we’ve got some huge news: Wiley Nickel is officially running for the U.S. Senate! He’s running because North Carolina needs a leader who will fight for working families — not billionaires and special interests. He’s determined to lower costs, protect democracy, and make sure our kids grow up with more rights, not fewer. He’s running because it’s time to defeat Thom Tillis, who’s busy doing whatever Trump, Elon Musk, and their billionaire friends tell him to do — even if it hurts everyday North Carolinians. Wiley’s running because North Carolina deserves a senator who will stand up to extremism and defend our rights. He’s spent his career fighting to make healthcare more affordable, hold politicians accountable, and protect voting rights. From his time working in the Obama White House to his years in the State Senate and the U.S. House of Representatives, he’s always fought for North Carolina. He knows the old Democratic playbook isn’t working, and that the moment demands true leadership guided by strong principles. The need for new leadership is clear and Wiley is ready to take that mission to the U.S. Senate. **But he’ll need your help to get there, Peter. Thom Tillis is backed by big-name Republicans and dark money megadonors already gearing up to stop us.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Launch week is make-or-break, and a strong showing of support both in numbers and dollars will demonstrate our campaign’s momentum and North Carolina’s demand for the leadership Wiley is ready to bring to our state. Every contribution fuels our critical launch-week goal. Thank you, Team Wiley = Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States ** | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

clean_body: Donald Trump strategically packed the Supreme Court with far-right justices who would bend to his will. Here’s the latest: This week, the Supreme Court upheld the Trump administration’s firings of tens of thousands of federal workers. It’s clear: Trump’s justices will continue to enable his corruption. | | | | | | | | | | Trump shifted the entire balance of the Supreme Court during his first term. Since then, they’ve overturned Roe v. Wade, gutted affirmative action and more. This week, the conservative Supreme Court upheld some of the Trump administration’s most blatant abuses of power. | | | | | | | | | Thanks, The Gillibrand Research Team * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand
