name: Team Bennet
subject: Michael is ready to lead Colorado forward.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250412_launch2_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250412_launch2_act]
Friends,
Throughout his career, Michael has always fought to provide opportunity to all Coloradans.
Yesterday, Michael announced that he’s running to be Colorado’s next governor. If you’re ready to join him and become a Founding Donor, click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250412_launch2_act]
As a school superintendent, he worked to improve public education, support teachers, and help students achieve their greatest potential. As your Senator, he led efforts to pass the Child Tax Credit, protect our public lands, provide high-speed internet to every household, confront climate change, and boost clean energy.
Now, he’s ready to bring that same leadership to the governor’s office and tackle the biggest challenges facing our state : skyrocketing housing costs, a lack of affordable healthcare, a struggling education system, and an economy that too often favors the wealthy over working families.
Together, we will:
✅ Build affordable housing so Coloradans can live where they work.
✅ Expand access to affordable healthcare, mental health services, and childcare.
✅ Modernize our education system to prepare students with a high school diploma or a college degree for the future.
✅ Support entrepreneurship and small businesses that create good-paying jobs.
✅ Protect Colorado’s public lands and lead the fight against climate change.
Michael knows that Colorado can provide the vision and leadership our country needs right now. To do so, we’ll need to work together. Will you join our campaign as a Founding Donor and help us build a Colorado that works for everyone by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250412_launch2_act]

name: Sergeant Joe Males
subject: Can I count on your support?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
I'm running for United States Congress
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=bb7425c1fc6e487f9a0df2bc8f6977cd&_e=jaEQtZ92seoKP7Ed77_OhTZmih7iccBJsESe6xfp8sezANeSPq8QxL74Cd5JhM5N7DeGBBzTzVM98twFqScmlZs8bUGMLxkxijP8_tJm8OyQCR3JyYQAqClMlJcY01m315bqttcHVqdX6LFGuBNRvrsBw8cll49xLNQcmKFPsXXIhpB7ppCKGHWJlMaPC8QgoKG3JoIis7GOX0L7eoxWpezegQbrrpaPqRM5m9-UNLzgazIeDp8VrL5PY-3NgcbXzeuiSlQA4qiA81nlfv-k_cfrsSSQJzws5vaS84KpvV_6G-aKFwEN8nCxePEc7s2fr8qh6ZuNgwrG2dlrp8diww%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

**You might not have heard about me, but I 'm Sergeant Joe Males, a U.S. Marine Veteran, Latino American, Hemet City Councilman, husband, father, a**nd grandfather. And I'm running for U.S. Congress to FLIP CA-25 RED.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=bb7425c1fc6e487f9a0df2bc8f6977cd&_e=jaEQtZ92seoKP7Ed77_OhTZmih7iccBJsESe6xfp8sezANeSPq8QxL74Cd5JhM5N7DeGBBzTzVM98twFqScmlZs8bUGMLxkxijP8_tJm8OyQCR3JyYQAqClMlJcY01m315bqttcHVqdX6LFGuBNRvrsBw8cll49xLNQcmKFPsXXIhpB7ppCKGHWJlMaPC8QgKBIfHV66X1LeJUYIxVa69bdeedwo6x_-aB8Ih9HvfKUWFTmpPTAL8IEKn-y2_l6PoD8HrndeAVf3W7W8L_8R_qKp3JBf11BW3oWeg-C7wLvWwhdLszzHctC8Xj8q2l2ro6eIdwoYlvGx9BDrRMzOuQ%3D%3D)
I've never shied away from a fight. I've always told my constituents and my family that you're the only one who can take a stand and fight for a better future. After my son Nicholas was tragically murdered, I took that message to heart. I entered public service to restore justice, uphold the rule of law, and demand accountability from those in power. Unfortunately, California has become a place where feckless leadership is the norm. Too many elected officials care more about lining their pockets and toeing the party line than putting their constituents first. _I 'm running for Congress to change that._

You've been a loyal supporter of the America-First movement--and now, I'm asking you personally to join me in this next chapter. Together, we can empower Californians to reclaim their communities and escape the so-called "Communist Utopia" created by Nancy Pelosi, Gavin Newsom, and Adam Schiff. Can I count on your support?

| [ **YOU CAN COUNT ON MY SUPPORT** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=bb7425c1fc6e487f9a0df2bc8f6977cd&_e=jaEQtZ92seoKP7Ed77_OhTZmih7iccBJsESe6xfp8sezANeSPq8QxL74Cd5JhM5N7DeGBBzTzVM98twFqScmlZs8bUGMLxkxijP8_tJm8OyQCR3JyYQAqClMlJcY01m315bqttcHVqdX6LFGuBNRvrsBw8cll49xLNQcmKFPsXXIhpB7ppCKGHWJlMaPC8Qg0v5-3tWCW-A87KGRhS49w8EBf0OOzVw5QQCwNjqwGA77AFCVuTlaCjwxc_hl-h9FoBZGy1G8KrOuv2o3vfPiHE0fYdWKV7eo9-eVHzpfIM6mjKiccyp_1bYZVowniXJtF7NO32rR8s-7qF78j4-gjw%3D%3D)
---
[ **I 'M IN!** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=bb7425c1fc6e487f9a0df2bc8f6977cd&_e=jaEQtZ92seoKP7Ed77_OhTZmih7iccBJsESe6xfp8sezANeSPq8QxL74Cd5JhM5N7DeGBBzTzVM98twFqScmlZs8bUGMLxkxijP8_tJm8OyQCR3JyYQAqClMlJcY01m315bqttcHVqdX6LFGuBNRvqgZEbTgN1ORutmOun8VOjZQdb4XtoglNk4r0E_szfNIdU2MW73gFN19G2lzXW7hZDuFoLjc7731EfQDQ7WFDjnh0Pb4GESoUzXTN6PCuk-UYcGMrzmoJF0ouxLPO7UnDW-queFDvCuEJdaCbJ2MvGXTjKj1tTuhFrGubVSiNuaNLnNlnHtEddL-UGNt2Az_RA%3D%3D)

Meet Joe Males:

**Joe Males is a Marine Veteran, small business-owner, city council member, and most importantly, a father. Throughout his life, he has put service to his community at the forefront of his life 's mission.

Shortly after turning 18, Joe enlisted in the Marine Corps. He attended boot camp in Camp Pendleton and later served overseas in the Philippines and Guam. After being discharged as a Sergeant, Joe remained committed to supporting his fellow veterans. He took on leadership roles in his local Elks Lodge and American Legion post, working to ensure veterans in the community had the resources and support they deserved.

Following his time in the Marine Corps, Joe carried his strong work ethic and discipline into the field of computer networking services. He started in an entry-level position, worked his way through multiple leadership roles, and in 1996, he built his own business from the ground up. Joe knows firsthand the hard work and sacrifice of this journey, and he's determined to make it easier for hardworking Americans to do the same.

Joe's entry into politics was deeply personal. After his son, a Marine who followed in his footsteps, was tragically murdered back home, Joe vowed that no parent should have to endure such a loss. Determined to take a stand for public safety and the rule of law, he ran for Hemet City Council to help ensure no other family would experience the same tragedy.

During his tenure on the City Council, Joe has led numerous initiatives to improve infrastructure, drive business growth, and keep neighborhoods safe and clean. He takes pride in his ability to collaborate with fellow council members and get results, even when facing different perspectives. Joe is committed to bringing this same results-driven approach to Washington D.C., to ensure the voices of the American people are heard and their needs are met.

\----------Forwarded Message----------
Date: April 9, 2025
From: Fair Fight Action
Subject: The most dangerous voter suppression bill yet
ALERT: the House of Representatives is about to vote on the most dangerous voter suppression bill we’ve seen yet, and millions could be disenfranchised.
The SAVE Act would unnecessarily force all Americans to prove their citizenship _in person_ — with documents like a passport or birth certificate — every time they register to vote or change their registration, even if you move.
**This would disproportionately keep eligible young Americans, low-income Americans, Americans of color, American women who’ve changed their names after getting married or divorced, and rural Americans from registering to vote — potentially silencing 21 million voices in our democracy.**
No passport? Birth certificate with an old name? No time to drive hours to an election office? You could be unable to vote.
The legislation would also compel problematic voter purges, functionally end mail-in and online voter registration as well as third-party registration drives, and upend automatic voter registration.
**This harmful bill is the latest in an onslaught of new restrictive legislation, disinformation, and coordinated attacks on our elections and our democracy.**
[**And we need your help as we fight back. **The SAVE Act would especially target:**
* Black and Latino voters, who disproportionately register to vote through third-party registration efforts
* Young voters, who are less likely to have the forms of ID required by the bill
* As many as 69 million women nationwide who’ve changed their names and can’t use their birth certificate to prove their citizenship

**We’re calling the SAVE Act what it is: an attempt to legalize voter suppression.**
While disproportionately hurting voters of color, the legislation also stokes racial prejudice and discriminatory fears of unwanted individuals voting. Republicans claim they need to pass this bill to prevent people who aren’t citizens from voting in federal elections — _which is already against the law. _
Under this legislation, we could see mass voter purges used to prevent access to the ballot box. Furthermore, the SAVE Act does not require voters to be notified before they are removed from voting rolls — rolling back one of the essential protections of the National Voter Registration Act.
**The right to vote is fundamental to our democracy. Our elected officials should be working to protect this right, not restrict it.**
**So we’re rallying Americans to tell their lawmakers to vote NO on the SAVE Act, and we’ll continue working to prevent voter suppression.**

clean_body: “This is an attempt to destroy American democracy as we know it.” | | | “It’s the most extraordinary attack on voting rights in American history...This is an attempt to destroy American democracy as we know it.” That’s a quote from Sean Wilentz, an American history professor at Princeton. He spoke to Democracy Docket about the SAVE Act, which could disenfranchise over 21 million Americans — and which just passed the House of Representatives. It should really be called the Save Politicians Act — a desperate effort to rig the rules, block millions from voting (especially low-income Americans, seniors, rural voters, and people of color), and dodge accountability at the ballot box. We have already mobilized over 200,000 Americans to contact their U.S. Senators and demand a NO vote on the SAVE Act. I’m asking if we can count on you to keep supporting our fight for the freedom to vote. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Keep reading for more information on how the SAVE Act is an appalling attack on voting rights, and how we’re fighting back. Thank you, Lauren Groh-Wargo Fair Fight Action CEO = \----------Forwarded Message---------- Date: April 9, 2025 From: Fair Fight Action Subject: The most dangerous voter suppression bill yet ALERT: the House of Representatives is about to vote on the most dangerous voter suppression bill we’ve seen yet, and millions could be disenfranchised. The SAVE Act would unnecessarily force all Americans to prove their citizenship in person — with documents like a passport or birth certificate — every time they register to vote or change their registration, even if you move. This would disproportionately keep eligible young Americans, low-income Americans, Americans of color, American women who’ve changed their names after getting married or divorced, and rural Americans from registering to vote — potentially silencing 21 million voices in our democracy. No passport? Birth certificate with an old name? No time to drive hours to an election office? You could be unable to vote. The legislation would also compel problematic voter purges, functionally end mail-in and online voter registration as well as third-party registration drives, and upend automatic voter registration. This harmful bill is the latest in an onslaught of new restrictive legislation, disinformation, and coordinated attacks on our elections and our democracy. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- The SAVE Act would especially target: Black and Latino voters, who disproportionately register to vote through third-party registration efforts Young voters, who are less likely to have the forms of ID required by the bill As many as 69 million women nationwide who’ve changed their names and can’t use their birth certificate to prove their citizenship We’re calling the SAVE Act what it is: an attempt to legalize voter suppression. While disproportionately hurting voters of color, the legislation also stokes racial prejudice and discriminatory fears of unwanted individuals voting. Republicans claim they need to pass this bill to prevent people who aren’t citizens from voting in federal elections — which is already against the law. Under this legislation, we could see mass voter purges used to prevent access to the ballot box. Furthermore, the SAVE Act does not require voters to be notified before they are removed from voting rolls — rolling back one of the essential protections of the National Voter Registration Act. The right to vote is fundamental to our democracy. Our elected officials should be working to protect this right, not restrict it. So we’re rallying Americans to tell their lawmakers to vote NO on the SAVE Act, and we’ll continue working to prevent voter suppression. = We’re grateful for your commitment. The Fair Fight Action Team = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: David Hogg
subject: I just turned 25 — here’s my birthday wish
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
The best way to celebrate? Elect more young leaders.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250412-1&t=1&akid=1974%2E587540%2EPw3rs5)
Guess what, Peter — I just turned 25!
It’s been an incredible week, and I’m truly grateful to everyone who reached out to celebrate with me. It means a lot to be surrounded by friends, family, and this powerful movement we’re building together.
To be honest, I don’t need any gifts or cards this year. I’ve got something else in mind. Something that will actually make a difference.
Since we launched **Leaders We Deserve,** we’ve been working around the clock to build a powerful, grassroots-funded organization dedicated to electing the next generation of leaders.
**We need MORE Millennials and Gen Z voices in the rooms where decisions are made — and with YOUR help, we’re making that happen.**
The work we’re doing together means everything to me, and I can’t think of a better way to mark my birthday than seeing people like you step up and join this fight.
So if you’re looking for a way to fight back, to invest in our future, and to show what this movement is made of, this is our moment to show our strength. **[Peter, will you pitch in $25 now to join our movement and fight for our future?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250412-1?refcode=em20250412-1974&amount=25&refcode2=1974_587540_Pw3rs5&akid=1974%2E587540%2EPw3rs5)**
**[Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250412-1?amount=25&refcode=em20250412-1974&refcode2=1974_587540_Pw3rs5&akid=1974%2E587540%2EPw3rs5)**
Together, we’re going to take the energy of this moment and turn it into real political power. And I can’t imagine a better way to celebrate 25 than with **_YOU_** in this fight.
Thank you for everything, truly.
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
P.S. We are building a lasting movement together that is bigger than any one election. [**Can you commit to a $25 monthly donation to power our work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250412-1?refcode=em20250412-1974&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=1974_587540_Pw3rs5&akid=1974%2E587540%2EPw3rs5)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250412-1?refcode=em20250412-1974&amount=25&refcode2=1974_587540_Pw3rs5&akid=1974%2E587540%2EPw3rs5)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250412-1&t=2&refcode2=1974_587540_Pw3rs5&akid=1974%2E587540%2EPw3rs5)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1974%2E587540%2EPw3rs5)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)

name: COURIER Newsroom
subject: Trump is a chaotic, incompetent mess. When will the legacy media say it?
body:
This week’s stock market dive and tariff debacle exposed Donald Trump—again—as a chaotic, dishonest, and fundamentally incompetent person.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105709550/539138921/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGI2OTE2ZDAtYWUxNy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DS1e2wyUNY4zNLemixWC-GAiQ_SEmM8q7xVP4_jPL28=&emci=1c7b9026-fb16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8b6916d0-ae17-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14016711)

Peter,
This week’s stock market dive and tariff debacle exposed Donald Trump—again—as a chaotic, dishonest, and fundamentally incompetent person.
And yes, some in the legacy media acknowledged the damage. But it’s not just what they report—it’s how they report it. Even when they’re critical, they keep sane-washing Trump, always leaving open the possibility that his constant bullshit is part of some calculated, coherent strategy.
**Trump has no clothes. So when will the legacy media say it?**
[**Please donate today and help COURIER build an independent media network that tells the truth about Donald Trump—and the damage he’s doing to our country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105709553/539138924/-1581427288?refcode=20250412_Trump_Chaos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGI2OTE2ZDAtYWUxNy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DS1e2wyUNY4zNLemixWC-GAiQ_SEmM8q7xVP4_jPL28=)
After the bleach cures for COVID, the “immigrants eating pets” tirade in Springfield, the stolen election lies, and now a disastrous economic policy that reads like it was drafted by ChatGPT—we’re still seeing headlines like:
* **“Will Trump’s tariff policy pay off?”** — _CNN Business_
* **“Trump’s bold trade move shakes markets”** — _Bloomberg_
* **“Trump’s hardball economic strategy: risky, but potentially effective”** — _CBS News_

This kind of coverage gives the illusion that we might be watching a master negotiator executing a plan—when in reality, we’re seeing a guy bluff through a crisis so he can get back to the golf course while the country burns around him.
One day, the tariffs are a negotiating tool. The next, they’re about national security. Then fentanyl. Then inflation. Then back to China. None of it makes sense—and still, the press acts like it might be chess, when it’s really blackjack with a guy yelling “hit me” at 21.
Remember how they treated Kamala Harris in 2024?
* **“Scripted”** – _CNN_ and _NYT_ described Harris’s campaign as tightly controlled, emphasizing prepared remarks over unscripted moments.
* **“Avoiding the press”** – _NBC_ and _Axios_ noted that Harris limited interviews and press conferences during key stretches of the campaign.
* **“Lacking depth”** – _CBS_ and _NYT_ reported that Harris offered few detailed policy plans, prompting critiques about clarity and specificity.

Story after story dissected what she hadn’t said, how few interviews she’d done, what she failed to spell out—even while Trump rambled about enemies and speculated about Arnold Palmer’s genitalia.
**It seems like ancient history now, but the truth is: that double standard helped put Trump back in power.**
And now that he’s back, it’s only getting worse.
He’s dismantling the government. Sabotaging the economy. Threatening the press. Weaponizing lawsuits. And the legacy media? They’re folding.
* _The Washington Post_ gutted its editorial board after pulling its endorsement of Harris.
* _CBS_ and _ABC_ News have paid—or are preparing to pay—Trump millions to settle bogus defamation suits.
* _CNN_ pushed out longtime anchor Jim Acosta because Trump didn’t like him.

He’s not just testing the free press. He’s breaking it.
**That’s why COURIER exists.**
We don’t “both sides” fascism. We don’t retreat in the face of threats. And we don’t sanitize propaganda for clicks.
We tell the truth—on TikTok, on Instagram, in inboxes, and in 11 battleground states—because someone has to.
**[If you believe in fearless, independent journalism that fights back, chip in $25 or whatever you can right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105709555/539138926/-1581427288?refcode=20250412_Trump_Chaos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGI2OTE2ZDAtYWUxNy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DS1e2wyUNY4zNLemixWC-GAiQ_SEmM8q7xVP4_jPL28=)**
**[Chip in now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105709559/539138929/-1581427288?refcode=20250412_Trump_Chaos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGI2OTE2ZDAtYWUxNy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DS1e2wyUNY4zNLemixWC-GAiQ_SEmM8q7xVP4_jPL28=)**
We can’t count on legacy outlets to tell the Truth about Trump. But we CAN count on you.
In solidarity,
The COURIER Team

**[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XCUEQN0BTUWWQ1xBmQeS9g2?unsubscribedata=nNRLZ%2Bt%2FD5zQMBlYqZM26fgc7i7SLX%2BKmR0vrd0b6Bs%2ByopFyWtWTPC5LGyqcjqIJX5ZcTmVsUmNSARlbPFAmdwoiFsxkNq7DHLhmcdMX4%2FxcavBdNZcSmWZbr1mkIPyiVEGDfjRycgCBi4%2BOahLqN2Lf8jPv9yWViCcDeHlJriExzcGE1o2x6dZ0CknFa8pC32lvYnFk5gpPhiZvuZQTZsMxl3GdHHvZqW3O7rSljtwEazXPf5ikv4KCekssgk%2BX7090Yn9G1VMB0F3WtpA0XsLpPPZIFN13Ev2h%2Br6BMWOVOVZYpBnljX2scOEsaD61ZtGm3aDtFHRHnV5gUuXegW0b6u5cpC%2BRQxolNFPOSN1Su%2F8RqmG%2FFGwQ55GyihUrsJ9ptuuWzg04n%2Bg6KEAUzH12HZukxCOvkDRy1T4uIKfx3Sh22nQeJl6cv46vdPr)**

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: Raised by my Mamaw
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1209e7f0006746d9b4c1db530bd0fd57&_e=C7uufeXF4dN5cIAe8g_vB0XDoyzYBe7Bxte4OjCtDR40geez8YXVASTA7zkO7FA5WBN2G6w3TCixLe3CnSTue5a8bYM-nvkY6ADrkozj3L88og3VLpLMOsGj8HL2aOFdgAPJB8yqPmtX9xu4ROP053MEVRrkp6S1f5-wuvtfQU22IlvnCBjqlkex2fggJswsLJHjvsKMY35u7A4MLszVGJX5SaipMScPVArJ0mopWvyLaqvVv3wTx_oVGqEtFstXTf-We6j9VF0TZUT_YrhgvblYePiU22_9HVUDsbC3NJQ46lxMRR5EEoAZg70GsUhhWWSM19kBSQYLlW2Z6rVjLwjUdtnhBbPR7z0lK4cCOynXAFxr5Fuy9WfJwp9aewkHH2Khbc1nvVQ3ViXyOrT60w%3D%3D "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1209e7f0006746d9b4c1db530bd0fd57&_e=C7uufeXF4dN5cIAe8g_vB0XDoyzYBe7Bxte4OjCtDR40geez8YXVASTA7zkO7FA5WBN2G6w3TCixLe3CnSTue5a8bYM-nvkY6ADrkozj3L88og3VLpLMOsGj8HL2aOFdgAPJB8yqPmtX9xu4ROP053MEVRrkp6S1f5-wuvtfQU22IlvnCBjqlkex2fggJswsLJHjvsKMY35u7A4MLszVGJX5SaipMScPVArJ0mopWvzfLuiKXpSEP--ROVAt8aKTq1tDPhfbh3LWnfdUaxDz1hVQ8K0vMyfUXWm1_6aE3vmPjzRr09rovDieYFB3Whbkf_Vsg1dsMN-iDJvFPVwzrcfaXnJkM_g8_v99a9fZQPgQUYQZTDgoQvrvEjZEaZh4DXCstsBuid88V2C7e-3p_A%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1209e7f0006746d9b4c1db530bd0fd57&_e=C7uufeXF4dN5cIAe8g_vB0XDoyzYBe7Bxte4OjCtDR40geez8YXVASTA7zkO7FA5WBN2G6w3TCixLe3CnSTue5a8bYM-nvkY6ADrkozj3L88og3VLpLMOsGj8HL2aOFdgAPJB8yqPmtX9xu4ROP053MEVRrkp6S1f5-wuvtfQU22IlvnCBjqlkex2fggJswsLJHjvsKMY35u7A4MLszVGJX5SaipMScPVArJ0mopWvz4erf7Jr-RLx_VcVocWq053yozA1daPUPQ2hgcbwfb04Gj8rhrZc42DW3jU_aRu2_TXQUqzHx-KmNuD-9uq8B0UGUjaGGGiM7M--HeoJ_V6lDWUEdT_-zCNHs1Pj7Q1GQRoyjgEurlW-Bgtq_qqo3LstoophOtgH9h83IFRLLIRA%3D%3D "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1209e7f0006746d9b4c1db530bd0fd57&_e=C7uufeXF4dN5cIAe8g_vB0XDoyzYBe7Bxte4OjCtDR40geez8YXVASTA7zkO7FA5WBN2G6w3TCixLe3CnSTue5a8bYM-nvkY6ADrkozj3L88og3VLpLMOsGj8HL2aOFdgAPJB8yqPmtX9xu4ROP053MEVRrkp6S1f5-wuvtfQU22IlvnCBjqlkex2fggJswsLJHjvsKMY35u7A4MLszVGJX5SaipMScPVArJ0mopWvwnV5jjuilKWVMpCeJc2pw434pumhHSvetWD3hknsweu-GAXYMRGl33S55MtaiJ5d0uvJlbcaGr6e9ba7EXDmjCKxGP48XHx5NN1diAx9ISLLnArGyHLu30YzR7IOmYxUJoblDI6zQzJAWzL0a0qaSuh36yrNyAhIKtFpl-Q91zKw%3D%3D "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1209e7f0006746d9b4c1db530bd0fd57&_e=C7uufeXF4dN5cIAe8g_vB0XDoyzYBe7Bxte4OjCtDR40geez8YXVASTA7zkO7FA5WBN2G6w3TCixLe3CnSTue5a8bYM-nvkY6ADrkozj3L88og3VLpLMOsGj8HL2aOFdgAPJB8yqPmtX9xu4ROP053MEVRrkp6S1f5-wuvtfQU22IlvnCBjqlkex2fggJswsLJHjvsKMY35u7A4MLszVGJX5SaipMScPVArJ0mopWvxHcT4NS20pCyPI5ELOOXTzxeOciVQMaBmD6g5ndkGK5FmZigF5fzk3kJb9pGLwErk-W-yppp-CNYNofXXtw6PtocsjCwVTDVn4qxlFea--uG7VcnDQ5xE3h_MabJWAUo0DFhCMmHg4tgj3j1BV3AT19vxJIl8OwSqIXzIf6FAeNQ%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1209e7f0006746d9b4c1db530bd0fd57&_e=C7uufeXF4dN5cIAe8g_vB0XDoyzYBe7Bxte4OjCtDR40geez8YXVASTA7zkO7FA5WBN2G6w3TCixLe3CnSTue5a8bYM-nvkY6ADrkozj3L88og3VLpLMOsGj8HL2aOFdgAPJB8yqPmtX9xu4ROP053MEVRrkp6S1f5-wuvtfQU22IlvnCBjqlkex2fggJswsLJHjvsKMY35u7A4MLszVGJX5SaipMScPVArJ0mopWvzeQQ7KH0k3vwIfeOXukfKOnpb3FffTH5yQtyxjOqukgDtWpCeeMzJq43dBJidbAjYclx985n7Xs2PlX_PsSXxPrAr5tyF6d9Ir3JBl5AqXYf6DT72DSvPuDLW_fVE69pM0Sb7SVjMAirR4gYchbh5boOk_a4QYgPQ6wP0yK7H6Ow%3D%3D "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1209e7f0006746d9b4c1db530bd0fd57&_e=C7uufeXF4dN5cIAe8g_vB0XDoyzYBe7Bxte4OjCtDR40geez8YXVASTA7zkO7FA5WBN2G6w3TCixLe3CnSTue5a8bYM-nvkY6ADrkozj3L88og3VLpLMOsGj8HL2aOFdgAPJB8yqPmtX9xu4ROP053MEVRrkp6S1f5-wuvtfQU22IlvnCBjqlkex2fggJswsLJHjvsKMY35u7A4MLszVGJX5SaipMScPVArJ0mopWvwjaSmvZ1W9f06s7F7EoaLL9_1gjgCtoJ8ne2jnECFMhs1j-liTySxSf48HN3yZw_MkRO_fx5nsljpc2KjMH6kZegrJnXuWwwNdxEgdovlBMwLGlNJH9raifHd1GfO5geo8qlj-eZImqQ4Osp3a4WLx6IRskr038G9cVVuhTjvV9g%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1209e7f0006746d9b4c1db530bd0fd57&_e=C7uufeXF4dN5cIAe8g_vB0XDoyzYBe7Bxte4OjCtDR7Fy8kNabk3n_FsFpt8y7CSDHO-nrSIAz60bNZFsoP1fv-JY6xWqvK-hRi3ceAWSksyFB1E00CQHDoq4EF_TnraSWs9MF2DnUqfHJ8-9q_TUuLrwxUUSjqwXZbgStue7mWvvfB9ftAQ9BxJqqJmzzwIefQymcuB0FuOrvqPdsXXRCvTRgPWqaZqcWhYQ3QAyf2DpD0AfTmEx-8s2qyr_Lbx9rHbEymzZ74FIogXEb3pkWuZvMlvgCbhbHxfaIXXcvqbBxenYAPDwAqhZuCuW4-qatYt-4Q2BAtNaYXQoZf2JxzmXQIbvMHGaxmN7fR7AsBN1ZFywB1U9XUd2NnIiSd7BYoXB9N_gbgE2W0eeYrNr9Do8xzsFy3sEtkPPji7Zm0%3D "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1209e7f0006746d9b4c1db530bd0fd57&_e=C7uufeXF4dN5cIAe8g_vB0XDoyzYBe7Bxte4OjCtDR7Fy8kNabk3n_FsFpt8y7CSDHO-nrSIAz60bNZFsoP1fv-JY6xWqvK-hRi3ceAWSksyFB1E00CQHDoq4EF_TnraSWs9MF2DnUqfHJ8-9q_TUuLrwxUUSjqwXZbgStue7mWvvfB9ftAQ9BxJqqJmzzwIefQymcuB0FuOrvqPdsXXRCvTRgPWqaZqcWhYQ3QAyf2DpD0AfTmEx-8s2qyr_LbxGwCve1IAZOSNoEJlXfNNpwKcA-o13MgKSNwP21JoB__1b_n29ZP5QQGP1-Z5vbcSu3o2yWDf3S1ViC2tpOwoMnKI7Ak2CmdY--ABdSTz6g4uE0hDsBxhPkF0WJ1C915YSY0emfwSW4N-8AXvphq-FjVsjN-DBykLq8GXfSdY77M%3D "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world – warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=0bd532931ae642c1967b2fc152885d45&_e=_HATLtOdqHivLi-cyYTLUsV-qFKpBToOOPr-HqfxBvcAcl5ZjFb8P4U4NOfucN47soUZgBsig2ODKlLWSXQQE5j-t6cwTzqOrIbHDq2Q9yk-Xln9hAWB_cxk_W_SwAqoj0w70rIExsAL7Ykq6YU5AZ40OTY5h8CaKyaKRNdzNzbyqXbsFvCyrfEleR34eGYx1cd23D9mk6mjbLSWJkBvEzg8e2l7CQhQg9k2y4tMwaQt6FozGlwbOZOOvKFkpFXPi5eHeq-NnRza_c77RUbC_A0_JfHDx2Dbsn3y83p4cxapLWILbIDotO8l9Hm9k4O81OUWReUp5GYpZNoOnoDd8u_t0FBGHEetjOkwXn9eyryxMwcN7AYkF1NUdykBGQgt "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=0bd532931ae642c1967b2fc152885d45&_e=_HATLtOdqHivLi-cyYTLUsV-qFKpBToOOPr-HqfxBvcAcl5ZjFb8P4U4NOfucN47soUZgBsig2ODKlLWSXQQE5j-t6cwTzqOrIbHDq2Q9yk-Xln9hAWB_cxk_W_SwAqoj0w70rIExsAL7Ykq6YU5AZ40OTY5h8CaKyaKRNdzNzbyqXbsFvCyrfEleR34eGYx1cd23D9mk6mjbLSWJkBvE5mEEhtsiJkv_GMkkikgdMCVOS-BnPyb3QdK3QoN3lQkOBkkAk4P-0DAU4-DZDNTFnIQGMIkG4GdP-RfpC7EWvli9kC3QBYAzFGVvNYHnPqvTnqig-gTLzHR3lArrzEkIqrywCvs9QJCxH7KFHHxPQatcC6beLoWUI0fP4DgakaZ "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=0bd532931ae642c1967b2fc152885d45&_e=_HATLtOdqHivLi-cyYTLUsV-qFKpBToOOPr-HqfxBvcAcl5ZjFb8P4U4NOfucN47soUZgBsig2ODKlLWSXQQE5j-t6cwTzqOrIbHDq2Q9yk-Xln9hAWB_cxk_W_SwAqoj0w70rIExsAL7Ykq6YU5AZ40OTY5h8CaKyaKRNdzNzbyqXbsFvCyrfEleR34eGYx1cd23D9mk6mjbLSWJkBvExlWBbkXFjMrEcyV_hCLK81IwPSDz9c49inGJbhZ7l7fV_HW6KyAT0KPvrURz20PLrJeJ61_Y3XCmTInPVBk2u8tzj61JnXwSJPsbJ_4Hn1cA9WNxsGjEC99K2gk-jHWlhIj4d3FMUKW6WBDz1FNDhzqLouZYh7SaNEGZA9qZeHf "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=0bd532931ae642c1967b2fc152885d45&_e=_HATLtOdqHivLi-cyYTLUsV-qFKpBToOOPr-HqfxBvcAcl5ZjFb8P4U4NOfucN47soUZgBsig2ODKlLWSXQQE5j-t6cwTzqOrIbHDq2Q9yk-Xln9hAWB_cxk_W_SwAqoj0w70rIExsAL7Ykq6YU5AZ40OTY5h8CaKyaKRNdzNzbyqXbsFvCyrfEleR34eGYx1cd23D9mk6mjbLSWJkBvEwTd1Yau9uDLrD-HJgBPyM2qzDYiu182h-ftkzIHo0Fl4cmpjHKAtliiXK6UfR1rZdyDOuaB_hgboShDOT21SkTfMoXaLv7r1W3B1zdcyrmgU8gJ9E1X5Jjhq2TKx_F7oTtcGDm8Ok3damgy7V1bmuQfbLbbB7vd0NTVwoVcLTvH "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=0bd532931ae642c1967b2fc152885d45&_e=_HATLtOdqHivLi-cyYTLUsV-qFKpBToOOPr-HqfxBvcAcl5ZjFb8P4U4NOfucN47soUZgBsig2ODKlLWSXQQE5j-t6cwTzqOrIbHDq2Q9yk-Xln9hAWB_cxk_W_SwAqoj0w70rIExsAL7Ykq6YU5AZ40OTY5h8CaKyaKRNdzNzbyqXbsFvCyrfEleR34eGYx1cd23D9mk6mjbLSWJkBvExCJdZpdteJfF2hvHtzENPfjgviZtm24Uq0dmiMfUwqSmZMKzcUY8lFgSWji8ch2qvmmL5eYmwOY6eNzeQ_uNvn2ya97-n4Yf54ltPRZxFbLt0kLXsUTZsswfryPYlj7icgO6ghWEjUHHd1wh4tBZP-3x4lyWCw4yJLBB_pF0wvV "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=0bd532931ae642c1967b2fc152885d45&_e=_HATLtOdqHivLi-cyYTLUsV-qFKpBToOOPr-HqfxBvcAcl5ZjFb8P4U4NOfucN47soUZgBsig2ODKlLWSXQQE5j-t6cwTzqOrIbHDq2Q9yk-Xln9hAWB_cxk_W_SwAqoj0w70rIExsAL7Ykq6YU5AZ40OTY5h8CaKyaKRNdzNzbyqXbsFvCyrfEleR34eGYx1cd23D9mk6mjbLSWJkBvE3UlY0tt4Ll2IPVtkG8pb7fgmRnWnIl68ttugqh5GJvxw6qaFYg41bejSoExWW0UwgHe71xZtl549R8Ao_IiOlmzahPePQvEzKtfvzIgem1gFnEcs_Xu2DTgav764JNBk67E-dfk3-4I0oX_w4ZH_wL5jNmYDWdQbs-yjfd3-CTi "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=0bd532931ae642c1967b2fc152885d45&_e=_HATLtOdqHivLi-cyYTLUsV-qFKpBToOOPr-HqfxBvcAcl5ZjFb8P4U4NOfucN47soUZgBsig2ODKlLWSXQQE5j-t6cwTzqOrIbHDq2Q9yk-Xln9hAWB_cxk_W_SwAqoj0w70rIExsAL7Ykq6YU5AZ40OTY5h8CaKyaKRNdzNzbyqXbsFvCyrfEleR34eGYx1cd23D9mk6mjbLSWJkBvEyK053E9gPWj0FkhTvRnSVyHyHBAL3chUZxpjtetVGXM-hNuUgiQ4_kURvLxIsMCfGoBBindeGLyYiM9nvVVWkFltMB3mi2XlgzLx3MteVnR2SA_1du7cudGM8XiQtMGb95V8olPp26Gfj3z1fwclCUKf_QvtthJlMkGoRFvwsGj "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=0bd532931ae642c1967b2fc152885d45&_e=_HATLtOdqHivLi-cyYTLUsV-qFKpBToOOPr-HqfxBveY9n7YUleGxKKMKAIwXxWFGgdsTxI9A-ip6dR_pYfv_SMt5TdH8_cfk8kVJzP7ZWT9E1Bxn6vnpf3OrYJvK9VhzO7bmIO1ZRwd4RxhRfffqp3WKJr9x_OyHvZotiaMT2WnfYXVygSbTKZB-uqojX70PpEdTh1-R-4SwOa57jYZDZuxT0WFFTsdc5B7AZoAIlFl6o6XD3byMCCAIBCP010xFQ0xOqi8B3UfqefmaJPKfFFduVA2HRblOP56GwodBXX3B18G-6-Ig5x6VxWi4p2mzpQjp8pIqCXh3m24LxddUWkvutlFJOwAVyZEMM5sCpT5IFWzla7aGqmr5gcsXoaTHoA87yqStZRtRYy6tgZ7CA%3D%3D "First 100 Day Survey")

But not exactly how you might think. It comes down to opportunities missed because you aren’t able to get into shooting position quick enough. If you’ve never used one of these, it is a With the control you get and the variety of holds you can utilize with a front grip, you can get on target way faster...

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Honor Veterans with the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=49b0295cda3c49dfbf39109e7e2e3def&_e=r6NjtLjT735A_2xO5SN0QaLODYd5n6Z4vANWT5nl-YRP970XSTh64nftW6sT4RQ0Rn5wB4KLvSc5vjUcHYJo0Ucpo47tcZzJaTaerEb9Ko-LXVyLouwSmvB_FRgMBzlx6I2TAQhrb4nyD3jbYX9m6lNPNbmUgW9wqSNGwoK6wsz7mPPoRA-kvwPMO3tz83AttCDOquMaQndED3kLN1xhoQoKvUYt-IwMirEYgaMV24MkO0nbKsnrJ6kNDygcTMDa4mZNO-n2bR-7Yk1za9QoRriQDMAZxJnwNE7KRzxP6Bsmmwg125DyJWbUvvP_jL-_)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=49b0295cda3c49dfbf39109e7e2e3def&_e=r6NjtLjT735A_2xO5SN0QaLODYd5n6Z4vANWT5nl-YRP970XSTh64nftW6sT4RQ0Rn5wB4KLvSc5vjUcHYJo0Ucpo47tcZzJaTaerEb9Ko-LXVyLouwSmvB_FRgMBzlx6I2TAQhrb4nyD3jbYX9m6lNPNbmUgW9wqSNGwoK6wszb9a5kEo7E7215a1c90SGSxOtqPyASD_w6VJwu8BQMEQtgkzX3ninF-zthyHiH9zNBE6IX5ezCmbRI3UMSOBj5-0jYGA8OmutX9R2avvxvsrNEsv3dKFUt_vcEqgekUEnn2_MOPnlQc9FJsfgJNoKU)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=49b0295cda3c49dfbf39109e7e2e3def&_e=r6NjtLjT735A_2xO5SN0QaLODYd5n6Z4vANWT5nl-YRP970XSTh64nftW6sT4RQ0Rn5wB4KLvSc5vjUcHYJo0Ucpo47tcZzJaTaerEb9Ko-LXVyLouwSmvB_FRgMBzlx6I2TAQhrb4nyD3jbYX9m6lNPNbmUgW9wqSNGwoK6wsw5RcHt5QvS12AAEZ4_j4-MC0KR7l9nE6YguaTaYpLO1TRdtgcIl9niQ_w_DvIK7ujGhpz823v_B2qx7pV-Nm7rbZonuyospmOj_rY8DF6Gd_vf2T88ZXlADVwEeJBTTlGyjqCUvei01BehNr-3FUAB)
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=49b0295cda3c49dfbf39109e7e2e3def&_e=r6NjtLjT735A_2xO5SN0QaLODYd5n6Z4vANWT5nl-YRP970XSTh64nftW6sT4RQ0Rn5wB4KLvSc5vjUcHYJo0Ucpo47tcZzJaTaerEb9Ko-LXVyLouwSmvB_FRgMBzlx6I2TAQhrb4nyD3jbYX9m6lNPNbmUgW9wqSNGwoK6wsy5fyD3Kj7Tqb9BGx46PCNXLHZZmlEwH2hucUL520h_mrGdFtNggf-y7ucqdXWQPCXtMI1mm7LoKjOp75WnvD2Iude8cJmUc8BG2YLlhTBQgq63i0uwa3BYDTyy-Td7bMnx5wHTJK6BMW6dJnwj7W58)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=49b0295cda3c49dfbf39109e7e2e3def&_e=r6NjtLjT735A_2xO5SN0QaLODYd5n6Z4vANWT5nl-YRP970XSTh64nftW6sT4RQ0TiMV5m79aII2Lkf0XDsdLUUssHJwLcqEFO21S0SORfZpGQy5hFxHLFAWfmeGxDRKswnMoRaOTFaF83I2fOge9JR_1sJ9q0tf61K9dxJlylVZwxWvnh6uFi7I7a3q2m_q40SiIlxZmxlNT2VAiRf1N1nAkCnfJWknTmb_wQorG0iPDUoLhjM9YV8toq12mqLUu3B-x9FlMd2ycYpyhEK5riCBtl1UFJuFhkOZhuXAQKo%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=49b0295cda3c49dfbf39109e7e2e3def&_e=r6NjtLjT735A_2xO5SN0QaLODYd5n6Z4vANWT5nl-YRP970XSTh64nftW6sT4RQ0Rn5wB4KLvSc5vjUcHYJo0Ucpo47tcZzJaTaerEb9Ko-LXVyLouwSmvB_FRgMBzlx6I2TAQhrb4nyD3jbYX9m6lNPNbmUgW9wqSNGwoK6wswYtgNKpdRhlIamKxofysc2CdUQFA9q01R3tyka7Vg1s-LpfF3NbRDvqeJXIv6qx80e09-mWGRzBjVlHPEznmK2uZU-AqSQZEovUCCqp8_xv2aKlZeZTNk56DAwoDijB4mjT-92qFYI6MeZGKmuWj29) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=49b0295cda3c49dfbf39109e7e2e3def&_e=r6NjtLjT735A_2xO5SN0QaLODYd5n6Z4vANWT5nl-YRP970XSTh64nftW6sT4RQ0Rn5wB4KLvSc5vjUcHYJo0Ucpo47tcZzJaTaerEb9Ko-LXVyLouwSmvB_FRgMBzlx6I2TAQhrb4nyD3jbYX9m6lNPNbmUgW9wqSNGwoK6wszA18XtSFkC7zXk8ruj7CkXXoOK1sME5LNaaqLQiH87hscl9uaKcew3icpRy7SisO6eBzIBJ-q0uni5W_YqZV9Xrx1h1Kq09CYBM9_PKOPM_TtScux7AufUzQNMn5cFINFlCBiyG_o3b3Bd9FGKvFoD)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=49b0295cda3c49dfbf39109e7e2e3def&_e=r6NjtLjT735A_2xO5SN0QaLODYd5n6Z4vANWT5nl-YRP970XSTh64nftW6sT4RQ0Rn5wB4KLvSc5vjUcHYJo0Ucpo47tcZzJaTaerEb9Ko-LXVyLouwSmvB_FRgMBzlx6I2TAQhrb4nyD3jbYX9m6lNPNbmUgW9wqSNGwoK6wsycpf5vhoPsNozv5rTYoOXNUzlkZSZSh_Lj1GPPMB5IYfXm8FY2BMg6ucri2PhAexnuRqQln_q9AVmOSyQlLJAdfBkoc3k98xcnPlrhz8K8bR0GvGLiev-bBe-LLUWW-vP8KyNscIm-SfcKnCqagNyG)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=49b0295cda3c49dfbf39109e7e2e3def&_e=r6NjtLjT735A_2xO5SN0QaLODYd5n6Z4vANWT5nl-YRP970XSTh64nftW6sT4RQ0Rn5wB4KLvSc5vjUcHYJo0Ucpo47tcZzJaTaerEb9Ko-LXVyLouwSmvB_FRgMBzlx6I2TAQhrb4nyD3jbYX9m6lNPNbmUgW9wqSNGwoK6wsyVP_nLF4VWgVDvHiQbBsoNuHOVVZOfRYLzKGR7gnUt94iMX0yygsrwtAqeJx1hTXwB5JmBeAhBmL6m1GMJ9r2UvPYoZmAA5dyCwSIzc_AqS4xNZUWkftuFOBBL5NbEiSX8cvjz3k6a7EkUQHZYTDe_)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=49b0295cda3c49dfbf39109e7e2e3def&_e=r6NjtLjT735A_2xO5SN0QaLODYd5n6Z4vANWT5nl-YRP970XSTh64nftW6sT4RQ0Rn5wB4KLvSc5vjUcHYJo0Ucpo47tcZzJaTaerEb9Ko-LXVyLouwSmvB_FRgMBzlx6I2TAQhrb4nyD3jbYX9m6lNPNbmUgW9wqSNGwoK6wsxf0gJY0BcmIGAgeEcZ7G_16ncvwUtL4ghQFrmf7tkcA2CIVAq5Fxl0H4s8kJIV05iJMNmVuR_CxOis49dygaU_YqcyI2x6j0wE2FPl95v0w2yQtDGQUH5HaBeRtqLHt8Q1wIcQzGr4lXmGU1U2GEw7)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center

subject: what else can we say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:

**By Rudy Giuliani**
Listen up, America. For too long, we've let China walk all over us, and now it's time to put a stop to it. President Donald J. Trump, a man who's never backed down from a fight in his life, has slapped bold new tariffs on China--a country that's been antagonizing us, stealing our ideas, and undercutting our hardworking entrepreneurs like they're some kind of global piñata. This isn't just policy; it's a wake-up call. It's Trump standing tall, saying, "No more!" to a nation that's been fleecing us while we sleep. And I'm here to tell you why every red-blooded American should be cheering him on.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..3Rtsj1eoLPh56tss7eoTrRvLV5YG5cc6lE4UoPLksmc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161179058)
Let's talk straight. China's been ripping off our intellectual property for years--our patents, our designs, our innovations. You name it, they've stolen it. American inventors, the backbone of our economy, pour their hearts and souls into creating something new, something groundbreaking, only to watch Chinese knockoffs flood the market at cut-rate prices. These copycat products aren't just cheap; they're a direct assault on American creativity. Our entrepreneurs can't compete when China's playing dirty, selling stolen goods to the world while laughing all the way to the bank. It's not a level playing field--it's a slaughter.
President Trump sees this for what it is: economic warfare. His tariff hike on China is a gut punch to their cheating ways, and it's about time. These tariffs aren't just numbers on a page; they're a message that America's done playing the fool. By raising the cost of China's cheap, stolen goods, Trump's giving our businesses a fighting chance to compete in global commerce. This isn't about protectionism; it's about fairness. It's about making sure American companies aren't neutered by a regime that doesn't play by the rules. Trump's standing up to the bully, and that's what a real leader does.
_**A brief message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_

Now, let's get to the ugly truth about how China keeps their prices so low. It's not magic--it's misery. Their factories are sweatshops, plain and simple. Workers toil in inhumane conditions, slaving away for pennies in environments that'd make your stomach turn. Long hours, no breaks, no dignity--just relentless grind to churn out products at rock-bottom costs. And the Chinese government? They're not just complicit; they're cheering it on. They let these profitable sweatshops crush the spirit of their own people, all to undercut American workers and dominate the market. It's a disgrace, and it's high time we stopped funding it.
Here's where the hypocrisy comes in, and it burns me up. You've got these woke liberals, always preaching about human rights, waving their rainbow flags, and crying crocodile tears over injustice. But when President Trump takes a stand to hit China where it hurts--right in their sweatshop profits--they're nowhere to be found. Worse, they're against him! They'll scream about fairness and compassion, but when it comes to defunding China's brutal factories and bringing jobs back to American workers, they're silent. Why? Because they'd rather cozy up to globalism than admit Trump's right. They don't care about the American worker trying to feed his family, or the Chinese worker trapped in a sweatshop. They just want cheap iphones to cry about Trump on TikTok with.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..3Rtsj1eoLPh56tss7eoTrRvLV5YG5cc6lE4UoPLksmc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161179058)
Think about it. Those tariffs mean more than just higher prices for Chinese goods. They're a lifeline for American workers--folks who've been sidelined by cheap imports for too long. When we buy American, we're paying fair wages to our own people, not subsidizing China's race to the bottom. Trump's tariffs are a chance to rebuild our factories, our communities, our pride. They're a way to make sure a guy in Ohio or Pennsylvania can put food on the table without worrying about some knockoff from Shanghai stealing his job. That's not just economics; that's justice.
China's not going to back down easy. They've been getting away with this for decades, and they're used to weak leaders who fold at the first sign of trouble. But Trump? He's different. He's got the guts to stare them down, to say, "You want to play hardball? We'll play harder." These tariffs are just the start--a warning shot across the bow. If China wants to keep stealing our IP and flooding our markets with their sweatshop junk, they're going to pay a price. And that price is going to keep going up until they learn to respect us.
This is where you come in, America. We're at a crossroads. We can either stand with President Trump and fight for our nation's interests, or we can let China keep running roughshod over us. This isn't about politics; it's about patriotism. It's about whether we believe in rewarding hard work and innovation, or whether we're okay with letting a foreign power gut our economy and humiliate our workers. I know where I stand, and I know where Trump stands. The question is: where do you stand?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..3Rtsj1eoLPh56tss7eoTrRvLV5YG5cc6lE4UoPLksmc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161179058)
I'm calling on every American to rally behind this fight. Support the tariffs. Buy American whenever you can. Talk to your neighbors, your friends, your family--spread the word that China's been picking our pockets for too long, and Trump's the only one with the spine to stop them. Write to your congressman, tell them to back the President's plan. Let's send a message to Beijing that we're not their doormat anymore. We're the United States of America, and we don't bow to bullies.
This is bigger than one policy or one man. It's about our future. It's about whether we're going to let our adversaries call the shots, or whether we're going to take back control of our destiny. President Trump's leading the charge, but he can't do it alone. We need to stand shoulder to shoulder, united as a nation, and show the world what we're made of. China's been antagonizing us for years, but those days are over. With Trump at the helm and the American people behind him, we're going to win this fight--and we're going to win big.
So let's do this. Let's stand with Trump, stand for America, and tell China: no more free rides. The time for action is now. Let's make America great again--together.
* * *

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Mark’s Next Town Hall: Tucson, Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We have a chance to stop all of this and put real limits on Trump at the ballot box next November, but that’s not going to happen on its own. We have to do the work, and we have to reach as many people as possible.
#

You didn’t just dream it up, folks.
Trump and the GOP campaigned on lowering prices and strengthening the economy last year.
Instead, Trump blew up the strongest economy in the world. Republicans in Congress are watching it happen and doing nothing to stop it.
Now, everyone is paying the price — working families, the middle class, veterans, students, and senior citizens. The cost of living continues to rise, and the outlook continues to fall.
We have a chance to stop all of this and put real limits on Trump at the ballot box next November, but that’s not going to happen on its own. We have to do the work, and we have to reach as many people as possible.
Mark Kelly is committed to doing that work. And this Sunday, **Mark’s going to hold a town hall in a Republican-held district in Tucson with Congressman Greg Stanton and Senator Cory Booker.** We have to get out there and deliver this message, or it’s never going to get through.
If you’d like to chip in to support Mark and help notch some wins in Arizona next year, please: [**Make a donation to his campaign so he can keep this work going. He can’t do it alone.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-apr25.P7mRSa&refcode=em250412-1-500&t=1&akid=6041%2E6688874%2EdkQfoD)

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105712583/539146992/1328794144?refcode=ea.0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiYWIwZGJkLWIxMTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eoakGKV_NnowqBzYffDd87C-fpsDsh6ROvAJ1FEhn4k=&emci=79bc26e8-d816-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)

Add your name to condemn Trump’s toxic coal agenda>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105712587/539146995/-611924833?refcode=ea.0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiYWIwZGJkLWIxMTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eoakGKV_NnowqBzYffDd87C-fpsDsh6ROvAJ1FEhn4k=&emci=79bc26e8-d816-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN THE PETITION →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105712589/539146997/-611924833?refcode=ea.0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiYWIwZGJkLWIxMTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eoakGKV_NnowqBzYffDd87C-fpsDsh6ROvAJ1FEhn4k=&emci=79bc26e8-d816-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
Trump wants to label coal as _“beautiful” and “clean.”_ Who is he kidding?
Coal is one of the biggest drivers of climate change. It releases more carbon dioxide when burned than any other fossil fuel. It poisons our air and water and puts low-income and working-class communities — especially those near mines and power plants — at greater risk of asthma, heart disease, and cancer.
And yet, earlier this week Trump signed a series of executive orders to bring back dirty, polluting coal at the expense of our communities. The executive orders will:
* _Allow coal plants that were scheduled to shut down to keep running, even if they’re outdated and highly polluting._

* _Suspend federal rules that limit emissions of mercury, arsenic, and other toxic chemicals._

* _Direct agencies to open more federal land for coal mining and halt efforts to transition away from fossil fuels._

* _Go after states that have passed their own clean energy laws — like California and New Mexico — by ordering the Justice Department to challenge their authority to act on climate._

All of this is happening despite the fact that renewable energy is cheaper, cleaner, and more reliable. **But Trump doesn’t care about facts. He cares about billionaires who profit from pollution.**
That’s why we’re gathering signatures from our most active supporters to show that Trump’s agenda is not only unpopular with people in 18326 — but that the rest of us are raising our voices to stop these attacks.
**[Can you represent grassroots supporters in 18326 today by signing our petition to condemn Trump’s toxic coal agenda and demand a clean energy future?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105712591/539146999/-611924833?refcode=ea.0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiYWIwZGJkLWIxMTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eoakGKV_NnowqBzYffDd87C-fpsDsh6ROvAJ1FEhn4k=&emci=79bc26e8-d816-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)**
[**ADD YOUR NAME →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105712593/539147001/-611924833?refcode=ea.0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiYWIwZGJkLWIxMTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eoakGKV_NnowqBzYffDd87C-fpsDsh6ROvAJ1FEhn4k=&emci=79bc26e8-d816-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0bab0dbd-b117-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: “Beautiful, clean coal”? Give us a break. | URGENT: Donald Trump has signed a MASSIVE rollback of climate protections to boost coal production. The consequences will be deadly. | Trump wants to label coal as “beautiful” and “clean.” Who is he kidding? Coal is one of the biggest drivers of climate change. It releases more carbon dioxide when burned than any other fossil fuel. It poisons our air and water and puts low-income and working-class communities — especially those near mines and power plants — at greater risk of asthma, heart disease, and cancer. And yet, earlier this week Trump signed a series of executive orders to bring back dirty, polluting coal at the expense of our communities. The executive orders will: Allow coal plants that were scheduled to shut down to keep running, even if they’re outdated and highly polluting. Suspend federal rules that limit emissions of mercury, arsenic, and other toxic chemicals. Direct agencies to open more federal land for coal mining and halt efforts to transition away from fossil fuels. Go after states that have passed their own clean energy laws — like California and New Mexico — by ordering the Justice Department to challenge their authority to act on climate. All of this is happening despite the fact that renewable energy is cheaper, cleaner, and more reliable. But Trump doesn’t care about facts. He cares about billionaires who profit from pollution. That’s why we’re gathering signatures from our most active supporters to show that Trump’s agenda is not only unpopular with people in 18326 — but that the rest of us are raising our voices to stop these attacks. This movement is powered by people like you who care deeply and act boldly — and we aren’t turning away. Thanks for taking the time to sign our petition, Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Peter, we recently asked this team of Fearless Fighters which issues mattered most to you – and the response we received was overwhelming. Here’s what we found:
Over 80% of you said protecting funding for **Social Security and Medicare** is a _top priority_.

78% of you shared that the **turbulent economy** is a top concern right now.

73% said **gun violence** is an issue that needs to be addressed immediately.
These were just a few of the many issues raised by Fearless Fighters like you – many issues which are under threat by the Trump administration’s destructive Project 2025 agenda.
**Letitia James has heard you loud and clear – and she’s already taking action:**
* She’s fighting tooth and nail to protect Social Security and Medicare.
* She’s working to protect consumers from corporate price gouging.
* And she’s taking firearms off our streets and holding gun manufacturers accountable.

**What matters most to you matters to Letitia James. That’s why she’s using the full power of her office to defend our rights, our economy, and our democracy. **[**But none of this work is possible without grassroots support from folks like you! body:
$5 because VoteVets shut Elon Musk up quick after he dumped $20 million into that Wisconsin Supreme Court election — and lost.
#
Peter, it’s the team over at VoteVets.
We’re asking you — humbly — to chip in $5 or whatever you can afford today.
Yes, just $5.
$5 because VoteVets shut Elon Musk up quick after he dumped $20 million into that Wisconsin Supreme Court election — and lost.
$5 because we got in early and ran a six-figure, tactical, targeted campaign to mobilize Veterans across Wisconsin.
$5 because VoteVets is where you donate if you want to pick a fight with the richest man on earth — and win.
And yes, $5 because donations from folks like you are the primary way we pay for campaigns like that one, and all the rest we’re cooking up across the country in the lead up to 2026.
We hate to say it, but our fundraising has fallen off this month. We get it, times are tough, but if it continues it will impact our programs.
[**So, we’re hoping you could chip in $5 (or whatever amount is right for you) today to help us get back on track. Can we count on you?**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250412-1-120&t=1&akid=34337%2E3013755%2Efv0G8B)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CHIP IN $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/4573?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.vNLBap&refcode=em250412-1-120&t=2&akid=34337%2E3013755%2Efv0G8B)**

By dismantling EI-ISAC, Trump has weakened our nation’s ability to detect and prevent cyber threats targeting our elections. **You don’t have to take it from us – hear it straight from our Secretaries of State:** | **“We’ve lost information sharing among election officials nationwide.”**

**“The very existence of these agencies is, in itself, a deterrent. If they’re gone, we’re going to have a lot more problems.” **

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=other]
Hi team! It's been a great month on the campaign trail with people across the state ready to elect new leadership for Virginia!
Before we share our highlights from the campaign trail, can you rush a donation ahead of our mid-month deadline on April 15? We’re counting on grassroots donations from folks like you to make these campaign stops possible! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025]
📍Norfolk, Virginia
Jay kicked the month off by meeting with Norfolk Democrats and sharing his values of service and community. People were fired up to elect an Attorney General who puts Virginians first!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025]
📍Troutville, Virginia
Folks from as far as Tidewater to the Blue Ridge Mountains joined Jay to see the energy and fresh leadership that he's ready to bring as Virginia's next AG.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025]
📍Charlottesville, Virginia
Jay met with young voters to hear their concerns about the future of Virginia. As a dad of young kids, he knows building safe communities and providing more economic opportunity are top priorities for our future.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025]
📍Alexandria, Virginia
Standing room only! Lots of people showed up to hear how Jay would create a safer state for families, ensure good-paying jobs, and provide affordable healthcare. Folks are fired up to replace Jason Miyares this November!
Jay is grateful to everyone who has joined his team – whether it's joining a meet & greet or chipping in – we wouldn't have the momentum we have today without you.
With our mid-month deadline quickly approaching, can Jay count on you to chip in $10 or more to ensure he has the resources he needs to meet voters across the state and defeat Jason Miyares in November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=10]
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=10]
CHIP IN MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025]
Thank you for being with us,
Jay Jones HQ

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

[**NOW:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105713245/539148617/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250412_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGRjNDY5ZC1iMTE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kibT3_LN0AFcIQ_uYBD2_ZY-BVCasNoN89nodcL83aM=) It’s become clear as day that voters have [**REJECTED**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105713246/539148618/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250412_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGRjNDY5ZC1iMTE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kibT3_LN0AFcIQ_uYBD2_ZY-BVCasNoN89nodcL83aM=) Elon’s toxic, extremist agenda. ********[_For the first time since the election, Democrats have the MOMENTUM. We WON in Wisconsin, and we OVERPERFORMED in Special Elections across the country. But we can’t let up – not when Trump, Musk, and Republicans are scheming to SLASH Medicaid and DESTROY life-saving initiatives that millions of Americans rely on. So I’m asking you personally, because this couldn’t be more urgent: Will you join 5,000 Democrats and rush a $15 donation – or whatever you can spare – to GROW our momentum and send Trump and Musk a message that they’ll NEVER forget? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105713247/539148619/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250412_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGRjNDY5ZC1iMTE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kibT3_LN0AFcIQ_uYBD2_ZY-BVCasNoN89nodcL83aM=)******** | name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Half a million stronger
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250412-1314-foote&t=1001&akid=1314%2E342411%2E49BsRU ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Last weekend, over half a million people in America took to the streets to
protest Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their attacks on our democracy.

Rashida joined the Hands Off rallies in Michigan, standing shoulder to
shoulder with volunteers and activists on the frontlines.

Ilhan led a powerful movement on the National Mall in Washington, D.C.

Ayanna spoke in Boston, invoking the spirit, courage, and stamina of past
generations to fight the Musk-Trump agenda.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250412-movement.40niPs&refcode=em20250412-1314&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1314%2E342411%2E49BsRU ]Our Squad is rising up — and grassroots donors make it possible. Pitch
in now.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250412-movement.40niPs&refcode=em20250412-1314&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1314%2E342411%2E49BsRU ]Three panel image. The top left has Rashida and protesters standing
with a sign that says "hands off social security". The second panel shows
Ayanna speaking at a Hands Off! rally with supportive protesters behind
her. The third image on the bottom shows Ilhan speaking at a Hands Off!
rally with two people standing behind her and clapping.

Together, our Squad and tens of thousands of protesters spanning 1200
protests sent a bold message to Trump and Musk:

Hands off our rights, our jobs, and our democracy.
Hands off the programs working people depend on.

We are at a pivotal moment,
Peter. Trump and Musk are
leading the charge to enrich billionaires at the expense of working
families. This is not just troubling; it's a direct threat to everything
we hold dear.

As Ayanna said, “The power of the people has always been greater than the
people in power.” Now is the time to put that power into action.

We need to continue organizing, mobilizing, and rejecting the divisive
agenda that Trump is imposing on our country. [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250412-movement.40niPs&refcode=em20250412-1314&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1314%2E342411%2E49BsRU ]Will you donate $5, $10,
$20 or more today to help us continue mobilizing, organizing, and standing
up against Trump?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250412-movement.40niPs&refcode=em20250412-1314&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1314%2E342411%2E49BsRU ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1314%2E342411%2E49BsRU

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

| FIRST: Democrats just barely lost the House and Senate in 2024, giving the GOP one of the _slimmest_ __ majorities in recent memory. THEN: Senate Republicans backed Donald Trump’s radical agenda 100%, endangering millions of Americans with cuts to Social Security and healthcare access. BUT NOW: Ratings have Republicans as "strong favorites to hold Majority" in the Senate! What’s going on here??? We thought that Senate Republicans were unpopular amongst voters, and we thought enough Democrats would be fired up to defeat them in 2026...but these ratings say otherwise. Have Democrats really given up? [It’s not too late to turn this around. We just created an emergency $25,000 goal to jumpstart the Democratic movement to win back the Senate, and we urgently need you to step up and help today >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98475ee3-eb45-49ea-b342-85fd6d24db67/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Republicans know how close we are to flipping these critical seats, taking back our majority, and putting an end to Trump's tyranny! So they're holding big-dollar fundraising events and tapping into their billionaire friends like Elon Musk to keep their MAGA trifecta. So if Democrats can’t pick up the pace, we’ll be in real jeopardy. That’s why we’re shocked that more Democrats aren’t fired up to jump into this fight and win back the Senate! | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0cb8fdc-6d91-4c9a-a2fb-ca2174775a1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
