We’re currently seeing an unprecedented attack on our federal agencies and our federal workers from Donald Trump and unelected billionaire Elon Musk. But first, I want to outline for you the threats we’re facing and what I am doing to fight back. Donald Trump and Elon Musk have gone after funding for education and cancer research, taken a sledgehammer to the EPA, and eliminated domestic watchdogs like the CFPB that stop banks from ripping off consumers. It’s hard to imagine Medicare, Social Security, and Medicaid won’t be next on their list. Americans are scared – and rightfully so. That’s why I introduced the “Nobody Elected Elon Musk Act” – to hold Elon accountable for his attacks on our federal government. Standing by is not an option. We have to disrupt the process as much as we can, fight back, and hold Republicans accountable. Blue Amp Action and I are leading the charge – but we need you on our team. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for joining the fight with me, Melanie Stansbury | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/0SUFcfCz1_ln5EcTp4nWG4cwm11I4HLOVaKInNfWqFLSlkftuZACbLZMg_hB8o-233ZxClHSDdrBD-zLNrsvtn1rXatJoE7vgcZPlL7hY2lhlYGPKZk5V1VQ-uHoirpYdatEWdel7-yJyC5l0tPcc3q9So1AgBTDKPlmKfvDaANtckIBF7VPcxC3CxqghIElX6yfUnZSvWGy4yrrg71DeIoDJhNYk_pO4KINJ5_GmaMOs1LUG_9C3oj4Ie9qgZP5FAL4CEkxRTXnLD9WpSwk_VL-VhHLO4MHVAN3q7wTKvwXmIbZP_cVmkd4t96MSMBLJX37aENMbhJfWGUzvvnvpQdeFv7qi5bwm5SUBRC8per6pWajtFitFL4eICbGkGfjs1B_X2ptQ1zcro9A3Y6SJNaTcI5IaA6E4gS5-hrreo2SsMBtjm6dGcykCTXftQKJuvEgU7r-_pHWh7BYVPD8cF4o6GLuRbqD1fDv7AE5wg/3boS4-CnhUBVF0Rt-K9KwpSgTSDvCOZT/7 "Vice President JD Vance")

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/sxsFTNFZhAQUi8QctcAfwXom04T20OeHj_Z9FLTV91A99TmbT-ZJnPtd_ubEoSBdSsXBd_x61FpUbGa1_PjPRfi1b0w9yrJHOQQ-6lumKkj68UH3xMApwSzx1WMuCWBklA9Pwd_d48S7a7QivDFrBz9M4k8yeqBDkehbCoKQQlztMoIw7YDecRNhbs89rGe3CcmWb3QY-i25SXChOLw22yY6t9h80uuX_OiuJsEbrLcMDjQmSjjiZsHxtNqNrxMXrBzQ_6BdhezrZkoqNfpnnvjRXRdVWQWmd1SqU4E_dz4t9V36BsVB2JnGxMty7NW4oFJlb5LbZ1jP0U-19g6Ov9sgjQrE8YaOz5ncthIemzoCFMHX6F9w_2BVa4Bd-tS5TF7ZrWN7BFLQajUQSqYjGwwlJpZG4JKgVgQwlphKDEJR5bvUwQ5YwYdts8oJv30VPYaoXbkNtC0bLkN7rj0i3iE4zmn8bImTV8--1R1xpg/Poir-JmB5vjGMGumd33HrGZqDtGiJ2Uz/7 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/_4ltbIhjeSJgNeEAV_MoPC8KMNXl8yZeKnJtlI8y8orSMkn9TSFlkfPdXncgKu8gKexaBZuKWQU2Z_uebhzZ_WiANW4g7G7c0TtEabH3lRt0Z-7dvzXEbMSKr1uNou2ifkI09UwdYDAgic09eteSanr19CpNDmYFWiaGYMO2i9U4CjnTc2FsmHGfEAvwQya8EH816Yhrg_SrekNMTBlswTslur7DKYH6-tZyd6obv9HiZ8GkeETVtKF8sjIoE29DjoK62GI2-UhYL3cdilHxVxduKiu-cj-yKPes90K846YRxcetVQGdFF2LYN-5iLrVtMQaKHfYXmMQ9UuCg2HNnFUjnBGHW7oDO0_O0txVkMe9ulI7EEYvZ6N6LPCHbf7FEUY__8DAJdxuwuaTVQNtZDCnlMzCmWO3rhb5A0akRVLk6XIwVlcfrS95iaOoifat0VxVUMytllBLOyj59XeozgVFY2Tx0qKzRS7_r3urZw/nAVLNJubKpcrpaM9_LxLm7Ntu4dju5pu/7 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/b-ssFkDX0JAMqyCwPBU2yqnywB2WPBhaOPzzogT1uC9ubb_A4YYFbV_OM79Y0t7s0R3uavVC1E6WcjH9zy0rmm_I9z7Xf2FOKVrOKUZ4rq-wn6lKTs_6BSmbchSpIIgw_quIoHtY2JRtyRVVuWrmxB1dvkYmlNgcOpNDL71SljxRLup03hz5NVtuSZhl4ssStZ9fA_Yktw03X1055ZtgZGaqCjq2ZsqATuwzLrm7pvq_mSSfTH9tmWL0AT6PfcnejbYi1iscAu5fb1NZE7VjtrMJoKgmmIX_QIIlV-gPtYi--Q0bBIgic_vfdGiJE0eALAbDgFduj-VPfvzhEJa4aSpSL3znI5AfEOzjdXqIpx6MJVBmRX2D5g5bdvBgxvKIF9d_GS9s0Fw6EQCPbGnslvYD8n6-pCCcU5-vcKuNQa8X3r5dG5QgWDSNjSQ-mEDLK_1_l0iu4HUPjeIQX_hrpkStsC9ogrN5lIyOG1Dp9A/bIZYe3Rw3hjhJQDcCRftZI3P9D__G7zE/7 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/jQtM2jd3q18u7wLtTrQSbaSUsLobr0TSBij9nnixAbGmJ_d0Y5TG_sWlcoe276k04SQ2CgTLteHPBUlR8JaVBy143b7O32tNvDzwoAHQOJhNRKzwowltDxgamleABRBTuj9r6XUZPaSPw9-aUoRtniPiH_S7lJKJrfsQJExWoNi4qb4CWUnqAxLRPefHR4bhNW287rRZQKLnai6yn1emdGzWVNL0IyEU_FOqe3XqVhl0DzLdsKBBo_XSwZMJacIFAxJlMpad76YH0ji2T2AdU1_Sn17ERMpaQDrxoCO9Ncv4qxa1WGXB9rRCrdJMnlLdA7xO_Pf9qUVOvitph0scr7XHoLTwpvqdM9qYiIe9VeyKxWlbEvPSgYD4gYPEr9M2QKtBPxRYfXgr7TWt84yKkSarqgA2C2rseuqrH1r_NbTZbsWbVe1pXNFIJqG_RBsh6KHvyk5-TnlAvZmcbyNgR4o6Unlp08H6P9ep9rCzpA/zi9N8yv_CG3bOKt8fQb28-PrQkSZxllH/7 "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/hocRgwAbXuV-FdRzbQ_5sEu8EYNZ82AVQ173saSOmcfScuF6M6Udf6h4_bPFVeAPajBJMm02cVyizy_zMiO0KOrtbOb0qfEV7gMiPwQq2l8hlaDPqLBcygAIDPdwKX9EvCGcaHaR1xihyOLIppbW5Rs4WA16oWy5o8Vix7ePke2aWTQOvTxtBv_Zoa4VjZ60O9c4Tauaw4tgdI9-7DBOx37V0Bd3b9FAxzGxRFFVACVKPLP-hQLOxAPgctm9ERfNsLxvvHrtJ9gyjahPUu9BYuxnJqaM8i2w9UdB75Gnc4lJIRBJ_ls2je2VmjJy3Kb9XwoFeTrvFXrgeQyGYRi1_Ar5fUlA8lqyRuKTybLLMksVdEIRerT_NcLWIucx0uYOjl0WS0Vae0LfX8-V_KZH2qmxvVlJ3PvzSU-_tNm3TTRCK-Ca3PGxxK6GnKMvFHGQpzWAK__ouefBtQcG3W5pECXGdT2L85P4yu2MsHrp4g/KvJ-pEcUcW5ZEyW_aA22_UAmp71-0T2h/7 "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance

clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003 |

Hi Peter, it’s Matt.

I wanted to follow up on an urgent request we sent you recently to sign our “Save Social Security” petition.

To recap: **Elon Musk and his MAGA allies have been spreading dangerous misinformation and pushing policies that could strip Social Security benefits from millions of hardworking Americans.**

_Some people have even been wrongfully declared dead—and have had to sue just to get their payments reinstated._

We know this sounds extreme, but it’s happening. And if we don’t speak out, it could get much worse.

**[That’s why we’re asking you—one more time—to add your name to stand with Democrats like Elizabeth Warren who are demanding immediate action to Save Social Security! clean_body: | Hi Peter, it’s Matt. I wanted to follow up on an urgent request we sent you recently to sign our “Save Social Security” petition. To recap: Elon Musk and his MAGA allies have been spreading dangerous misinformation and pushing policies that could strip Social Security benefits from millions of hardworking Americans. Some people have even been wrongfully declared dead—and have had to sue just to get their payments reinstated. We know this sounds extreme, but it’s happening. And if we don’t speak out, it could get much worse. | Thank you for participating! break Social Security, then dismantle it when it no longer works

body:
Since the start of Trump’s second term, layoff announcements of federal workers have been at their highest since the pandemic.

Since the start of Trump’s second term, layoff announcements of federal workers have been at their highest since the pandemic. According to CNBC, more than 280,000 people have lost their jobs as a result of the federal job cuts.

320,000+ hard-working federal employees call Virginia home. These workers who have dedicated their lives to serving their communities deserve more. **They deserve a leader that understands what it means to dedicate their career to public service.**

Over the past few months, Abigail has traveled across the Commonwealth to listen to Virginians. She understands the toll that the recent chaos and division is taking on Virginia residents. **As Governor, she will always stand up for Virginia jobs, regardless of who’s in the White House.**

clean_body: Since the start of Trump’s second term, layoff announcements of federal workers have been at their highest since the pandemic. | = Since the start of Trump’s second term, layoff announcements of federal workers have been at their highest since the pandemic. According to CNBC, more than 280,000 people have lost their jobs as a result of the federal job cuts. 320,000+ hard-working federal employees call Virginia home. These workers who have dedicated their lives to serving their communities deserve more. They deserve a leader that understands what it means to dedicate their career to public service. Over the past few months, Abigail has traveled across the Commonwealth to listen to Virginians. She understands the toll that the recent chaos and division is taking on Virginia residents. As Governor, she will always stand up for Virginia jobs, regardless of who’s in the White House. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. #
Hi Friend,
House Republicans are doing everything they can to sell out the American People in favor of Elon Musk and his billionaire friends. This week, they voted to defund Medicaid so they can give more tax cuts to the richest people in the country.
This will not stand. That’s why I’m launching the **Justice League PAC** to help support Democratic candidates who are taking on Republicans in tough to win districts and win back the House. In California alone, Reps. Ken Calvery, Young Kim, and David Valadao all voted to cut Medicaid for their constituents so billionaires could get a tax break.
[Will you help us take these Republicans out by contributing to the Justice League PAC today? Every dollar we raise will go directly to electing Democrats in tough districts and winning the majority in 2026.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105725067/539186329/1811114784?refcode2=51637d39-d317-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode=em250412&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTYzN2QzOS1kMzE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OuZN4R55INJG66PMycmMA1eGRqbJOKkJ3iJAtQ_Kgk4=)

subject: The services Republicans want to gut to give tax cuts to the wealthiest in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
It’s not right.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105725222/539186895/911331649?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_PT_TaxCuts_250412_T1_1_b&ms=MW_ATA_EM_PT_TaxCuts_250412_T1_1_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTBhZjczYy1kNTE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQ6okeRa19BPii1yT-5JvzGe6_IiA_0kAPV4Q_wQadY=) **Medical research. Access to education. Kid’s school lunch programs. FEMA. Public health funding. Veterans’ services. Health care for people with disabilities. Medicaid.** These are the services Republicans want to gut to give tax cuts to the wealthiest few in America, Derek.

Instead of finding ways to lower costs for the middle-class, Republicans are focused on cutting taxes for the wealthy at the expense of families, seniors, veterans, and students.

And you know who will reap the benefits of these tax cuts? Billionaires like Elon Musk. It’s appalling – and frankly, President Trump and Republicans’ budget and economic policies are a disaster for our country.

I’m doing whatever is necessary to stop them from doing more harm to Virginians and all Americans.

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Was Trump right about anything?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Here’s the truth about Trump’s track record: |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105725287/539187136/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjdmMjA4NC1kNTE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=syoMwUq6hBLMxWWU1rMPxMMvgJnoD9WhtmW7UFwUf0E=&emci=6ff00fe8-f916-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=467f2084-d517-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7878003)
You won’t believe what I saw at the airport the other week. There was a woman wearing a hat that said **“Trump was right about everything.”** **At first, I thought it had to be a joke. But it wasn’t — _she meant it!_ ** Look, I normally wouldn’t let something like that get to me. But if we don’t speak up, Trump’s lies will only continue to take hold. **[That’s why I’m fighting every day in Congress to hold Trump and his MAGA allies accountable. Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to join me in this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105725288/539187137/-1813556205?&refcode=E12916-20250412-10Things-SL-Trump&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjdmMjA4NC1kNTE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=syoMwUq6hBLMxWWU1rMPxMMvgJnoD9WhtmW7UFwUf0E=)** | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105725289/539187138/-1813556205?&refcode=E12916-20250412-10Things-SB-Trump&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjdmMjA4NC1kNTE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=syoMwUq6hBLMxWWU1rMPxMMvgJnoD9WhtmW7UFwUf0E=)
---
But it got me thinking: Has Trump actually been right about _anything?_
**Let’s go through the list:**
❌ He said he’d end the war in Ukraine within 24 hours — **_it’s still going on._**
❌ He claimed he would lower prices — tell that to anyone who’s had to buy groceries lately. **Americans are spending anywhere from 10% to 50% more after he took office.**
❌ He said he wants to run for a third term — which is _unconstitutional._
❌ He promised to cut spending — meanwhile, he’s costing taxpayers tens of _millions_ to go golfing.
❌ He talked about taking over Gaza, buying Greenland, and making Canada the 51st state — **none of which are helping our global reputation.**
❌ He said jobs should be merit-based — then handed national security over to people who sent **_classified war plans in a Signal chat._**
I could go on, friend, but here’s the bottom line. Trump hasn’t been right about anything. I’m not going to sit back and let him do even more damage. **[If you believe that America deserves better, I’m asking you to step up today and help me fight against Trump’s MAGA agenda in Congress. Will you chip in $10, $15, or even $25 today to help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105725290/539187139/-1813556205?&refcode=E12916-20250412-10Things-SL-Trump&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjdmMjA4NC1kNTE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=syoMwUq6hBLMxWWU1rMPxMMvgJnoD9WhtmW7UFwUf0E=)**

clean_body: Here’s the truth about Trump’s track record: | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. You won’t believe what I saw at the airport the other week. There was a woman wearing a hat that said “Trump was right about everything.” At first, I thought it had to be a joke. But it wasn’t — she meant it! Look, I normally wouldn’t let something like that get to me. But if we don’t speak up, Trump’s lies will only continue to take hold. = | = But it got me thinking: Has Trump actually been right about anything? Let’s go through the list: ❌ He said he’d end the war in Ukraine within 24 hours — it’s still going on. ❌ He claimed he would lower prices — tell that to anyone who’s had to buy groceries lately. Americans are spending anywhere from 10% to 50% more after he took office. ❌ He said he wants to run for a third term — which is unconstitutional. ❌ He promised to cut spending — meanwhile, he’s costing taxpayers tens of millions to go golfing. ❌ He talked about taking over Gaza, buying Greenland, and making Canada the 51st state — none of which are helping our global reputation. ❌ He said jobs should be merit-based — then handed national security over to people who sent classified war plans in a Signal chat. I could go on, friend, but here’s the bottom line. Trump hasn’t been right about anything. I’m not going to sit back and let him do even more damage. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Sorry to the woman in the airport, but I think it’s time for a new hat. — Eric | = Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. = Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. # [#]
Peter, in the days since Trump rolled out his universal tariffs, here’s what’s happened:

→ The global stock market PLUMMETED and continues to fall, with economists warning of recession each day Congress doesn’t act to turn things around.
→ Trump caved with his "90-day pause," and instead manipulated markets to boost the wealth of his billionaire buddies.
→ Everyday goods are becoming more expensive as the economy continues to slide, and we are once again paying for Trump’s ego.

These tariffs are going to disproportionately hurt Black and Latino Texans just trying to make ends meet, so TOP PAC is fighting back. We need to know what you think. Do you approve of Trump’s tariffs? Take our brief survey now to share your opinion on our current economy >>

https://secure.everyaction.com/Zc_MDCJWXU2uzDWaXGqFSA2?refcode=sbd_top_em_eng_041225_tariffs

Thanks for sharing with us!

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: These warriors fought for America. Now they need YOU.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
My fellow veterans need your support.

| | | Peter,

This is Congressman Troy Downing, Combat Veteran and proud conservative patriot. I’m reaching out with an urgent request – because the fight for America doesn’t end on the battlefield. It continues in the halls of Congress, and that’s where we need YOU.

Right now, six of my fellow warriors, also Freshman GOP Congressmen, are on the front lines of a different kind of battle: defending our Constitution, securing our borders, and standing up for American values against the radical Left.

These leaders don’t just talk the talk – they’ve served, sacrificed, and stood in the gap for this nation. But they can’t do it alone.
---

**[Will you chip in today and SPLIT a donation between these America First Veteran Congressmen to help them start their first term strong?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._bW9uZXlfcGxlZGdlPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQxMl9SRC01Vy4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MjU1MjEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MTJfUkQtNVcuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjI1NTIxLTI4OTkifQ/GrjcF1nptgCSxzJ-v70j9Q)**

[ SPLIT A DONATION](https://trk.emails.troydowning._bW9uZXlfcGxlZGdlPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQxMl9SRC01Vy4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MjU1MjEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MTJfUkQtNVcuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjI1NTIxLTI4OTkifQ/HosjWIlFu1S7Bf-VWo58BQ)
---
The Left has deep pockets filled with special interest money. But we have something stronger: patriots like you who believe in faith, freedom, and the future of our country.

Your contribution isn't just a donation – it's an investment in leadership forged by service and tested under fire.

**[Let’s send a message that America’s warriors don’t back down – on the battlefield OR in Congress.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._bW9uZXlfcGxlZGdlPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQxMl9SRC01Vy4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MjU1MjEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MTJfUkQtNVcuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjI1NTIxLTI4OTkifQ/Wm07Z9cgWla01S_TnPUWdg)**

name: Team WFP
subject: “Handouts for me, but not forthee”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Elon Musk has spent _months_ hacking away at Social Security, veteran’s benefits, education, health care, and countless federal agencies. **In return, his company SpaceX was just gifted a $5.9 billion government contract.** 1 It’s the dictionary-definition of corruption. Trump and Musk _claim_ to care about “cutting waste,” but in reality, all they’re doing is picking our pockets and funneling it back to themselves and their billionaire friends. And as a smokescreen, they’re constantly inventing new ways to try and divide working families against each other, instead of focusing on the ones doing the pillaging. [We’ll need to fight harder than ever — not just in the coming months, but over the next four years — to stand up to these corrupt billionaires. So please make a donation today, and help the Working Families Party build a political party that’ll actually fight for working families. We’ll ship you one of our brand new “No One Likes Billionaires” stickers no matter how much you give.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqugw92OTn3eBVs4NDg9Yvc0k4WBJ-TLjEbwMI7cs12ejbi2yhiScFmvrYnQIY0Q__CxItinh3FYKGJ_JZvDBpsBj6FiHUR68Y2fOqRDmMzhwrdTp8dwqUT_vL4Q9mKr22VxCvAINTaKuen1DD14FIdN6XrodFNC01f6_I-4F6IAhhUeKz0r4lIW2A8lpK-z6YBOYbMqaYSrgN5oBOAeaM-bGPqEY20Vcm1wvn9lGkVlmGmIQZcM7RLA4cYBkDw_hG6zfECBPYxEreZP0sI3PcvvN3Emw_ySvuuwkx_CxoyRCLke35CIwurRnwV4o0dpJEABAD27-iJ-KZTbnZTyAJOv7m9EsIy-FVubu3wP5w0M1g/4fl/7qY-CcEiRJ2vVS9EYlVNQA/h0/h001.7ZdSp8CAInFgR7Yf6DXbEVOD_7TX7EF3eac7snMlUjM) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqugw92OTn3eBVs4NDg9Yvc0k4WBJ-TLjEbwMI7cs12ejbi2yhiScFmvrYnQIY0Q__CxItinh3FYKGJ_JZvDBpsBL9nmZ5j7pHY1M20OlkT-iQtI1lJjRB-Ku13gwSwoZIfttOuy5mpWZxMw7aFQJo108rDHeqWxDtpsIicpxFV-yt96w7s6Tu_XpXtGz4ozc57sVM1DuFc6Lj6eFU1u3Ud2vCnIZTPVF2Zj81sXTdJe6krtzZS383u3gcwxIUdbWQ9larSrnoMO3Gzt8iif1eGCsU_qeaure_lDrvtFbAcHw-6y_LY8O1UGCUB6qoDka9OR99DBfeBtSDZZHR3fmLDhqY2sDf-SFvQiqRdJEai_aQ/4fl/7qY-CcEiRJ2vVS9EYlVNQA/h1/h001.mJKNAL-YnGYfazj0POswrgPXaWHKOEibYrBYPxzT8ZA) **[Donate and get a sticker](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqugw92OTn3eBVs4NDg9Yvc0k4WBJ-TLjEbwMI7cs12ejbi2yhiScFmvrYnQIY0Q__CxItinh3FYKGJ_JZvDBpsBaTeqsHGnXI6pTn8OwHp-_U8K1ff844CUVhzc_4J33sCgWrogHBb6KlzHicsRnz2q_of6Ui5oCv0sZSwac624HyYNRR9WjAoLB6m2exn_bagi6TYYCLUy6J8b2F11FkqY-ZR-lcKbr9kqpVy58iNe1WSaD9b7lhk6xSRjvx4KXtKXoJpq98YtBzMstK_h-7cGhvq4VX4qLL72NtPq-FhrFe-BfrFXNMdnydvn_xODl4wJSo9LrbZQ-ie2FPJJpU-7NezPSA28mOl0UseObyi35g/4fl/7qY-CcEiRJ2vVS9EYlVNQA/h2/h001.yTd93VVJFzUS--KpbF4kjwlAgrpyklfP8Gs0b3LItYA)** **We are not powerless in this moment, Peter.** We thwarted Musk’s $25 million attempt to buy a Supreme Court seat in Wisconsin. And _millions_ of people are taking to the streets in solidarity and protest against the Trump/Musk regime. But our work can’t — and won’t — stop there. clean_body: | | | Peter, Elon Musk has spent months hacking away at Social Security, veteran’s benefits, education, health care, and countless federal agencies. In return, his company SpaceX was just gifted a $5.9 billion government contract. 1 It’s the dictionary-definition of corruption. Trump and Musk claim to care about “cutting waste,” but in reality, all they’re doing is picking our pockets and funneling it back to themselves and their billionaire friends. And as a smokescreen, they’re constantly inventing new ways to try and divide working families against each other, instead of focusing on the ones doing the pillaging. We are not powerless in this moment, Peter. We thwarted Musk’s $25 million attempt to buy a Supreme Court seat in Wisconsin. And millions of people are taking to the streets in solidarity and protest against the Trump/Musk regime. But our work can’t — and won’t — stop there. We must keep fighting to build a political system that fights for the many, not the few. In solidarity, Team WFP Source: 1\. , United States Space Force , April 4, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: re: The largest Medicaid cut in American history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
It’s Kirsten Gillibrand. I’m reaching out once again because this week, the GOP has ramped up their attacks on Medicaid.

Here’s what you need to know: House Republicans voted to move forward with the LARGEST Medicaid cut in American history.

This budget could become a reality if we don’t speak out and fight back.

Make no mistake: Donald Trump and Elon Musk are attempting to line the pockets of the ultra-wealthy, while allowing working-class Americans to suffer.

[**_Will you sign your name on my urgent petition to tell the GOP that folks across the country OPPOSE their plans to cut Medicaid?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105725401/539187435/-1225918853?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.04.12_FWD-Medicaid_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDVmODc5Yy1kNzE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZHsbKe2RcEOiKd3Lq-QknE-EK1hi2tCUIDmasNTBRGU=&emci=858650ce-1817-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b45f879c-d717-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7659029) Thank you for caring,

Kirsten Gillibrand — BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE — [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105725402/539187436/-1225918853?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.04.12_FWD-Medicaid_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDVmODc5Yy1kNzE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZHsbKe2RcEOiKd3Lq-QknE-EK1hi2tCUIDmasNTBRGU=&emci=858650ce-1817-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b45f879c-d717-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7659029) Kirsten here.

Let’s talk about the GOP’s latest antics.

The GOP Senate Majority Leader is rushing a vote on Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s massive spending cuts.

Republicans will say anything to justify lining the pockets of billionaires, so I want to lay out exactly what this vote means: | **(1)** Cutting Medicaid and SNAP benefits, leaving families with higher medical and grocery bills.

**(2)** Enormous tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy.

**(3)** Disaster for our economy and for working families.

[**Will you be one of the 50,000 signatures we need to tell Elon Musk, Donald Trump and the entire GOP to keep their hands OFF our Medicaid?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105725403/539187437/-1225918853?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.04.12_FWD-Medicaid_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDVmODc5Yy1kNzE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZHsbKe2RcEOiKd3Lq-QknE-EK1hi2tCUIDmasNTBRGU=&emci=858650ce-1817-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b45f879c-d717-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7659029) | | | [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105725404/539187438/-1225918853?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.04.12_FWD-Medicaid_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDVmODc5Yy1kNzE3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZHsbKe2RcEOiKd3Lq-QknE-EK1hi2tCUIDmasNTBRGU=&emci=858650ce-1817-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b45f879c-d717-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7659029)

Thank you,

Kirsten

clean_body: It’s Kirsten Gillibrand. I’m reaching out once again because this week, the GOP has ramped up their attacks on Medicaid. Here’s what you need to know: House Republicans voted to move forward with the LARGEST Medicaid cut in American history. This budget could become a reality if we don’t speak out and fight back. Make no mistake: Donald Trump and Elon Musk are attempting to line the pockets of the ultra-wealthy, while allowing working-class Americans to suffer. Thank you for caring, Kirsten Gillibrand — BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE — Kirsten here. Let’s talk about the GOP’s latest antics. The GOP Senate Majority Leader is rushing a vote on Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s massive spending cuts. Republicans will say anything to justify lining the pockets of billionaires, so I want to lay out exactly what this vote means: | (1) Cutting Medicaid and SNAP benefits, leaving families with higher medical and grocery bills. (2) Enormous tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy. (3) Disaster for our economy and for working families. | | | I’m doing everything in my power to fight back. I hope you’ll join me. Thank you, Kirsten * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Peter:
**The House of Representatives has now passed the SAVE Act** — a blatant attempt to disenfranchise millions of voters by creating overly burdensome proof-of-identity requirements every time you register to vote.
Now we need to stop it from passing the Senate.
As US News & World Report explained: “**Even a driver’s license wouldn’t be enough for most people to register...** The SAVE Act will put everyday Americans’ right to vote at risk.”
Make no mistake: The SAVE Act is one of the biggest threats to voting rights we’ve seen in a generation — and we must do everything we can to prevent it from becoming law.
**We’re mobilizing Americans to contact their lawmakers and demand that they reject this bill. We will continue organizing to defend free and fair elections so we can build a truly representative democracy with fair maps. And grassroots supporters like you power our work.**
[**Can we count on you to make a donation to All On The Line today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105725735/539188215/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SAVEPassed_email_20240412-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEPassed_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240412-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEPassed_&utm_campaign=SAVEPassed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2NGNiNGJhLWQ4MTctZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KaEmVSlV7Z03VhciX9PUxnOtuYwyrfJniCFa3vbkU50=)

clean_body: Contribute to help stop the anti-democracy agenda | “The SAVE Act Could Stop You From Voting” — US News & World Report, March 31, 2025 = Peter: The House of Representatives has now passed the SAVE Act — a blatant attempt to disenfranchise millions of voters by creating overly burdensome proof-of-identity requirements every time you register to vote. Now we need to stop it from passing the Senate. As US News & World Report explained: “Even a driver’s license wouldn’t be enough for most people to register... The SAVE Act will put everyday Americans’ right to vote at risk.” Make no mistake: The SAVE Act is one of the biggest threats to voting rights we’ve seen in a generation — and we must do everything we can to prevent it from becoming law. We’re mobilizing Americans to contact their lawmakers and demand that they reject this bill. We will continue organizing to defend free and fair elections so we can build a truly representative democracy with fair maps. And grassroots supporters like you power our work. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Millions of Americans would struggle to meet the SAVE Act’s paperwork requirements to register to vote, disproportionately affecting military voters, rural voters, tribal citizens, survivors of natural disasters, people of color, and working-class Americans. Let’s be clear about what this is about: making it more difficult for certain citizens to vote, all while claiming to address very false claims of widespread voter fraud. We need all hands on deck to stop the SAVE Act and push back on voter suppression in all its forms. = We’ll keep you posted on new developments with the SAVE Act and other key battles. | Team, House Democrats announced they will be targeting 35 GOP held seats in the upcoming 2026 midterms - including districts that were once believed to be safe for Republicans. _Why?_ Because the work National Ground Game did in the Florida special elections showed that Dems can flip Republican seats blue, _even in territory once thought to be safe for the GOP_.

| Here’s the catch though - we can’t just rely on DC to win these seats in 2026. The higher levels of our party are notorious for dumping millions of dollars worth of TV ads into target races & wiping their hands clean without even one staff member stepping foot in a district.

---
| But at National Ground Game, **_we know it takes more than TV ads to win elections._** We believe in on the ground organizing and the persuasive power of face to face conversations with voters. That’s why we hire experienced local organizers & deploy talented organizers from across the nation into districts - _going door to door & winning votes one conversation at a time._

The higher levels of our party are notorious for dumping millions of dollars worth of TV ads into target races & wiping their hands clean without even one staff member stepping foot in a district. | But at National Ground Game, we know it takes more than TV ads to win elections. We believe in on the ground organizing and the persuasive power of face to face conversations with voters. That’s why we hire experienced local organizers & deploy talented organizers from across the nation into districts - going door to door & winning votes one conversation at a time. | | | Some of our team members on the ground in the FL special elections. | To run an effective ground game , we have to give our organizers what they need to be successful while they are on the ground - AirBnB’s so they have a place to stay, transportation to their turfs, & paying them a living wage. With help from supporters like you, we can build the nationwide ground game Dems need to flip 45 Republican seats blue in 2026. | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for your support.** | | | | Zee Cohen-Sanchez** Founder & Director National Ground Game PAC ---|---|--- | | | | | National Ground Game National Ground Game PAC PO Box 1004 La Mesa, California | | | | ---|---|--- | You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us. |

## State Dept. Axes Global Pro-LGBTQ Program
A $25 million program that offered taxpayer funds to promote LGBTQ ideology abroad has been removed from the State Department website by the Trump administration. The Biden administration State Department’s Global Equality Fund posted its final grant application solicitation on Jan. 6, offering $2.1 million to help LGBTQ people “mitigate and recover from violence and restrictions [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/jGVvgzIENmygGKNkeg_k-M-ZHzIYbrCc6w_mYoFpJF-uaCAHmxfVyTrvZ1gEy5ErBoH0yk_m6JU742rPkoUdBp0yfQO7WcFEdkRQBxMuDgI5D5o-oEUsh2q_41Soi7vXch_nM0fHC495pFUYY25IVKKBrgCA5qCL7CBink5lXnwvwG2jYkvY0JzhLgjr4ftWpUmtBN20L2KqCO1bHFw0SF_B484cb0jzmMumLmfT6ObEYZp91Eq8Ql-SBK8hvxcqFDlMJAOMOgAntupbr1IlTYg7h0cbuZ1ND0ZvzFX4MCgkX-H6UedeDldm0zD-QGYZEA/FvZ8uA4Ig766TMmnvCM9ldXzMT6D_GeL/7)

President Donald Trump’s recent meeting with New York Governor Kathy Hochul has reignited discussion about the Constitution Pipeline. ## Entitlement spending doomsday clock is ticking * WorldNetDaily * by Jeremy Portnoy, Real Clear Wire
Topline: If the federal government wants to keep Medicare and Social Security intact for the next 75 years, it will need an extra $78.2 trillion in cash that is not available under current law. ## Wisconsin Farmer Again Challenges USDA Program Rules as Discriminatory
THE CENTER SQUARE—The U.S. Department of Agriculture continues to discriminate in many of its programs, according to a new letter from the Wisconsin Institute for Law and Liberty. | | **BREAKING: Trump Planning $100 Million Military Parade for 79th Birthday**

A military parade is straight out of an authoritarian dictatorship.

**And Trump wants to use OUR taxpayer dollars to fund it!_We’re FUMING!!_**

[**Sign our urgent petition by MIDNIGHT to CANCEL Donald Trump’s disgusting military parade »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250412_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=19515%2E878179%2EyXta7F) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250412_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=19515%2E878179%2EyXta7F) | [TELL CONGRESS: DEFUND TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250412_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=19515%2E878179%2EyXta7F)

Donald Trump is determined to cut programs like Social Security, Medicaid, and the Department of Education — _yet he wants money for a PARADE?!_

**This is a slap in the face to the American people. We won’t stand for it, so we’re calling on Congress to act IMMEDIATELY.**

[**Join 25,000 Democrats in our virtual protest and add your name NOW to cancel Trump’s military parade!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250412_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=19515%2E878179%2EyXta7F)

Jesse Watters **[put Jessica Tarlov in her place](https://substack.com/redirect/0eeee791-c93d-4470-b7ff-403de0a0409f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for trashing President Trump's tariff agenda, complaining about its effects on the market during a debate on "The Five."
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0eeee791-c93d-4470-b7ff-403de0a0409f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0eeee791-c93d-4470-b7ff-403de0a0409f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Tarlov took a premature victory lap for Trump's tariffs appearing to tank the stock market earlier this week.
"Did you know that this afternoon, Greek bonds were a safer investment than U.S. thirty years?!" Tarlov asked the panel. "Can you believe that?!"
Watters couldn't sit silent anymore, "Jessica, you don't even know what you're talking about, you don't even know what a bond is!"
"Jessica keeps on saying that 'Trump caved',' how s this a cave if he got 75 nations to the negotiating table to redo their tariffs on the United States?" Watters fired back.
Watch the Fox News clash right here:

# _Well, well well ..._
# Liberals in NYC are finally begging for more cops as crime gets out of control: poll
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/88e7e668-752b-4062-af3e-91e6f6dcd398?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The once liberal center for artistic bohemians in New York City, Greenwich Village, is apparently changing its tune on defunding the police as crime grows out of control.
A reported 83% of residents want more police in the streets, according to **[a poll by the Sixth Precinct Community Council](https://substack.com/redirect/799cd1a8-6387-4e3f-937a-ba7cc365dc09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. 600 residents were polled, and 487 of them said that more law enforcement is needed to keep the community safe. 74% also said the New York needed stronger prosecution for the crime of drug dealing, according to the survey.
Just a few short years ago, Democrats across the country were lock-step in calling for defunding the police. Then-NYC Mayor Bill De Blasio **[cut the NYPD budget by $1 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/e6ae78d4-6375-4e11-9c0d-0bc3b2959e82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in response to the death of George Floyd and subsequent nationwide riots.
"The village is frequently criticized for being liberal -- but clearly the numbers here indicate we're not happy," precinct council member Steve Zammarchi said of the historic neighborhood where Bob Dylan used to croon his anti-war rhapsodies.
"Enough is enough," said native villager Trevor Sumner, president of the Washington Square Association. "Liberalism is being challenged and people are realizing that our attempts to honor some ideals are leading to worst outcomes."
Major felonies have now surged over pre-pandemic levels, with 1,789 reported in 2024, up from 1,534 in 2019, the NY Post reports. In 2025 so far, felonies are down 21%, compared to last year.

I’m counting on you to stand with me.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250412-4943-footer&t=1&akid=4943%2E420207%2EDx9Te1)
Peter, I just got off the stage with Bernie Sanders, AOC, Ro Khanna, and friends from across the labor movement, and I am so inspired by the energy and enthusiasm I saw on the ground in Los Angeles.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250412-2?refcode=em20250412-4943&amount=3&refcode2=4943_420207_Dx9Te1&akid=4943%2E420207%2EDx9Te1)
**People all over the country are ready to take on the billionaires backing the Trump administration and build a government that puts working people first.**
But we need to remember that it’s not enough for Democrats to simply be “not Donald Trump.”
We have to fight for real, tangible change that people will actually feel in their everyday lives: Medicare for All, just and humane immigration reform, lowering the cost of living, and more.
**I’m in this fight for the long haul, and I’m counting on you to stand with me.[Will you pitch in $3 today to help power our movement and build a government that puts working people first?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250412-2?refcode=em20250412-4943&amount=3&refcode2=4943_420207_Dx9Te1&akid=4943%2E420207%2EDx9Te1)**

Together,
Pramila Jayapal

| Peter,

Right now, our country is at a defining moment. The Trump Administration is pushing extreme policies that target the most vulnerable among us— _but Emerge alums are refusing to back down!_

At a time when trans people are facing significant barriers to accessing care, Trump has signed a flurry of executive orders limiting access to life-saving, gender-affirming care. Not only that, but the Health and Human Services Department is attempting to remove gender-affirming care from the list of essential services covered under the Affordable Care Act, putting lives at risk.

**Rep. Becca Balint** – _the first openly gay lawmaker to represent Vermont in Congress_ –introduced the Transgender Health Care Access Act, which would direct the Health and Human Services Department to develop, implement, and train providers in gender-affirming care.

We know that representation in government matters, and this is just one example of how Emerge alums in elected office are standing strong. That’s why we’re ramping up our training and recruiting the next class of Emerge women to step up, run for office, and join the fight across the country!

[_**Your support today will help us train even more women to win elections and secure representation for the New American Majority to ensure that our voices are heard and our communities are protected. clean_body: At a time when trans people are facing significant barriers to accessing care, Trump has signed a flurry of executive orders limiting access to life-saving, gender-affirming care. | = | Peter, Right now, our country is at a defining moment. The Trump Administration is pushing extreme policies that target the most vulnerable among us— but Emerge alums are refusing to back down! At a time when trans people are facing significant barriers to accessing care, Trump has signed a flurry of executive orders limiting access to life-saving, gender-affirming care. Not only that, but the Health and Human Services Department is attempting to remove gender-affirming care from the list of essential services covered under the Affordable Care Act, putting lives at risk. Rep. Becca Balint – the first openly gay lawmaker to represent Vermont in Congress –introduced the Transgender Health Care Access Act, which would direct the Health and Human Services Department to develop, implement, and train providers in gender-affirming care. We know that representation in government matters, and this is just one example of how Emerge alums in elected office are standing strong. That’s why we’re ramping up our training and recruiting the next class of Emerge women to step up, run for office, and join the fight across the country! = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s do this! Sandra Bishop Chief Development Officer, Emerge * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States

name: Ro Khanna
subject: I just got off the stage at Bernie's rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
I just got off the stage at Bernie’s rally in Los Angeles.
Here’s what I said:
No to Trump’s reckless blanket tariffs.
No to Republicans gutting Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.
No to mass firings.
No to rampant corruption.
No to a government of, for, and by the billionaires.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benefits-over-billionaires-town-halls?refcode=20250412-bernie [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benefits-over-billionaires-town-halls?refcode=20250412-bernie]
People are mad as hell. So am I. That’s why I’m fighting to stop Trump and Republicans' attack on critical benefits by taking our economic message nationwide now .

name: brutal update [via FFR]
subject: re: horrific Social Security update
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8) It's with a heavy heart that we write to you today.

Donald Trump is threatening to CUT Social Security because of Elon Musk: | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60556?t=3&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8) | [**Breaking from _Rolling Stone:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60556?t=4&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8)

[**" Trump Admin Threatens to Stop Social Security If DOGE Can't Have Personal Data"**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60556?t=5&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8)
---|---
But, the deadline to sign our petition to SAVE Social Security from Trump and Musk's tyranny came and went... **_but we never saw your signature._**

**Too much is at stake for America 's seniors who have paid into Social Security their entire lives if the GOP slashes this crucial program, so we're reactivating our petition until the end of the day to give you a chance to sign it.**

It will only be open for another 12 hours.
[**_Please do not squander this opportunity! Just sign your name:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60556?t=6&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8)
[SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY: SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60556?t=7&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8)
---
_Fight for Reform_

\---- FORWARDED MESSAGE ----
[**DISGUSTING: Elon Musk Calls Social Security "The Biggest Ponzi Scheme Of All Time"**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60556?t=8&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60556?t=9&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8)
The MAGA billionaire's latest attack on Social Security is appalling.

And remember: Elon Musk's DOGE could really cut Social Security!!

**That 's why Congress HAS to protect Social Security and safeguard it from Elon and MAGA Republican destruction!!**

[**Be one of the emergency 6O,OOO signatures we need today to demand Congress save Social Security ->**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60556?t=10&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8)
[SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY: SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60556?t=11&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8)
---
Elon Musk said the social safety net that benefits 68 million Americans is a pyramid scheme and repeated claims that millions of dead Americans are receiving Social Security payouts.

**WE KNOW** this is just not true!

**WE KNOW** that Social Security benefits are essential to Americans' livelihoods.

**WE KNOW** millions of folks would be living out on the streets without their Social Security.

**AND WE KNOW** that Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and his fake DOGE agency are looking for **ANY** reason to gut and privatize Social Security.

Bernie Sanders was right all along:
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60556?t=12&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8)
[**Please sign your name to tell Congress to SAVE Social Security before it 's too late! Our petition requires 60,000 signatures by 11:59 PM ->**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60556?t=13&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8)
[SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY: SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60556?t=14&akid=22991%2E4449941%2EJbPUN8)
---
Thank you.

Fight for Reform

name: Oregon GOP
subject: Wishing You a Joyous Passover
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
May this season of freedom and faith bring you peace and blessings.

| | | | [ ](https://oregon.gop/)
---
| | Friend, Passover is here, and as families across Oregon and around the world come together to celebrate this sacred holiday, we extend our heartfelt wishes for a meaningful and peaceful Passover.
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/-G3zFLPWd-Hq/VTUvNURjUDgwTHRxRGd0dk50d0pkQjhNRXI1VjloQ3AxaEpYRldDTmxEVzQzY2s1M1pzVFVNRlRjK2lLSW54TU01RVNwenV4OTkzTmkwS0x6d2IrWkM2NG5TNlVibmNXakpPR3NJRU1pY1k9S0/)
---
| | This eight-day festival commemorates the Israelites’ exodus from Egypt and their deliverance from slavery to freedom. It is a time of reflection, gratitude, and renewed confidence in the enduring values of faith, freedom, and family. Whether you’re gathering for a Seder, reading from the Haggadah, or simply reflecting on the meaning of faith and the steadfast love of YHWH, we hope Passover brings light, joy, and hope to your home. Wishing you and your family a Happy Passover. Oregon GOP
---

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Happy Passover!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [#] Hi friends,

Tonight marks the first night of Passover, one of the most important holidays for those of us in the Jewish community. We commemorate the Exodus of the Israelites from Egypt. On this holiday, we pause to think of those around the world suffering from bondage and oppression.

This night is different from all other nights, as we gather with friends and family to tell the Passover story by reading the Haggadah at our seders. I look forward to this beautiful tradition each year, for the opportunity to see loved ones and remember this ancient story of liberation that has inspired our people for thousands of years.

If you’re celebrating Passover this year, I hope you have a wonderful seder.

Chag Kasher V’Sameach,

Josh
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. name: Josh Harder
subject: Let me explain why this is so important
body:
re: Latino organizing
Peter,
This week, my campaign has put a spotlight on Latino voters and how crucial it is for Democrats to do a better job of organizing and messaging with Latino voters to combat GOP misinformation.

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Electing Democrats who stand as our last line of defense →
body:
It’s been one week since our last special elections, and now we must look ahead to what’s next.
---
Derek — It’s been just over a week since our special elections in Wisconsin and Florida, and now, it’s time to look ahead to what’s next. **_Two_ major elections are happening in Virginia and New Jersey in just a few months.** These elections are an opportunity to weaken Republicans’ power and elect Democrats who will stand as our last line of defense against Trump in their states and districts. It may seem early, but supporting the Virginia and New Jersey Democratic state parties _now_ is critical to building robust voter protection programs, scaling our on-the-ground organizing efforts, and reaching undecided voters in the coming months, well before Election Day. As you can imagine, work like this takes a lot of resources, and state parties need to start building them now. Last week, we saw what happens when Democrats organize everywhere and get involved early. That’s a formula we’ll need to repeat to help elect Democrats in Virginia, New Jersey, and beyond this year. [**So, can we count on you to split a $10 donation between the Democratic Party of Virginia, the New Jersey Democratic State Committee, and the DNC as we look ahead to elections later this year and work to elect Democrats up and down the ballot?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-va-nj-split-april-2025/?amount=10&refcode=em_20250412_3155_fr&refcode2=3155_22930333_4husva&akid=3155%2E22930333%2E4husva) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Democratic Party of Virginia, the New Jersey Democratic State Committee and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-va-nj-split-april-2025/?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250412_3155_fr&refcode2=3155_22930333_4husva&akid=3155%2E22930333%2E4husva)**

body:
State Democrats are prioritizing policies that have a real, tangible impact on the folks they represent. They deserve our support in this moment. | | |
---
| |
---|---
While millions of Americans live paycheck to paycheck, Donald Trump is focused on renaming the Gulf of Mexico and making Canada the “51st state.” While families struggle to afford groceries, Elon Musk’s unelected DOGE crew is targeting the Department of Education and checking off Project 2025 line items. While consumers face rising costs and brace for extreme tariffs, out-of-touch MAGA Republicans are cheering on a right-wing oligarchy. **_It’s pathetic._** **State Democrats nationwide are using their power to expand economic opportunity, create new jobs, lower costs, and fight for working families – but they need our support to expand Democratic power seat by seat.** [Will you chip in $3 to stand up to MAGA extremism and elect state Democrats who will fight for a better future in places like your state? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDSCrqP7HuqdVbYWeROcw0LhTJW2Cgkh9tF1MG3vtwi1FG4SlnhbG6W1XBFHjNNLIXKv3-Zc0z5aL-juqf_cKlOL5imlsnQ9vonbuf5pecpssuW994TBKoP2eSWBOeKUL_-GddQwDbMQ6_IWopxj8U6T90-Bq6E4Mvy1TbeIQgx9VnkDztWSCjhEkv6aVqLg8Me9xJYcB6Mxsv9B0YX0JJjy1td08vfDxcFFJbryjXsYfzpN8AKLMKOf0KPPKL9x5z_upviUOuqCZRT5Ty85GEEamlBbaN_fXfrDbnDcSNOqjtkTaJk-SNct2qmfoIBowgz6nGwmMxPAwZCSsURGBvi4QZBNTGQMAVZElEAkLFbZA/4fl/7Srq-jSDT2WfqZqSOWyWNg/h0/h001.yIY-U6oiYuozU2fSg4BVP4AHVt76c4iZbfTUKkR0iKU) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

| Friend, The false attacks against me have already started. Just MINUTES after I announced, John Cornyn’s campaign started attacking me with lies because he is TERRIFIED of losing to me. **Polling has already shown that I’m beating him by over 20 points.** He has no record to stand on because he has turned his back on conservative priorities, President Trump, and Texans TIME AND TIME AGAIN. **That’s why he’s going to try and spend millions of dollars trying to tear me down with false smears, and he’s already running to Swamp lobbyists to get the money to do it. ** That’s why I need your help to fight back against his LIES. Every single dollar counts. Can you chip in [$10, $20, $40](https://kenpaxton.cmail19.com/t/r-l-thiujylk-nuylrudkjy-j/), or any amount to help me get my message out to voters all across Texas? Ken Paxton |

clean_body: Urgent: Help Fund Crucial Senate Races >> Urgent: Help Fund Crucial Senate Races >> | | | | | Dear Peter, Breaking news: With liberal Democrat Senator Jeanne Shaheen's unexpected announcement, we now have another open Senate seat on the map for this 2026 Election Cycle. Michigan, Minnesota, Georgia, and now New Hampshire are all winnable seats for Republicans to flip, BUT WE NEED TO ACT QUICKLY to fund these races. Important: Open Senate seats are the best opportunity to hold and grow our Republican Majority so we can continue enacting the Trump agenda. We have 'Open Seat Funds' already set up to support the eventual Republican nominees in many states. Please donate right now to KEEP THE SENATE RED! We can't let Democrats derail the historic and Nation-saving work Republicans are doing in the United States Senate to support and protect President Trump and his administration. If we lose the Senate, President Trump's term effectively will be cut in half. Thank you! We can't waste this HUGE opportunity. ********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************** For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate** | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | | -

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Virginia’s next governor could be a Trump-aligned extremist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
We need to talk about Virginia.
Earlier this year, a poll showed the 2025 governor’s race in a dead heat. That means this won’t be a campaign decided by flashy TV ads or partisan noise. It’ll come down to turnout— the kind of turnout GOTV PAC specializes in .
We’re proud to be backing the Democratic nominee, Abigail Spanberger, because she’s the candidate who understands what leadership looks like — measured, principled, grounded in facts and service. Her opponent? That’s where things get serious.
Winsome Earle-Sears is more than just a Trump supporter. She’s an anti-abortion, anti-marriage-equality hardliner who’s currently going around the commonwealth praising Trump’s disastrous tariffs that have sent our economy into a tailspin.
So this is where GOTV PAC comes in. Our turnout model doesn’t rely on outside consultants or generic ads. We do the organizing ourselves — and we do it for a fraction of the cost. While other groups spend $75 or more to reach a voter, we do it for just $10!
As we finalize our list of House of Delegates, those down-ballot races will play a critical role in driving the turnout needed to hold the Democratic majority and elect Spanberger governor.
This race is going to be close. And the outcome is going to come down to what we do right now. Chip in today and help us reach the voters who will decide this race. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04122025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thanks for sticking with us.

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Washington, DC 20002

Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.
